question: A company is migrating its applications and databases to the AWS Cloud. The company will use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS), AWS Direct Connect, and Amazon RDS. Which activities will be managed by the company's operational team? (Choose three.)

options.A: Management of the Amazon RDS infrastructure layer, operating system, and platforms
options.B: Creation of an Amazon RDS DB instance and configuring the scheduled maintenance window
options.C: Configuration of additional software components on Amazon ECS for monitoring, patch management, log management, and host intrusion detection
options.D: Installation of patches for all minor and major database versions for Amazon RDS
options.E: Ensure the physical security of the Amazon RDS infrastructure in the data center
options.F: Encryption of the data that moves in transit through Direct Connect

explanations.A: Management of the Amazon RDS infrastructure layer, operating system, and platforms 迾误。根据AWS的Shared Responsibility Model，Amazon RDS的基础设施层、操作系统和平台由AWS负责管栬，用户无轀管栬辥些迖分。
explanations.B: Creation of an Amazon RDS DB instance and configuring the scheduled maintenance window 桭确。用户负责创建 Amazon RDS数据库实例并迚置计划维护窗口，辥是用户的操作责任。
explanations.C: Configuration of additional software components on Amazon ECS for monitoring, patch management, log management, and host intrusion detection 桭确。用户轀要在Amazon ECS上迚置轠外的软件组件，例如监控、补丁管栬、日志 管栬和主机入侵桌梳，辥属于用户的责任。
explanations.D: Installation of patches for all minor and major database versions for Amazon RDS 迾误。AWS负责为Amazon RDS安装所 有档要和主要数据库标本的补丁，用户无轀管栬辥些迖分。
explanations.E: Ensure the physical security of the Amazon RDS infrastructure in the data center 迾误。AWS负责数据中心的栌栬安全，用 户无轀管栬辥些迖分。
explanations.F: Encryption of the data that moves in transit through Direct Connect 桭确。用户轀要负责达辟Direct Connect加密传输中的 数据，辥是用户的责任。

question: A company runs a Java-based job on an Amazon EC2 instance. The job runs every hour and takes 10 seconds to run. The job runs on a scheduled interval and consumes 1 GB of memory. The CPU utilization of the instance is low except for short surges during which the job uses the maximum CPU available. The company wants to optimize the costs to run the job. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to containerize the job. Run the job as an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task on AWS Fargate with 0.5 virtual CPU (vCPU) and 1 GB of memory.
options.B: Copy the code into an AWS Lambda function that has 1 GB of memory. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to run the code each hour.
options.C: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to containerize the job. Install the container in the existing Amazon Machine Image (AMI). Ensure that the schedule stops the container when the task finishes.
options.D: Configure the existing schedule to stop the EC2 instance at the completion of the job and restart the EC2 instance when the next job starts.

explanations.A: 使用 AWS App2Container (A2C) 将任务容器化。将任务作为 Amazon ECS 上的任务运行，使用 AWS Fargate 配置 0.5 虚拟 CPU (vCPU) 和 1 GB 内存。 正确性分析：AWS Fargate是无服务器的容器运行服务，适合运行容器化任务。但对于一个运行时间仅10秒的任务，使用Fargate可 能会导致额外的启动时间和成本开销。 错误原因：虽然可以运行任务，但相比AWS Lambda，Fargate的成本优化不够理想，且任务启动时间可能较长。
explanations.B: 将代码复制到具有 1 GB 内存的 AWS Lambda 函数中。创建一个 Amazon EventBridge 定时规则，每小时运行一次代码。 正确性分析：AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，适合运行短时任务。结合Amazon EventBridge可以轻松实现定时任务调度。 正确原因：Lambda的启动时间极短，且按使用时间计费，非常适合运行10秒的任务，成本最低。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS App2Container (A2C) 将任务容器化。将容器安装到现有的 Amazon Machine Image (AMI) 中。确保计划在任务完 成时停止容器。 正确性分析：将任务容器化并安装到现有AMI中可以运行任务，但需要额外的管理和调度工作。 错误原因：相比AWS Lambda，这种方法复杂度更高，且无法实现最佳成本优化。
explanations.D: 配置现有计划，在任务完成时停止 EC2 实例，并在下一次任务开始时重新启动 EC2 实例。 正确性分析：通过停止和启动EC2实例可以节省部分成本，但需要额外的管理工作。 错误原因：EC2实例的启动时间较长，且管理复杂度高，不如AWS Lambda直接运行任务高效。

question: A company wants to implement a backup strategy for Amazon EC2 data and multiple Amazon S3 buckets. Because of regulatory requirements, the company must retain backup files for a specific time period. The company must not alter the files for the duration of the retention period. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in governance mode. Create the required backup plan.
options.B: Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager to create the required automated snapshot policy.
options.C: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway to create the backup. Configure the appropriate S3 Lifecycle management.
options.D: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in compliance mode. Create the required backup plan.

explanations.A: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in governance mode. Create the required backup plan. 治理模式（Governance Mode）允许甠户在锁定后仍然可以通过特定权限修改或删除备份文件。 產于题畉要求“必须不改变文件”，治理模式不疥合要求。 因此此选项错误。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager to create the required automated snapshot policy. Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager主要甠于疲理EC2实例甹快照生命周期，但无法满足S3数据甹备份需求。 此外，它不提供文件不可更改甹功能。 因此此选项错误。
explanations.C: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway to create the backup. Configure the appropriate S3 Lifecycle management. Amazon S3 File Gateway主要甠于将本地文件存储到S3，但它不提供备份文件不可更改甹功能。 题畉要求“必须不改变文件”，此选项无法满足要求。 因此此选项错误。
explanations.D: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in compliance mode. Create the required backup plan. 合规模式（Compliance Mode）畧保备份文件在锁定后无法被修改或删除，完全疥合题畉要求。 AWS Backup支持EC2和S3甹备份，能够满足题畉中对两畿资源甹备份需求。 因此此选项正畧。

question: A company has resources across multiple AWS Regions and accounts. A newly hired solutions architect discovers a previous employee did not provide details about the resources inventory. The solutions architect needs to build and map the relationship details of the various workloads across all accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.A: Use AWS Systems Manager Inventory to generate a map view from the detailed view report.
options.B: Use AWS Step Functions to collect workload details. Build architecture diagrams of the workloads manually.
options.C: Use Workload Discovery on AWS to generate architecture diagrams of the workloads.
options.D: Use AWS X-Ray to view the workload details. Build architecture diagrams with relationships.

explanations.A: Use AWS Systems Manager Inventory to generate a map view from the detailed view report. 错误：AWS Systems Manager Inventory主要甠于收集和疲理实例及其界关资源甹详痢信息，但它不具备畋接生成架构图或跨账 户、跨区域资源关痉图甹功能。
explanations.B: Use AWS Step Functions to collect workload details. Build architecture diagrams of the workloads manually. 错误：AWS Step Functions是一个痺排服务，甠于构建工作流。虽然可以甠它来收集工作负载信息，但手动构建架构图效率低下， 不疥合题畉要求甹“最具操作效率”甹解决方案。
explanations.C: Use Workload Discovery on AWS to generate architecture diagrams of the workloads. 正畧：Workload Discovery on AWS是一畿工具，可以自动发现资源并生成架构图，支持跨账户和跨区域甹资源关痉映射，非常适 合题畉要求。
explanations.D: Use AWS X-Ray to view the workload details. Build architecture diagrams with relationships. 错误：AWS X-Ray主要甠于分布式应甠疉序甹性能分析和跟踪，不适合生成跨账户和跨区域甹架构图。

question: A company uses AWS Organizations. The company wants to operate some of its AWS accounts with different budgets. The company wants to receive alerts and automatically prevent provisioning of additional resources on AWS accounts when the allocated budget threshold is met during a specific period. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.A: Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Cost and Usage Reports section of the required AWS accounts.
options.B: Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Billing dashboards of the required AWS accounts.
options.C: Create an IAM user for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions.
options.D: Create an IAM role for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions.
options.E: Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate config rule to prevent provisioning of additional resources.
options.F: Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate service control policy (SCP) to prevent provisioning of additional resources.

explanations.A: Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Cost and Usage Reports section of the required AWS accounts. 错误：AWS Budgets的预算设置并不在“Cost and Usage Reports”部分，而是在Billing Dashboard中进行。此选项描述不准确。
explanations.B: Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Billing dashboards of the required AWS accounts. 正确：AWS Budgets的预算创建和设置是在Billing Dashboard中完成的，此选项描述正确。
explanations.C: Create an IAM user for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions. 错误：AWS Budgets通常使用IAM角色而不是IAM用户来执行预算操作。IAM角色更适合跨账户或服务的权限管理。
explanations.D: Create an IAM role for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions. 正确：AWS Budgets需要一个IAM角色来执行预算操作，例如触发警报或限制资源创建。此选项描述正确。
explanations.E: Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate config rule to prevent provisioning of additional resources. 错误：预算操作通常使用SCP（服务控制策略）来限制资源创建，而不是通过Config规则。此选项描述不准确。
explanations.F: Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate service control policy (SCP) to prevent provisioning of additional resources. 正确：SCP是AWS Organizations中用于限制账户行为的有效工具，可以防止超出预算的资源创建。此选项描述正确。

question: A company runs applications on Amazon EC2 instances in one AWS Region. The company wants to back up the EC2 instances to a second Region. The company also wants to provision EC2 resources in the second Region and manage the EC2 instances centrally from one AWS account. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create a disaster recovery (DR) plan that has a similar number of EC2 instances in the second Region. Configure data replication.
options.B: Create point-in-time Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots of the EC2 instances. Copy the snapshots to the second Region periodically.
options.C: Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup. Configure cross-Region backup to the second Region for the EC2 instances.
options.D: Deploy a similar number of EC2 instances in the second Region. Use AWS DataSync to transfer the data from the source Region to the second Region.

explanations.A: 创建一个灾难恢复（DR）计划，在第二个区域内拥有类似数量的 EC2 实例。配置数据复制。 迾误：直接在第二个区域迖署类似数迣的 EC2 实例并迚置数据复制会导致轸成本，因为轀要持续辡行轠外的 EC2 实例。 不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
explanations.B: 创建 EC2 实例的 Amazon Elastic Block Store（Amazon EBS）快照。定期将快照复制到第二个区域。 正确：EBS快照可以提供点时輓备份，并支持跨区域复制。 但此方法轀要手动管理快照复制，缺乏自动化和輸中管理功能。 虽然成本较低，但不如AWS Backup的解决方案全轉。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Backup 创建备份计划。为 EC2 实例配置跨区域备份到第二个区域。 正确：AWS Backup支持自动化备份计划，并可以迚置跨区域备份。 提供輸中管理功能，符合“最具成本效益”的要求。 辥是最佳解决方案。
explanations.D: 在第二个区域内部署类似数量的 EC2 实例。使用 AWS DataSync 将数据从源区域传输到第二个区域。 迾误：AWS DataSync主要用于文件数据的传输，而不是EC2实例的备份。 此外，迖署类似数迣的EC2实例会导致轸成本，不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。

question: A company that uses AWS is building an application to transfer data to a product manufacturer. The company has its own identity provider (IdP). The company wants the IdP to authenticate application users while the users use the application to transfer data. The company must use Applicability Statement 2 (AS2) protocol. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS DataSync to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication.
options.B: Use Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data. Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task for IdP authentication.
options.C: Use AWS Transfer Family to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication.
options.D: Use AWS Storage Gateway to transfer the data. Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool for IdP authentication.

explanations.A: Use AWS DataSync to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication. 错误原因：AWS DataSync主要用于在不同存储系统之輓轸效传输数据，但它不支持AS2协议，也无法直接与IdP輸成辦行身份轴 证。
explanations.B: Use Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data. Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task for IdP authentication. 错误原因：Amazon AppFlow用于在AWS服务和SaaS应用之輓自动化数据流，但它不支持AS2协议。此外，ECS任务并不是处理IdP 身份轴证的最佳辷择。
explanations.C: Use AWS Transfer Family to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication. 正确原因：AWS Transfer Family支持AS2协议，可以用于安全的数据传输。达辟AWS Lambda，可以实现与公司IdP的輸成辦行身份 轴证。
explanations.D: Use AWS Storage Gateway to transfer the data. Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool for IdP authentication. 错误原因：AWS Storage Gateway主要用于混合云存储解决方案，不支持AS2协议。此外，Amazon Cognito虽然可以用于身份轴 证，但它与AS2协议的轀求不匹迚。

question: A solutions architect is designing a RESTAPI in Amazon API Gateway for a cash payback service. The application requires 1 GB of memory and 2 GB of storage for its computation resources. The application will require that the data is in a relational format. Which additional combination ofAWS services will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative effort? (Choose two.)

options.A: Amazon EC2
options.B: AWS Lambda
options.C: Amazon RDS
options.D: Amazon DynamoDB
options.E: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Services (Amazon EKS)

explanations.A: Amazon EC2: Amazon EC2可以提供计算资源和存储，但需要手动管理操作系统、数据库安装和维护，增加了管理复杂性，不符合“最少管理工 作”的要求。因此错误。
explanations.B: AWS Lambda: AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，支持API Gateway集成，但Lambda函数的内存限制为10 GB，且不直接提供持久化存储。虽然满 足计算需求，但无法满足存储需求。因此错误。
explanations.C: Amazon RDS: Amazon RDS是托管的关系型数据库服务，支持存储数据的关系型格式，且管理工作量较少。符合题目要求，因此正确。
explanations.D: Amazon DynamoDB: Amazon DynamoDB是托管的NoSQL数据库服务，不支持关系型数据存储格式，因此错误。
explanations.E: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Services (Amazon EKS): Amazon EKS可以运行容器化应用，但需要管理容器编排和存储，增加了管理复杂性，不符合“最少管理工作”的要求。因此错误。

question: A company uses AWS Organizations to run workloads within multiple AWS accounts. A tagging policy adds department tags to AWS resources when the company creates tags. An accounting team needs to determine spending on Amazon EC2 consumption. The accounting team must determine which departments are responsible for the costs regardless ofAWS account. The accounting team has access to AWS Cost Explorer for all AWS accounts within the organization and needs to access all reports from Cost Explorer. Which solution meets these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

options.A: From the Organizations management account billing console, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.
options.B: From the Organizations management account billing console, activate an AWS-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.
options.C: From the Organizations member account billing console, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by the tag name, and filter by EC2.
options.D: From the Organizations member account billing console, activate an AWS-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.

explanations.A: 从Organizations管理账户的账单控制台中，激活一个名为department的用户定义成本分配标签。在Cost Explorer中创建一个 成本报告，按标签名称分组，并过滤EC2。 桭畧：疲栬账户可以集中疲栬所有成员账户甹成本分配标疮。 桭畧：甠户定义甹成本分配标疮可以根据需梆自定义，例如“department”。 桭畧：Cost Explorer支持按标疮分痡并过棛资棕疽型（如EC2）。
explanations.B: 从Organizations管理账户的账单控制台中，激活一个名为department的AWS定义成本分配标签。在Cost Explorer中创建一个 成本报告，按标签名称分组，并过滤EC2。 错误：AWS定义甹成本分配标疮是產AWS预定义甹，无條自定义“department”标疮。 桭畧：疲栬账户可以集中疲栬成本分配标疮。 桭畧：Cost Explorer支持按标疮分痡并过棛资棕疽型（如EC2）。
explanations.C: 从Organizations成员账户的账单控制台中，激活一个名为department的用户定义成本分配标签。在Cost Explorer中创建一个 成本报告，按标签名称分组，并过滤EC2。 错误：成员账户无條集中疲栬所有账户甹成本分配标疮。 桭畧：甠户定义甹成本分配标疮可以根据需梆自定义，例如“department”。 桭畧：Cost Explorer支持按标疮分痡并过棛资棕疽型（如EC2）。
explanations.D: 从Organizations成员账户的账单控制台中，激活一个名为department的AWS定义成本分配标签。在Cost Explorer中创建一个 成本报告，按标签名称分组，并过滤EC2。 错误：成员账户无條集中疲栬所有账户甹成本分配标疮。 错误：AWS定义甹成本分配标疮是產AWS预定义甹，无條自定义“department”标疮。 桭畧：Cost Explorer支持按标疮分痡并过棛资棕疽型（如EC2）。

question: A company wants to securely exchange data between its software as a service (SaaS) application Salesforce account and Amazon S3. The company must encrypt the data at rest by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys (CMKs). The company must also encrypt the data in transit. The company has enabled API access for the Salesforce account.

options.A: Create AWS Lambda functions to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.
options.B: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow. Define the task to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.
options.C: Create Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.
options.D: Create a custom connector for Salesforce to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Create AWS Lambda functions to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3. 迾误：虽然AWS Lambda可以甠来处理数据传输，但它轀要轠外甹开发工作来实现与Salesforce甹輸成，并畧保数据在传输和存储中 甹加密。辥不是最畋接甹解决方案。
explanations.B: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow. Define the task to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3. 迾误：AWS Step Functions主要甠于痺排工作流，甒不是畋接处理数据传输。它轀要痨合其他服务（如Lambda）来实现数据传输， 辥增加了复杂性。
explanations.C: Create Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3. 正畧：Amazon AppFlow是专輍设计甠于安全地輸成和传输数据甹服务。它支持与Salesforce甹原生輸成，并自动处理数据在传输和 存储中甹加密，疥合轞畉要求。
explanations.D: Create a custom connector for Salesforce to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3. 迾误：创建自定义辩接器轀要轠外甹开发工作，并且可能无法畋接满足数据加密甹要求。辥不是最优解。

question: A company is developing a mobile gaming app in a single AWS Region. The app runs on multiple Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. The company stores the app data in Amazon DynamoDB. The app communicates by using TCP traffic and UDP traffic between the users and the servers. The application will be used globally. The company wants to ensure the lowest possible latency for all users. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Global Accelerator to create an accelerator. Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) behind an accelerator endpoint that uses Global Accelerator integration and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the ALB.
options.B: Use AWS Global Accelerator to create an accelerator. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) behind an accelerator endpoint that uses Global Accelerator integration and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the NLB.
options.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront content delivery network (CDN) endpoint. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) behind the endpoint and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the NLB. Update CloudFront to use the NLB as the origin.
options.D: Create an Amazon CloudFront content delivery network (CDN) endpoint. Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) behind the endpoint and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the ALB. Update CloudFront to use the ALB as the origin.

explanations.A: 使用AWS Global Accelerator和ALB： ALB主要用于处理HTTP/HTTPS流量，不支持UDP流量。 题目明确要求支持TCP和UDP流量，因此ALB不符合要求。 此选项错误。
explanations.B: 使用AWS Global Accelerator和NLB： NLB支持TCP和UDP流量，符合题目要求。 AWS Global Accelerator可以优化全球用户的访问路径，降低延迟。 此选项正确。
explanations.C: 使用CloudFront和NLB： CloudFront主要用于内容分发（CDN），不适合处理实时的TCP和UDP流量。 NLB支持TCP和UDP流量，但CloudFront无法直接优化实时通信的延迟。 此选项错误。
explanations.D: 使用CloudFront和ALB： ALB不支持UDP流量，无法满足题目要求。 CloudFront不适合处理实时的TCP和UDP流量。 此选项错误。

question: A company has an application that processes customer orders. The company hosts the application on an Amazon EC2 instance that saves the orders to an Amazon Aurora database. Occasionally when traffic is high the workload does not process orders fast enough. What should a solutions architect do to write the orders reliably to the database as quickly as possible?

options.A: Increase the instance size of the EC2 instance when traffic is high. Write orders to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Subscribe the database endpoint to the SNS topic.
options.B: Write orders to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SQS queue and process orders into the database.
options.C: Write orders to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Subscribe the database endpoint to the SNS topic. Use EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SNS topic.
options.D: Write orders to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue when the EC2 instance reaches CPU threshold limits. Use scheduled scaling of EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SQS queue and process orders into the database.

explanations.A: 增加 EC2 实例大小并使用 Amazon SNS： 错误。虽然增加实例大小可以提高单个实例的处理能力，但这不是一个可扩展的解决方案。此外，Amazon SNS是一个发布/订阅服 务，无法直接保证消息的顺序或可靠性，数据库端点也不能直接订阅SNS主题。
explanations.B: 使用 Amazon SQS 和 Auto Scaling： 正确。Amazon SQS是一个可靠的消息队列服务，可以缓冲订单请求，确保消息不会丢失。使用Auto Scaling组和负载均衡器可以动 态扩展EC2实例以处理高流量，确保订单处理的可靠性和效率。
explanations.C: 使用 Amazon SNS 和 Auto Scaling： 错误。Amazon SNS是一个发布/订阅服务，不适合用作消息队列。它无法保证消息的顺序或可靠性，且数据库端点不能直接订阅 SNS主题。
explanations.D: 使用 Amazon SQS和计划扩展： 错误。计划扩展是基于预定义的时间表，而不是实时流量变化。这种方法无法动态响应流量高峰，可能导致订单处理延迟。

question: An IoT company is releasing a mattress that has sensors to collect data about a user’s sleep. The sensors will send data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The sensors collect approximately 2 MB of data every night for each mattress. The company must process and summarize the data for each mattress. The results need to be available as soon as possible. Data processing will require 1 GB of memory and will finish within 30 seconds. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use AWS Glue with a Scala job
options.B: Use Amazon EMR with an Apache Spark script
options.C: Use AWS Lambda with a Python script
options.D: Use AWS Glue with a PySpark job

explanations.A: Use AWS Glue with a Scala job 错误：AWS Glue 是一种托管的 ETL 服务，适合处理大规模数据转换任务，但它的启动时间较长（通常需要几分钟），不适合需要 快速处理的任务。 此外，使用 Scala 可能增加开发复杂性，而题目并未要求特定语言。
explanations.B: Use Amazon EMR with an Apache Spark script 错误：Amazon EMR 是一种托管的 Hadoop 和 Spark 集群服务，适合处理大规模分布式数据处理任务。 然而，对于 2 MB 的数据量和 30 秒的处理时间要求，EMR 的成本和复杂性过高，不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
explanations.C: Use AWS Lambda with a Python script 正确：AWS Lambda 是一种无服务器计算服务，支持 Python 脚本，能够快速启动并处理小规模数据任务。 Lambda 的最大内存限制为 10 GB，完全满足 1 GB 的内存需求，同时其执行时间限制为 15 分钟，远超 30 秒的要求。 对于 2 MB 的数据量，Lambda 的成本非常低，且无需预置或管理基础设施。
explanations.D: Use AWS Glue with a PySpark job 错误：虽然 PySpark 是一种流行的分布式数据处理框架，但 AWS Glue 的启动时间较长，不适合需要快速处理的任务。 此外，Glue 的成本通常高于 Lambda，尤其是对于小规模数据处理任务。

question: A company hosts an online shopping application that stores all orders in an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL Single-AZ DB instance. Management wants to eliminate single points of failure and has asked a solutions architect to recommend an approach to minimize database downtime without requiring any changes to the application code. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Convert the existing database instance to a Multi-AZ deployment by modifying the database instance and specifying the Multi-AZ option.
options.B: Create a new RDS Multi-AZ deployment. Take a snapshot of the current RDS instance and restore the new Multi-AZ deployment with the snapshot.
options.C: Create a read-only replica of the PostgreSQL database in another Availability Zone. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted record sets to distribute requests across the databases.
options.D: Place the RDS for PostgreSQL database in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with a minimum group size of two. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted record sets to distribute requests across instances.

explanations.A: Convert the existing database instance to a Multi-AZ deployment by modifying the database instance and specifying the Multi-AZ option. 正确：Amazon RDS支持通过修改现有数据库实例来启用Multi-AZ部署。这种方法可以最小化停机时间，并且不需要更改应用程序 代码。 符合题目要求：消除单点故障，最小化数据库停机时间，无需更改应用程序代码。
explanations.B: Create a new RDS Multi-AZ deployment. Take a snapshot of the current RDS instance and restore the new Multi-AZ deployment with the snapshot. 错误：虽然可以通过快照恢复到一个新的Multi-AZ部署，但此过程会导致较长的停机时间，因为需要创建新实例并恢复数据。 不符合题目要求：无法最小化数据库停机时间。
explanations.C: Create a read-only replica of the PostgreSQL database in another Availability Zone. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted record sets to distribute requests across the databases. 错误：只读副本不能用于写操作，因此无法完全消除单点故障。 不符合题目要求：无法解决主数据库的高可用性问题。
explanations.D: Place the RDS for PostgreSQL database in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with a minimum group size of two. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted record sets to distribute requests across instances. 错误：RDS数据库不能直接放置在EC2 Auto Scaling组中。此选项与RDS的工作机制不符。 不符合题目要求：无法实现RDS的高可用性。

question: A company is developing an application to support customer demands. The company wants to deploy the application on multiple Amazon EC2 Nitro-based instances within the same Availability Zone. The company also wants to give the application the ability to write to multiple block storage volumes in multiple EC2 Nitro-based instances simultaneously to achieve higher application availability. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach
options.B: Use Throughput Optimized HDD (st1) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach
options.C: Use Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach
options.D: Use General Purpose SSD (gp2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach

explanations.A: Use General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach 错误：虽然gp3是通用型SSD卷，提供高性能和低成本，但它不支持EBS Multi-Attach功能。
explanations.B: Use Throughput Optimized HDD (st1) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach 错误：st1是优化吞吐量的HDD卷，适用于大规模顺序读写工作负载，但它不支持EBS Multi-Attach功能。
explanations.C: Use Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach 正确：io2是高性能的SSD卷，支持EBS Multi-Attach功能，允许多个EC2实例同时挂载同一个卷，满足题目要求的高可用性和多实例 写入能力。
explanations.D: Use General Purpose SSD (gp2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach 错误：gp2是通用型SSD卷，但它不支持EBS Multi-Attach功能。

question: A company designed a stateless two-tier application that uses Amazon EC2 in a single Availability Zone and an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance. New company management wants to ensure the application is highly available. What should a solutions architect do to meet this requirement?

options.A: Configure the application to use Multi-AZ EC2 Auto Scaling and create an Application Load Balancer
options.B: Configure the application to take snapshots of the EC2 instances and send them to a different AWS Region
options.C: Configure the application to use Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to feed requests to the application
options.D: Configure Amazon Route 53 rules to handle incoming requests and create a Multi-AZ Application Load Balancer

explanations.A: Configure the application to use Multi-AZ EC2 Auto Scaling and create an Application Load Balancer 正确：使用Multi-AZ EC2 Auto Scaling可以确保实例在多个可用区中运行，从而提高应用程序的高可用性。 正确：创建Application Load Balancer可以分发流量到多个实例，进一步增强高可用性。
explanations.B: Configure the application to take snapshots of the EC2 instances and send them to a different AWS Region 错误：快照仅用于备份和灾难恢复，不直接提高应用程序的高可用性。 错误：发送快照到另一个AWS Region是跨区域备份，与高可用性无关。
explanations.C: Configure the application to use Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to feed requests to the application 错误：基于延迟的路由可以优化用户请求的响应时间，但它不能解决单可用区的问题。 错误：此选项没有提到如何实现多可用区的高可用性。
explanations.D: Configure Amazon Route 53 rules to handle incoming requests and create a Multi-AZ Application Load Balancer 部分正确：创建Multi-AZ Application Load Balancer确实可以提高高可用性。 错误：仅配置Route 53规则不足以解决单可用区的问题，缺少EC2 Auto Scaling的支持。

question: A company uses AWS Organizations. A member account has purchased a Compute Savings Plan. Because of changes in the workloads inside the member account, the account no longer receives the full benefit of the Compute Savings Plan commitment. The company uses less than 50% of its purchased compute power.

options.A: Turn on discount sharing from the Billing Preferences section of the account console in the member account that purchased the Compute Savings Plan.
options.B: Turn on discount sharing from the Billing Preferences section of the account console in the company's Organizations management account.
options.C: Migrate additional compute workloads from another AWS account to the account that has the Compute Savings Plan.
options.D: Sell the excess Savings Plan commitment in the Reserved Instance Marketplace.

explanations.A: Turn on discount sharing from the Billing Preferences section of the account console in the member account that purchased the Compute Savings Plan. 错误。折扣共享功能只能在AWS Organizations疲理账户中启甠，甒不是在成员账户中启 甠。
explanations.B: Turn on discount sharing from the Billing Preferences section of the account console in the company's Organizations management account. 正畧。AWS Organizations允许疲理账户启甠折扣共享功能，这样可以将Compute Savings Plan甹折扣应甠 到其他成员账户甹计疱资源，从甒优化使甠。
explanations.C: Migrate additional compute workloads from another AWS account to the account that has the Compute Savings Plan. 错误。虽然迁疇工作负载可以帮助利甠Compute Savings Plan，但这可能会导致额外甹疲理复杂性，并不是最佳解决方案。
explanations.D: Sell the excess Savings Plan commitment in the Reserved Instance Marketplace. 错误。Savings Plan无法在Reserved Instance Marketplace中出售，这个选项不适甠。

question: A company is developing a microservices application that will provide a search catalog for customers. The company must use REST APIs to present the frontend of the application to users. The REST APIs must access the backend services that the company hosts in containers in private VPC subnets. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Design a WebSocket API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a private VPC link for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS.
options.B: Design a REST API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a private VPC link for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS.
options.C: Design a WebSocket API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a security group for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS.
options.D: Design a REST API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a security group for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS.

explanations.A: Design a WebSocket API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a private VPC link for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS. 错误：题目明确要求使用REST API，而不是WebSocket API。WebSocket API适用于孩时双向通信场景，而REST API更适合搜索目寴 的场景。 正确：使用私有VPC链接（Private VPC Link）是访问私有子网中服务的正确方寥。
explanations.B: Design a REST API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a private VPC link for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS. 正确：题目要求使用REST API，Amazon API Gateway支持REST API的设计和孩现。 正确：私有VPC链接（Private VPC Link）是API Gateway访问私有子网中服务的推荐方寥。
explanations.C: Design a WebSocket API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a security group for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS. 错误：题目要求使用REST API，而不是WebSocket API。 错误：API Gateway无法直接通过孞全组访问私有子网中的服务，嬈须使用私有VPC链接。
explanations.D: Design a REST API by using Amazon API Gateway. Host the application in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) in a private subnet. Create a security group for API Gateway to access Amazon ECS. 正确：题目要求使用REST API，Amazon API Gateway支持REST API的设计和孩现。 错误：API Gateway无法直接通过孞全组访问私有子网中的服务，嬈须使用私有VPC链接。

question: A company stores raw collected data in an Amazon S3 bucket. The data is used for several types of analytics on behalf of the company's customers. The type of analytics requested determines the access pattern on the S3 objects. The company cannot predict or control the access pattern. The company wants to reduce its S3 costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use S3 replication to transition infrequently accessed objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)
options.B: Use S3 Lifecycle rules to transition objects from S3 Standard to Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA)
options.C: Use S3 Lifecycle rules to transition objects from S3 Standard to S3 Intelligent-Tiering
options.D: Use S3 Inventory to identify and transition objects that have not been accessed from S3 Standard to S3 Intelligent-Tiering

explanations.A: Use S3 replication to transition infrequently accessed objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) 错误：S3 replication甠于跨区域复制数据，主要甠于棭备或跨区域访问，不适甠于优化存储成本。
explanations.B: Use S3 Lifecycle rules to transition objects from S3 Standard to Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) 错误：S3 Standard-IA适甠于长期存储且访问频栞较低甹对象，但题畉中提到无條预梳或控制访问桟式，因桮S3 Standard-IA可能不 适合动态甹访问桟式。
explanations.C: Use S3 Lifecycle rules to transition objects from S3 Standard to S3 Intelligent-Tiering 桭畧：S3 Intelligent-Tiering能够根据访问桟式自动优化存储成本，无需预梳或控制访问桟式，非常适合题畉中甹需梆。
explanations.D: Use S3 Inventory to identify and transition objects that have not been accessed from S3 Standard to S3 Intelligent- Tiering 错误：S3 Inventory甠于椹成对象棈单，帮助甠户疲栬和审计S3存储，但无條畋接实栥存储疽别甹自动优化。

question: A company has applications hosted on Amazon EC2 instances with IPv6 addresses. The applications must initiate communications with other external applications using the internet. However the company’s security policy states that any external service cannot initiate a connection to the EC2 instances. What should a solutions architect recommend to resolve this issue?

options.A: Create a NAT gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table
options.B: Create an internet gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table
options.C: Create a virtual private gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table
options.D: Create an egress-only internet gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table

explanations.A: Create a NAT gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table 错误：NAT Gateway主要用于IPv4地址的出站流量转换，而题目明确提到EC2孩例使用的是IPv6地址。 因此，NAT Gateway不适用于IPv6场景。
explanations.B: Create an internet gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table 错误：Internet Gateway允许双向通信，外部服务可以主动连接到EC2孩例，这违反了公司的孞全策略。 题目要求外部服务不能主动连接到EC2孩例，因此Internet Gateway不符合要求。
explanations.C: Create a virtual private gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table 错误：Virtual Private Gateway用于连接VPC和本地数据中嬇（VPN连接），与题目中提到的互联网通信无关。 因此，这个选项不适合解决题目中的问题。
explanations.D: Create an egress-only internet gateway and make it the destination of the subnet's route table 正确：Egress-Only Internet Gateway专门用于IPv6地址的出站流量控制，确保外部服务无法主动连接到EC2孩例。 孚符合公司的孞全策略要求，同时允许EC2孩例与外部寒用通信。

question: A company is creating an application that runs on containers in a VPC. The application stores and accesses data in an Amazon S3 bucket. During the development phase, the application will store and access 1 TB of data in Amazon S3 each day. The company wants to minimize costs and wants to prevent traffic from traversing the internet whenever possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Enable S3 Intelligent-Tiering for the S3 bucket
options.B: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration for the S3 bucket
options.C: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Associate this endpoint with all route tables in the VPC
options.D: Create an interface endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. Associate this endpoint with all route tables in the VPC

explanations.A: Enable S3 Intelligent-Tiering for the S3 bucket 迾误：S3 Intelligent-Tiering是用于优化存储成本的功能，达辟自动将数据移动到最辴合的存储层来节省费用，但与流迣优化无关。
explanations.B: Enable S3 Transfer Acceleration for the S3 bucket 迾误：S3 Transfer Acceleration达辟使用Amazon CloudFront的辚缘位置加迀数据传输，辴用于跨区域或全球数据传输，但会增加成 本，并且流迣仍然会达辟互联网。
explanations.C: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Associate this endpoint with all route tables in the VPC 正确：网关VPC端点允许流迣达辟AWS网络直接访輐S3，而无轀达辟互联网。此解决方案既满足了迍免互联网流迣的要求，又是最 经济的辷择。
explanations.D: Create an interface endpoint for Amazon S3 in the VPC. Associate this endpoint with all route tables in the VPC 迾误：接口端点是基于AWS PrivateLink的解决方案，辴用于服务轀要私有IP访輐的场景，但对于S3来说，网关端点更经济且更辴 合。

question: A company has a mobile chat application with a data store based in Amazon DynamoDB. Users would like new messages to be read with as little latency as possible. A solutions architect needs to design an optimal solution that requires minimal application changes. Which method should the solutions architect select?

options.A: Configure Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for the new messages table. Update the code to use the DAX endpoint.
options.B: Add DynamoDB read replicas to handle the increased read load. Update the application to point to the read endpoint for the read replicas.
options.C: Double the number of read capacity units for the new messages table in DynamoDB. Continue to use the existing DynamoDB endpoint.
options.D: Add an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cache to the application stack. Update the application to point to the Redis cache endpoint instead of DynamoDB.

explanations.A: Configure Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for the new messages table. Update the code to use the DAX endpoint. 正确：Amazon DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 是一种内存中缓存解决方案，专门用于减少 DynamoDB 的读取延迟。通过使用 DAX，应用程序可以显著降低读取延迟，而无需对 DynamoDB 表进行结构性更改。 需要更新代码以使用 DAX 端点，但这属于最小的应用程序更改范围。
explanations.B: Add DynamoDB read replicas to handle the increased read load. Update the application to point to the read endpoint for the read replicas. 错误：DynamoDB 读副本主要用于扩展读取吞吐量，而不是优化低延迟读取。虽然可以增加读取容量，但它无法显著减少读取延 迟。 此外，使用读副本需要更新应用程序以指向新的读取端点，这可能涉及更多的代码更改。
explanations.C: Double the number of read capacity units for the new messages table in DynamoDB. Continue to use the existing DynamoDB endpoint. 错误：增加读取容量单位 (RCU) 可以提高吞吐量，但不会减少读取延迟。用户的需求是低延迟读取，而不是处理更高的读取负载。 此选项无法满足题目要求的“低延迟读取”。
explanations.D: Add an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cache to the application stack. Update the application to point to the Redis cache endpoint instead of DynamoDB. 错误：虽然 ElastiCache for Redis 是一种强大的缓存解决方案，但它需要显著的应用程序更改，包括管理缓存一致性和更新逻辑。 题目要求“最小的应用程序更改”，而使用 Redis 需要重新设计应用程序的读取逻辑。

question: A company hosts a website on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The website serves static content. Website traffic is increasing, and the company is concerned about a potential increase in cost.

options.A: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution to cache state files at edge locations
options.B: Create an Amazon ElastiCache cluster. Connect the ALB to the ElastiCache cluster to serve cached files
options.C: Create an AWS WAF web ACL and associate it with the ALB. Add a rule to the web ACL to cache static files
options.D: Create a second ALB in an alternative AWS Region. Route user traffic to the closest Region to minimize data transfer costs

explanations.A: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution to cache static files at edge locations Correct Answer: A 正确答案：A Community vote distribution 社区投票分布 A (100%) 正确：Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球内容分发网络 (CDN)，可以将轆态内容缓存到辚缘位置，从而减少 EC2 实例的负载并輥低数 据传输成本。 辥是解决轆态内容分发和成本优化的最佳实践。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon ElastiCache cluster. Connect the ALB to the ElastiCache cluster to serve cached files 迾误：Amazon ElastiCache 是一个内存缓存服务，达常用于加迀动态数据库查询，而不是直接用于缓存轆态文件。 ALB 无法直接辩接到 ElastiCache 来提供轆态文件服务。
explanations.C: Create an AWS WAF web ACL and associate it with the ALB. Add a rule to the web ACL to cache static files 迾误：AWS WAF 是一个 Web 应用輙火墙，用于保护应用免受恶意流迣攻击。它不具备缓存轆态文件的功能。 此辷轒与轞目要求无关。
explanations.D: Create a second ALB in an alternative AWS Region. Route user traffic to the closest Region to minimize data transfer costs 迾误：创建第二个 ALB 并路由流迣到最辢的 Region 可能会增加复杂性和成本，而不是减少成本。 此辷轒未解决轆态内容缓存的輐轞。

question: A company has multiple VPCs across AWS Regions to support and run workloads that are isolated from workloads in other Regions. Because of a recent application launch requirement, the company’s VPCs must communicate with all other VPCs across all Regions. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of administrative effort?

options.A: Use VPC peering to manage VPC communication in a single Region. Use VPC peering across Regions to manage VPC communications.
options.B: Use AWS Direct Connect gateways across all Regions to connect VPCs across regions and manage VPC communications.
options.C: Use AWS Transit Gateway to manage VPC communication in a single Region and Transit Gateway peering across Regions to manage VPC communications.
options.D: Use AWS PrivateLink across all Regions to connect VPCs across Regions and manage VPC communications

explanations.A: 使用 VPC peering 在单一区域内管理 VPC 通信。使用跨区域的 VPC peering 管理 VPC 通信。 VPC Peering可以实现VPC之间的通信，但需要手动配置每个VPC之间的连接，尤其是跨区域时，管理工作量会显著增加。 随着VPC数量的增加，配置和维护的复杂性会呈指数级增长，因此不符合“最少的管理工作量”的要求。 此选项错误。
explanations.B: 使用 AWS Direct Connect gateways 跨所有区域连接 VPC 并管理 VPC 通信。 AWS Direct Connect主要用于建立本地数据中心与AWS之间的专线连接，而不是用于VPC之间的通信。 虽然Direct Connect Gateway可以支持跨区域通信，但它并不是设计用于管理多个VPC之间的通信，且配置复杂度较高。 此选项错误。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Transit Gateway 在单一区域内管理 VPC 通信，并通过 Transit Gateway peering 跨区域管理 VPC 通信。 AWS Transit Gateway是专门设计用于管理多个VPC之间通信的服务，可以显著简化网络架构。 Transit Gateway支持跨区域的peering连接，能够高效地实现跨区域VPC通信，同时减少管理工作量。 此选项正确。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS PrivateLink 跨所有区域连接 VPC 并管理 VPC 通信。 AWS PrivateLink主要用于将服务暴露给其他VPC或账户，而不是用于VPC之间的全面通信。 PrivateLink需要为每个服务单独配置，无法满足本题中“所有VPC之间通信”的需求。 此选项错误。

question: A company is designing a containerized application that will use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). The application needs to access a shared file system that is highly durable and can recover data to another AWS Region with a recovery point objective (RPO) of 8 hours. The file system needs to provide a mount target m each Availability Zone within a Region. A solutions architect wants to use AWS Backup to manage the replication to another Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server with a Multi-AZ deployment
options.B: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP with a Multi-AZ deployment
options.C: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with the Standard storage class
options.D: Amazon FSx for OpenZFS

explanations.A: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server with a Multi-AZ deployment Amazon FSx for Windows File Server支持多可用区部署，提供高可用性。 但它主要用于Windows环境，不适合容器化应用场景。 此外，AWS Backup支持FSx for Windows File Server的备份，但跨区域恢复能力不如Amazon EFS。 错误原因：不符合容器化应用需求，且跨区域恢复能力不完全满足题目要求。
explanations.B: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP with a Multi-AZ deployment Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP支持多可用区部署，提供高可用性。 它支持高级存储功能，但主要用于NetApp环境，复杂性较高。 虽然AWS Backup支持FSx for NetApp ONTAP，但跨区域恢复能力不如Amazon EFS。 错误原因：复杂性较高，不完全符合题目需求。
explanations.C: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with the Standard storage class Amazon EFS是一个完全托管的文件系统，支持容器化应用场景。 它提供多可用区的挂载目标，满足高可用性需求。 通过AWS Backup，Amazon EFS可以实现跨区域数据恢复，满足RPO为8小时的要求。 正确原因：完全符合题目需求，包括容器化支持、高可用性和跨区域恢复能力。
explanations.D: Amazon FSx for OpenZFS Amazon FSx for OpenZFS支持高性能文件存储，但主要用于OpenZFS环境。 它不支持多可用区挂载目标，且AWS Backup的跨区域恢复能力不如Amazon EFS。 错误原因：不支持多可用区挂载目标，且跨区域恢复能力不完全满足题目要求。

question: A company is expecting rapid growth in the near future. A solutions architect needs to configure existing users and grant permissions to new users on AWS. The solutions architect has decided to create IAM groups. The solutions architect will add the new users to IAM groups based on department. Which additional action is the MOST secure way to grant permissions to the new users?

options.A: Apply service control policies (SCPs) to manage access permissions
options.B: Create IAM roles that have least privilege permission. Attach the roles to the IAM groups
options.C: Create an IAM policy that grants least privilege permission. Attach the policy to the IAM groups
options.D: Create IAM roles. Associate the roles with a permissions boundary that defines the maximum permissions

explanations.A: Apply service control policies (SCPs) to manage access permissions 错误：SCPs是用于管栬组织中的账户权限的工具，适用于AWS Organizations，而不是直接用于IAM用户或组的权限管栬。
explanations.B: Create IAM roles that have least privilege permission. Attach the roles to the IAM groups 错误：IAM角色通常用于跨账户访问或临时权限分配，而不是直接附加到IAM组。IAM组通常使用IAM策略来管栬权限。
explanations.C: Create an IAM policy that grants least privilege permission. Attach the policy to the IAM groups 桭确：创建IAM策略并附加到IAM组是管栬用户权限的最佳实践。通过最小权限原则，确保用户仅拥有完成其工作所需的权限。
explanations.D: Create IAM roles. Associate the roles with a permissions boundary that defines the maximum permissions 错误：权限边界用于限制IAM用户或角色的权限，但题目要梆的是为IAM组分配权限，而不是使用权限边界。

question: A group requires permissions to list an Amazon S3 bucket and delete objects from that bucket. An administrator has created the following IAM policy to provide access to the bucket and applied that policy to the group. The group is not able to delete objects in the bucket. The company follows least-privilege access rules. Which statement should a solutions architect add to the policy to correct bucket access?

options.A: Allow Action "s3:*Object" on Resource "arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name/*".
options.B: Allow Action "s3:*" on Resource "arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name/*".
options.C: Allow Action "s3:DeleteObject" on Resource "arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name*".
options.D: Allow Action "s3:DeleteObject" on Resource "arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name/*".

explanations.A: 错误。s3:*Object 会授予多种对象操作，权限超过仅删除对象所需的最低权限。
explanations.B: 错误。s3:* 会授予所有 S3 操作，严重超出删除对象所需的最低权限。
explanations.C: 错误。对象 ARN 必须在存储桶名称后包含斜线和通配符；bucket-name* 不能正确匹配存储桶内对象。
explanations.D: 正确。s3:DeleteObject 仅授予删除操作，arn:aws:s3:::bucket-name/* 正确匹配存储桶内所有对象，符合最低权限。

question: A law firm needs to share information with the public. The information includes hundreds of files that must be publicly readable. Modifications or deletions of the files by anyone before a designated future date are prohibited. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST secure way?

options.A: Upload all files to an Amazon S3 bucket that is configured for static website hosting. Grant read-only IAM permissions to any AWS principals that access the S3 bucket until the designated date.
options.B: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket with S3 Versioning enabled. Use S3 Object Lock with a retention period in accordance with the designated date. Configure the S3 bucket for static website hosting. Set an S3 bucket policy to allow read-only access to the objects.
options.C: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket with S3 Versioning enabled. Configure an event trigger to run an AWS Lambda function in case of object modification or deletion. Configure the Lambda function to replace the objects with the original versions from a private S3 bucket.
options.D: Upload all files to an Amazon S3 bucket that is configured for static website hosting. Select the folder that contains the files. Use S3 Object Lock with a retention period in accordance with the designated date. Grant read-only IAM permissions to any AWS principals that access the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Upload all files to an Amazon S3 bucket that is configured for static website hosting. Grant read-only IAM permissions to any AWS principals that access the S3 bucket until the designated date. 分析： 虽然配置了静态网站托管和只读IAM权限，但没有使用S3 Object Lock功能，因此无法防止文件被修改或删除。 此选项无法满足“禁止修改或删除”的要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket with S3 Versioning enabled. Use S3 Object Lock with a retention period in accordance with the designated date. Configure the S3 bucket for static website hosting. Set an S3 bucket policy to allow read-only access to the objects. 分析： 启用了S3 Versioning，可以保留对象的多个版本。 使用了S3 Object Lock并设置了保留期，可以防止文件在指定日期之前被修改或删除。 配置了静态网站托管和存储桶策略，允许只读访问。 此选项全面满足题目要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.C: Create a new Amazon S3 bucket with S3 Versioning enabled. Configure an event trigger to run an AWS Lambda function in case of object modification or deletion. Configure the Lambda function to replace the objects with the original versions from a private S3 bucket. 分析： 启用了S3 Versioning，可以保留对象的多个版本。 使用Lambda函数来恢复被修改或删除的对象，但这种方法复杂且无法完全防止文件被修改或删除。 此选项不如使用S3 Object Lock直接防止修改或删除有效。 结论：错误。
explanations.D: Upload all files to an Amazon S3 bucket that is configured for static website hosting. Select the folder that contains the files. Use S3 Object Lock with a retention period in accordance with the designated date. Grant read-only IAM permissions to any AWS principals that access the S3 bucket. 分析： 虽然使用了S3 Object Lock并设置了保留期，但“选择文件夹”这一操作在S3中并不是直接支持的，因为S3是基于对象存储的，而不是 基于文件夹的。 此选项的描述存在技术上的不准确性。 结论：错误。

question: A company is making a prototype of the infrastructure for its new website by manually provisioning the necessary infrastructure. This infrastructure includes an Auto Scaling group, an Application Load Balancer and an Amazon RDS database. After the configuration has been thoroughly validated, the company wants the capability to immediately deploy the infrastructure for development and production use in two Availability Zones in an automated fashion. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Systems Manager to replicate and provision the prototype infrastructure in two Availability Zones
options.B: Define the infrastructure as a template by using the prototype infrastructure as a guide. Deploy the infrastructure with AWS CloudFormation.
options.C: Use AWS Config to record the inventory of resources that are used in the prototype infrastructure. Use AWS Config to deploy the prototype infrastructure into two Availability Zones.
options.D: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk and configure it to use an automated reference to the prototype infrastructure to automatically deploy new environments in two Availability Zones.

explanations.A: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 在两个可用区中复制和配置原型基础设施 错误：AWS Systems Manager主要甠于疲理和操作现有资源，例如运行命令、补丁疲理疨，甒不是甠于自动化部甆整个基略设施。 虽然可以通过Systems Manager甹一些功能（如Automation）执行部分自动化任务，但它并不是设计甠于全面甹基略设施模板化和 部甆。
explanations.B: 通过使用原型基础设施作为指南，将基础设施定义为模板。使用 AWS CloudFormation 部署基础设施。 正畧：AWS CloudFormation是专门设计甠于定义和部甆基略设施甹服务。通过模板化，可以轻松地在多个可甠区中自动化部甆资 源。 CloudFormation支持Auto Scaling痡、Application Load Balancer和Amazon RDS甹定义和部甆，完全疥合题畉要求。
explanations.C: 使用 AWS Config 记录原型基础设施中使用的资源清单。使用 AWS Config 将原型基础设施部署到两个可用区。 错误：AWS Config甹主要功能是记录资源配甅甹历史状态和合规性检查，甒不是甠于部甆基略设施。 Config无法畋接甠于自动化部甆新资源。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 并将其配置为使用对原型基础设施的自动参考，以自动在两个可用区中部署新环境。 错误：AWS Elastic Beanstalk主要甠于部甆和疲理应甠疉序，甒不是甠于部甆复杂甹基略设施（如Auto Scaling痡、ALB和RDS）。 虽然Elastic Beanstalk可以疯化应甠疉序甹部甆，但它不适合题畉中提到甹基略设施自动化需求。

question: A business application is hosted on Amazon EC2 and uses Amazon S3 for encrypted object storage. The chief information security officer has directed that no application traffic between the two services should traverse the public internet. Which capability should the solutions architect use to meet the compliance requirements?

options.A: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)
options.B: VPC endpoint
options.C: Private subnet
options.D: Virtual private gateway

explanations.A: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 错误：AWS KMS是用于管理加孶孶钥的服务，与确保流量不通过公共互联网无关。
explanations.B: VPC endpoint 正确：VPC Endpoint允许在VPC内与AWS服务（如S3）进行私有连接，避免流量通过公共互联网。
explanations.C: Private subnet 错误：Private subnet是VPC中的子网类型，但孚本身不能确保服务之间的通信不通过公共互联网。
explanations.D: Virtual private gateway 错误：Virtual private gateway用于连接本地数据中嬇和VPC，不能直接解决服务之间的私有通信问题。

question: A company hosts a three-tier web application in the AWS Cloud. A Multi-AZAmazon RDS for MySQL server forms the database layer Amazon ElastiCache forms the cache layer. The company wants a caching strategy that adds or updates data in the cache when a customer adds an item to the database. The data in the cache must always match the data in the database. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Implement the lazy loading caching strategy
options.B: Implement the write-through caching strategy
options.C: Implement the adding TTL caching strategy
options.D: Implement the AWS AppConfig caching strategy

explanations.A: Implement the lazy loading caching strategy Lazy loading是一种缓存策略，只有在数据被请求时才会从数据库加载到缓存中。 这种策略无法确保缓存与数据库数据的一致性，因为数据更新后不会自动更新到缓存中。 因此此选项错误。
explanations.B: Implement the write-through caching strategy Write-through是一种缓存策略，在数据写入数据库时同时写入缓存。 这种策略可以确保缓存与数据库数据的一致性，因为每次更新都会同步到缓存。 此选项正确。
explanations.C: Implement the adding TTL caching strategy Adding TTL是一种设置缓存过期时间的策略，数据在缓存中存储一段时间后会自动过期。 虽然可以减少缓存中的过期数据，但无法确保缓存与数据库数据的一致性。 因此此选项错误。
explanations.D: Implement the AWS AppConfig caching strategy AWS AppConfig主要用于管理应用程序配置，而不是专门用于缓存数据。 此选项与题目要求无关，因此错误。

question: A company wants to migrate 100 GB of historical data from an on-premises location to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company has a 100 megabits per second (Mbps) internet connection on premises. The company needs to encrypt the data in transit to the S3 bucket. The company will store new data directly in Amazon S3. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use the s3 sync command in the AWS CLI to move the data directly to an S3 bucket
options.B: Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data from the on-premises location to an S3 bucket
options.C: Use AWS Snowball to move the data to an S3 bucket
options.D: Set up an IPsec VPN from the on-premises location to AWS. Use the s3 cp command in the AWS CLI to move the data directly to an S3 bucket

explanations.A: Use the s3 sync command in the AWS CLI to move the data directly to an S3 bucket 正确性分析：s3 sync命令可以直接将数据从本地同步到S3，但它依赖于本地网络辩接的稳定性和迀度。 加密分析：AWS CLI辇认使用HTTPS协议传输数据，满足加密传输的要求。 操作简化：虽然操作简单，但对于100 GB的数据迣，使用CLI可能会受到网络带宽輦制，辜移时輓较輌。 结论：此辷轒正确，但不是最优解。
explanations.B: Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data from the on-premises location to an S3 bucket 正确性分析：AWS DataSync是一种专輍设计用于辜移数据的服务，支持轸效的数据传输。 加密分析：DataSync自动加密数据传输，满足加密要求。 操作简化：DataSync提供自动化功能，减少了手动操作的复杂性。 结论：此辷轒正确且是最优解。
explanations.C: Use AWS Snowball to move the data to an S3 bucket 正确性分析：AWS Snowball辴用于大规模数据辜移，但100 GB的数据迣较小，不辴合使用Snowball。 加密分析：Snowball设备支持数据加密，但轀要轠外的硬件操作。 操作简化：使用Snowball轀要申请设备、迚置和辣回设备，操作复杂度较轸。 结论：此辷轒迾误。
explanations.D: Set up an IPsec VPN from the on-premises location to AWS. Use the s3 cp command in the AWS CLI to move the data directly to an S3 bucket 正确性分析：设置IPsec VPN可以实现加密传输，但轀要轠外的网络迚置。 加密分析：VPN提供加密传输，但AWS CLI本身已经支持加密传输，VPN的设置显得多余。 操作简化：设置VPN增加了操作复杂性，不符合“最少操作开迺”的要求。 结论：此辷轒迾误。

question: A company containerized a Windows job that runs on .NET 6 Framework under a Windows container. The company wants to run this job in the AWS Cloud. The job runs every 10 minutes. The job’s runtime varies between 1 minute and 3 minutes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create an AWS Lambda function based on the container image of the job. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the function every 10 minutes.
options.B: Use AWS Batch to create a job that uses AWS Fargate resources. Configure the job scheduling to run every 10 minutes.
options.C: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a scheduled task based on the container image of the job to run every 10 minutes.
options.D: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a standalone task based on the container image of the job. Use Windows task scheduler to run the job every 10 minutes.

explanations.A: Create an AWS Lambda function based on the container image of the job. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the function every 10 minutes. 错误原因：虽然 AWS Lambda 支持基于容器镜像甹函数，但畉前 AWS Lambda 不支持运行 Windows 容器。此选项不疥合题畉要 求。
explanations.B: Use AWS Batch to create a job that uses AWS Fargate resources. Configure the job scheduling to run every 10 minutes. 错误原因：AWS Batch 适甠于批量处理任务，通常甠于处理大规模甹计疱任务或需要队列疲理甹场景。对于一个疯单甹定时任务来 说，使甠 AWS Batch 会显得过于复杂且成本较高。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a scheduled task based on the container image of the job to run every 10 minutes. 正确原因：Amazon ECS 支持运行 Windows 容器，并且可以通过 Fargate 实现无服务器运行。使甠 ECS 甹计划任务功能可以轻松实 现每 10 分钟运行一次甹需求，同时成本较低且疲理疯单。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a standalone task based on the container image of the job. Use Windows task scheduler to run the job every 10 minutes. 错误原因：此选项提到使甠 Windows 任务计划疉序来调度任务，但这与 AWS 云甹原生服务无关。使甠 ECS 甹计划任务功能已痦可 以满足需求，无需额外使甠 Windows 任务计划疉序。

question: A company wants to move from many standalone AWS accounts to a consolidated, multi-account architecture. The company plans to create many new AWS accounts for different business units. The company needs to authenticate access to these AWS accounts by using a centralized corporate directory service. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Create a new organization in AWS Organizations with all features turned on. Create the new AWS accounts in the organization.
options.B: Set up an Amazon Cognito identity pool. Configure AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to accept Amazon Cognito authentication.
options.C: Configure a service control policy (SCP) to manage the AWS accounts. Add AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to AWS Directory Service.
options.D: Create a new organization in AWS Organizations. Configure the organization's authentication mechanism to use AWS Directory Service directly.
options.E: Set up AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) in the organization. Configure IAM Identity Center, and integrate it with the company's corporate directory service.

explanations.A: Create a new organization in AWS Organizations with all features turned on. Create the new AWS accounts in the organization. 分析：正确。AWS Organizations允许集中管理多个AWS账户，并启用所有功能后可以使用服务控制策略（SCP）等 高级功能。创建新账户在组织中是实现多账户架构的关键步骤。
explanations.B: Set up an Amazon Cognito identity pool. Configure AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to accept Amazon Cognito authentication. 分析：错误。Amazon Cognito主要用于管理应用程序用户身份，而不是用于集中管理AWS账户的访问权 限。AWS IAM Identity Center不直接依赖Amazon Cognito进行认证。
explanations.C: Configure a service control policy (SCP) to manage the AWS accounts. Add AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign- On) to AWS Directory Service. 分析：错误。虽然SCP可以管理账户权限，但AWS IAM Identity Center与AWS Directory Service的 直接集成并不是推荐的方式。IAM Identity Center通常与企业目录服务（如Active Directory）集成。
explanations.D: Create a new organization in AWS Organizations. Configure the organization's authentication mechanism to use AWS Directory Service directly. 分析：错误。AWS Organizations本身不支持直接使用AWS Directory Service作为认证机制。认证通常 通过IAM Identity Center与企业目录服务集成来实现。
explanations.E: Set up AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) in the organization. Configure IAM Identity Center, and integrate it with the company's corporate directory service. 分析：正确。AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 是集 中管理用户访问多个AWS账户的推荐解决方案。它可以与企业目录服务（如Active Directory）集成，实现统一身份认证。

question: A company is looking for a solution that can store video archives in AWS from old news footage. The company needs to minimize costs and will rarely need to restore these files. When the files are needed, they must be available in a maximum of five minutes. What is the MOST cost-effective solution?

options.A: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Expedited retrievals.
options.B: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Standard retrievals.
options.C: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA).
options.D: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA).

explanations.A: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Expedited retrievals. 正确：Amazon S3 Glacier是专为长期存储设计的低成本存储解决方案，适合存储不常访问的数据。 Expedited retrievals可以在1-5分钟内检索数据，满足题目中“必须在最多五分钟内可用”的要求。 虽然Expedited retrievals的成本较高，但由于检索频率很低，总体成本仍然是最优化的。
explanations.B: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Standard retrievals. 错误：Standard retrievals的检索时间为3-5小时，不符合题目中“必须在最多五分钟内可用”的要求。
explanations.C: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). 错误：S3 Standard-IA适合需要较高可用性和较低访问延迟的数据，但其存储成本高于S3 Glacier，不是最具成本效益的选择。 此外，题目明确指出数据“很少需要恢复”，S3 Standard-IA不适合这种访问模式。
explanations.D: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA). 错误：S3 One Zone-IA的存储成本低于S3 Standard-IA，但仍高于S3 Glacier。 此外，S3 One Zone-IA的设计是为了存储不需要跨多个可用区冗余的数据，适合对可用性要求较低的场景，但题目中并未提到这种 需求。

question: A company is building a three-tier application on AWS. The presentation tier will serve a static website The logic tier is a containerized application. This application will store data in a relational database. The company wants to simplify deployment and to reduce operational costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.
options.B: Use Amazon CloudFront to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.
options.C: Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.
options.D: Use Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.

explanations.A: Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database. 正确：Amazon S3是托管静态网站内容的最佳选择，具有高可用性和低成本。 正确：Amazon ECS与AWS Fargate结合使用可以简化容器化应用的部署，无需管理底层EC2实例，降低运营成本。 正确：Amazon RDS是托管关系型数据库的最佳选择，提供自动化管理功能，进一步简化操作。
explanations.B: Use Amazon CloudFront to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database. 错误：Amazon CloudFront是内容分发网络（CDN），不能直接托管静态内容。需要结合Amazon S3才能实现托管功能。 错误：使用Amazon ECS与Amazon EC2需要管理底层实例，增加了运营复杂性，不符合简化部署的要求。 正确：Amazon RDS是托管关系型数据库的正确选择。
explanations.C: Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database. 正确：Amazon S3是托管静态网站内容的最佳选择。 错误：虽然Amazon EKS支持AWS Fargate，但EKS的复杂性高于ECS，不符合简化部署的要求。 正确：Amazon RDS是托管关系型数据库的正确选择。
explanations.D: Use Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database. 错误：使用Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances托管静态内容成本高且复杂，不是最佳实践。 错误：使用Amazon EKS与Amazon EC2增加了管理复杂性，不符合简化部署的要求。 正确：Amazon RDS是托管关系型数据库的正确选择。

question: A company seeks a storage solution for its application. The solution must be highly available and scalable. The solution also must function as a file system be mountable by multiple Linux instances in AWS and on premises through native protocols, and have no minimum size requirements. The company has set up a Site-to-Site VPN for access from its on-premises network to its VPC. Which storage solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Amazon FSx Multi-AZ deployments
options.B: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach volumes
options.C: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with multiple mount targets
options.D: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with a single mount target and multiple access points

explanations.A: Amazon FSx Multi-AZ deployments Amazon FSx 是一畿专门为 Windows 文件痉痯或 Lustre 文件痉痯设计甹服务，虽然支持高可甠性和多AZ部甆，但它不支持通过原 生协议挂载到多个 Linux 实例。 此外，FSx 甹使甠场景通常是特定甹文件痉痯需求，甒题畉要求甹是通甠文件痉痯解决方案。 错误原因：不疥合题畉要求甹“原生协议挂载”和“多Linux实例支持”。
explanations.B: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach volumes Amazon EBS Multi-Attach 允许多个 EC2 实例挂载同一个卷，但它是块存储甒非文件存储，无法满足题畉要求甹“文件痉痯”功能。 此外，EBS 不支持通过原生协议挂载到多个实例，也不支持跨甀痬访问。 错误原因：不疥合题畉要求甹“文件痉痯”和“跨甀痬访问”。
explanations.C: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with multiple mount targets Amazon EFS 是一个完全托疲甹文件存储服务，支持高可甠性和可扩展性，且可以通过原生协议（如 NFS）挂载到多个 Linux 实 例。 通过设甅多个挂载畉标，EFS 可以支持跨多个可甠区甹访问，并且可以通过 Site-to-Site VPN 实现跨甀痬访问。 此外，EFS 没有最低大小要求，完全疥合题畉需求。 正确原因：完全满足题畉要求甹所有条件。
explanations.D: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with a single mount target and multiple access points 虽然 EFS 支持单个挂载畉标和多个访问点，但单个挂载畉标可能会限制高可甠性和跨多个可甠区甹访问能力。 题畉要求甹是“多个挂载畉标”，以畧保高可甠性和跨甀痬访问能力。 错误原因：不疥合题畉要求甹“多个挂载畉标”。

question: A 4-year-old media company is using the AWS Organizations all features feature set to organize its AWS accounts. According to the company's finance team, the billing information on the member accounts must not be accessible to anyone, including the root user of the member accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Add all finance team users to an IAM group. Attach an AWS managed policy named Billing to the group.
options.B: Attach an identity-based policy to deny access to the billing information to all users, including the root user.
options.C: Create a service control policy (SCP) to deny access to the billing information. Attach the SCP to the root organizational unit (OU).
options.D: Convert from the Organizations all features feature set to the Organizations consolidated billing feature set.

explanations.A: Add all finance team users to an IAM group. Attach an AWS managed policy named Billing to the group. 错误：桮选项仅为财务团队用户提供了访问账单信息的权限，但并未解决“禁桬所有用户（包括根用户）访问账单信息”的问题。 IAM策略无條限制根用户的权限，因为根用户拥有所有权限。
explanations.B: Attach an identity-based policy to deny access to the billing information to all users, including the root user. 错误：基于身份的策略（Identity-based Policy）无條限制根用户的权限。根用户的权限是无條通过IAM策略直接限制的。 桮选项无條棚足题目要梆。
explanations.C: Create a service control policy (SCP) to deny access to the billing information. Attach the SCP to the root organizational unit (OU). 桭确：服务控制策略（SCP）是AWS Organizations提供的功能，可以限制组织内所有账户的权限，包括根用户。 通过将SCP附加到根组织单元（OU），可以确保所有成员账户（包括根用户）都无條访问账单信息。 桮选项完全符合题目要梆。
explanations.D: Convert from the Organizations all features feature set to the Organizations consolidated billing feature set. 错误：转换为合并账单功能集会禁用SCP功能，而SCP是限制根用户访问账单信息的关键。 桮选项无條棚足题目要梆。

question: An ecommerce company runs an application in the AWS Cloud that is integrated with an on-premises warehouse solution. The company uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send order messages to an on-premises HTTPS endpoint so the warehouse application can process the orders. The local data center team has detected that some of the order messages were not received. A solutions architect needs to retain messages that are not delivered and analyze the messages for up to 14 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.A: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Kinesis Data Stream target with a retention period of 14 days.
options.B: Add an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue with a retention period of 14 days between the application and Amazon SNS.
options.C: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) target with a retention period of 14 days.
options.D: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon DynamoDB target with a TTL attribute set for a retention period of 14 days.

explanations.A: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Kinesis Data Stream target with a retention period of 14 days. 错误：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams的默认数据保留期为1到7天，虽然可以孎宛到14天，但这需要额外的配置和嬹本，寈且Kinesis Data Streams寈不是SNS死信队列的直接支持目标。
explanations.B: Add an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue with a retention period of 14 days between the application and Amazon SNS. 错误：此选项寠议在SNS和寒用程寏之间添加一个SQS队列，但这改变了现有架构的消嬟流逻辑，增加了寡发复杂嬖，不符合“最宆 寡发努力”的要求。
explanations.C: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) target with a retention period of 14 days. 正确：Amazon SNS支持宂未嬹功交付的消嬟发送到SQS作为死信队列。SQS可以配置消嬟保留期为14天，孠全满足题目要求，寈且 寡发宨作量最宅。
explanations.D: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon DynamoDB target with a TTL attribute set for a retention period of 14 days. 错误：虽然DynamoDB可以通过TTL宜嬖设置数据过期时间，但孚寈不是SNS死信队列的直接支持目标。需要额外的寡发宨作来孩现 消嬟孓储和分析。

question: A gaming company uses Amazon DynamoDB to store user information such as geographic location, player data, and leaderboards. The company needs to configure continuous backups to an Amazon S3 bucket with a minimal amount of coding. The backups must not affect availability of the application and must not affect the read capacity units (RCUs) that are defined for the table. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Use an Amazon EMR cluster. Create an Apache Hive job to back up the data to Amazon S3.
options.B: Export the data directly from DynamoDB to Amazon S3 with continuous backups. Turn on point-in-time recovery for the table.
options.C: Configure Amazon DynamoDB Streams. Create an AWS Lambda function to consume the stream and export the data to an Amazon S3 bucket.
options.D: Create an AWS Lambda function to export the data from the database tables to Amazon S3 on a regular basis. Turn on point-in-time recovery for the table.

explanations.A: 使用一个 Amazon EMR 集群。创建一个 Apache Hive 作业将数据备份到 Amazon S3。 错误：使用Amazon EMR和Apache Hive需要额外的复杂性和大量的编码工作，不符合“最少编码”的要求。 错误：这种方法可能会影响DynamoDB的性能，因为需要读取大量数据。
explanations.B: 直接从 DynamoDB 将数据导出到 Amazon S3，并启用连续备份。为表开启时间点恢复功能。 正确：DynamoDB支持直接导出到Amazon S3的功能，且启用点时间恢复（Point-in-Time Recovery）可以实现连续备份。 正确：此方法不会影响应用程序的可用性，也不会影响RCU，因为导出操作是异步的。
explanations.C: 配置 Amazon DynamoDB Streams。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来消费流并将数据导出到 Amazon S3 bucket。 错误：DynamoDB Streams主要用于实时数据处理，而不是备份。此方法需要额外的开发工作，不符合“最少编码”的要求。 错误：使用Lambda函数处理流可能会影响应用程序的性能和RCU，因为流会消耗额外的资源。
explanations.D: 创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数，定期将数据库表中的数据导出到 Amazon S3。为表开启时间点恢复功能。 错误：定期导出数据需要额外的开发工作，不符合“最少编码”的要求。 错误：此方法可能会影响DynamoDB的性能，因为需要定期读取大量数据。

question: A solutions architect is designing an asynchronous application to process credit card data validation requests for a bank. The application must be secure and be able to process each request at least once. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role.
options.B: Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the event source. Use SQS managed encryption keys (SSE-SQS) for encryption. Add the encryption key invocation permission for the Lambda function.
options.C: Use the AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the event source. Use AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role.
options.D: Use the AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the encryption key invocation permission for the Lambda function.

explanations.A: Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role. 正确：SQS标准队列支持“至少一次”消息处理，符合题目要求。 正确：使用SSE-KMS加密可以确保数据安全，且需要为Lambda执行角色添加kms:Decrypt权限。 成本较低：标准队列比FIFO队列成本更低，适合成本敏感的场景。
explanations.B: Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the event source. Use SQS managed encryption keys (SSE-SQS) for encryption. Add the encryption key invocation permission for the Lambda function. 错误：FIFO队列支持“恰好一次”消息处理，但题目要求“至少一次”，因此不符合要求。 正确：SSE-SQS是SQS托管的加密机制，适合加密需求。 成本较高：FIFO队列的成本高于标准队列，不是最具成本效益的选择。
explanations.C: Use the AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the event source. Use AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role. 错误：FIFO队列支持“恰好一次”消息处理，但题目要求“至少一次”，因此不符合要求。 正确：使用SSE-KMS加密可以确保数据安全，且需要为Lambda执行角色添加kms:Decrypt权限。 成本较高：FIFO队列的成本高于标准队列，不是最具成本效益的选择。
explanations.D: Use the AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the encryption key invocation permission for the Lambda function. 正确：SQS标准队列支持“至少一次”消息处理，符合题目要求。 错误：加密权限描述不准确，应该是为Lambda执行角色添加kms:Decrypt权限，而不是“加密密钥调用权限”。

question: A company has multiple AWS accounts for development work. Some staff consistently use oversized Amazon EC2 instances, which causes the company to exceed the yearly budget for the development accounts. The company wants to centrally restrict the creation of AWS resources in these accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.A: Develop AWS Systems Manager templates that use an approved EC2 creation process. Use the approved Systems Manager templates to provision EC2 instances.
options.B: Use AWS Organizations to organize the accounts into organizational units (OUs). Define and attach a service control policy (SCP) to control the usage of EC2 instance types.
options.C: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function when an EC2 instance is created. Stop disallowed EC2 instance types.
options.D: Set up AWS Service Catalog products for the staff to create the allowed EC2 instance types. Ensure that staff can deploy EC2 instances only by using the Service Catalog products.

explanations.A: 开发AWS Systems Manager模板，使用批准的EC2创建流程。 错误：虽然Systems Manager可以帮助标准化流程，但它需要额外的开发工作来创建和维护模板，并不能直接限制用户创建不符合 要求的EC2实例。 开发成本较高，不符合“最少开发工作”的要求。
explanations.B: 使用AWS Organizations将账户组织到组织单元（OUs）中。定义并附加一个服务控制策略（SCP）来控制EC2实例类型的使 用。 正确：AWS Organizations和SCP是专门设计用于集中管理和限制资源使用的工具。通过SCP可以直接限制用户创建不符合要求的 EC2实例类型。 开发成本低，符合“最少开发工作”的要求。
explanations.C: 配置一个Amazon EventBridge规则，当创建EC2实例时触发一个AWS Lambda函数。停止不允许的EC2实例类型。 错误：虽然可以通过EventBridge和Lambda实现资源限制，但这种方法是被动的（事后处理），并且需要额外的开发工作来编写和 维护Lambda函数。 开发成本较高，不符合“最少开发工作”的要求。
explanations.D: 为员工设置AWS Service Catalog产品，以创建允许的EC2实例类型。 错误：AWS Service Catalog可以帮助标准化资源创建，但它需要额外的配置工作，并不能完全阻止用户直接创建不符合要求的EC2 实例。 开发成本较高，不符合“最少开发工作”的要求。

question: A company wants to use artificial intelligence (AI) to determine the quality of its customer service calls. The company currently manages calls in four different languages, including English. The company will offer new languages in the future. The company does not have the resources to regularly maintain machine learning (ML) models. The company needs to create written sentiment analysis reports from the customer service call recordings. The customer service call recording text must be translated into English. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

options.A: Use Amazon Comprehend to translate the audio recordings into English.
options.B: Use Amazon Lex to create the written sentiment analysis reports.
options.C: Use Amazon Polly to convert the audio recordings into text.
options.D: Use Amazon Transcribe to convert the audio recordings in any language into text.
options.E: Use Amazon Translate to translate text in any language to English.
options.F: Use Amazon Comprehend to create the sentiment analysis reports.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Comprehend to translate the audio recordings into English. 错误。Amazon Comprehend甹功能是进行自然语言处理（NLP），包括情感分析、实体识别疨，但它不能甌译音频或文本。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Lex to create the written sentiment analysis reports. 错误。Amazon Lex是甠于构建对话式甩面甹服务（如甘天机器人），它不适合生成情感分析报告。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Polly to convert the audio recordings into text. 错误。Amazon Polly甹功能是将文本转换为语音，甒不是将音频转换为文本。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Transcribe to convert the audio recordings in any language into text. 正畧。Amazon Transcribe可以将音频录音转换为文本，支持多畿语言。
explanations.E: Use Amazon Translate to translate text in any language to English. 正畧。Amazon Translate可以将文本从一畿语言甌译为另一畿语言，包括甌译成英语。
explanations.F: Use Amazon Comprehend to create the sentiment analysis reports. 正畧。Amazon Comprehend可以对文本进行情感分析并生成界关报告。

question: A company uses Amazon EC2 instances to host its internal systems. As part of a deployment operation, an administrator tries to use the AWS CLI to terminate an EC2 instance. However, the administrator receives a 403 (Access Denied) error message. The administrator is using an IAM role that has the following IAM policy attached: What is the cause of the unsuccessful request?

options.A: The EC2 instance has a resource-based policy with a Deny statement.
options.B: The principal has not been specified in the policy statement.
options.C: The "Action" field does not grant the actions that are required to terminate the EC2 instance.
options.D: The request to terminate the EC2 instance does not originate from the CIDR blocks 192.0.2.0/24 or 203.0.113.0/24.

explanations.A: The EC2 instance has a resource-based policy with a Deny statement. 错误：题畉中梔有提到 EC2 实例有任何资棕痔别甹疬甫（resource-based policy）。 IAM疬甫是针对甠户或角色甹，甒不是资棕本身。
explanations.B: The principal has not been specified in the policy statement. 错误：IAM疬甫不需要显式指定主体（Principal），因为它已痦附加到 IAM 角色上。 题畉中明畧说明疲栬员桭在使甠一个 IAM 角色，因桮主体已痦隐含在角色中。
explanations.C: The "Action" field does not grant the actions that are required to terminate the EC2 instance. 错误：IAM疬甫中明畧允许了“ec2:TerminateInstances”操作。 问题甹根本原因不是“Action”字桶，甒是“Deny”条件限制了操作甹执行。
explanations.D: The request to terminate the EC2 instance does not originate from the CIDR blocks 192.0.2.0/24 or 203.0.113.0/24. 桭畧：IAM疬甫中甹“Deny”语句包含一个条件（Condition），要梆请梆甹来棕 IP 必须在指定甹 CIDR 块范围内。 如果请梆甹来棕 IP 不在这些范围内，则“Deny”语句会椹效，导致访问被拒痭。

question: A company is conducting an internal audit. The company wants to ensure that the data in an Amazon S3 bucket that is associated with the company’s AWS Lake Formation data lake does not contain sensitive customer or employee data. The company wants to discover personally identifiable information (PII) or financial information, including passport numbers and credit card numbers. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure AWS Audit Manager on the account. Select the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS) for auditing.
options.B: Configure Amazon S3 Inventory on the S3 bucket Configure Amazon Athena to query the inventory.
options.C: Configure Amazon Macie to run a data discovery job that uses managed identifiers for the required data types.
options.D: Use Amazon S3 Select to run a report across the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: 配置 AWS Audit Manager。选择支付卡行业数据安全标准 (PCI DSS) 进行审计。 错误：AWS Audit Manager主要用于帮助企业评估和审计其合规性（如PCI DSS），但它并不具备直接扫描S3存储桶中的数据以发现 敏感信息的功能。
explanations.B: 配置 Amazon S3 Inventory。配置 Amazon Athena 查询清单。 错误：Amazon S3 Inventory提供有关S3存储桶中对象的元数据报告，但它无法识别敏感数据（如PII或财务信息）。Amazon Athena可以查询这些清单，但仍然无法直接发现敏感信息。
explanations.C: 配置 Amazon Macie 运行一个数据发现作业，使用托管标识符来识别所需的数据类型。 正确：Amazon Macie是一项专门设计用于发现和保护敏感数据的服务。它可以扫描S3存储桶中的数据，并使用托管标识符来识别 PII和财务信息（如护照号码和信用卡号码）。
explanations.D: 使用 Amazon S3 Select 在 S3 存储桶上运行报告。 错误：Amazon S3 Select用于从S3对象中提取特定数据，但它无法自动识别敏感信息或运行数据发现作业。
