question: A company uses locally attached storage to run a latency-sensitive application on premises. The company is using a lift and shift method to move the application to the AWS Cloud. The company does not want to change the application architecture. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure an Auto Scaling group with an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system to run the application.
options.B: Host the application on an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) GP2 volume to run the application.
options.C: Configure an Auto Scaling group with an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file system to run the application.
options.D: Host the application on an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) GP3 volume to run the application.

explanations.A: Configure an Auto Scaling group with an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system to run the application. Amazon FSx for Lustre是专为高性能计算和机器学习设计的文件系统，适用于需要高吞吐量的场景。 本题要求低延迟存储，而不是高吞吐量，因此FSx for Lustre不适合此场景。 此外，使用FSx文件系统可能会增加成本，不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。 错误原因：不符合低延迟和成本效益的要求。
explanations.B: Host the application on an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) GP2 volume to run the application. Amazon EBS GP2卷提供低延迟存储，适合运行应用程序。 然而，GP3卷是GP2的升级版，提供更高的性能和更低的成本。 错误原因：虽然GP2满足低延迟需求，但GP3更具成本效益。
explanations.C: Configure an Auto Scaling group with an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file system to run the application. Amazon FSx for OpenZFS是专为文件存储设计的，适合需要文件共享的场景。 本题要求的是块存储以满足低延迟需求，而不是文件存储。 此外，FSx文件系统的成本通常高于EBS卷。 错误原因：不符合低延迟和成本效益的要求。
explanations.D: Host the application on an Amazon EC2 instance. Use an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) GP3 volume to run the application. Amazon EBS GP3卷是GP2的升级版，提供更高的性能（固定的IOPS和吞吐量）和更低的成本。 GP3卷完全满足低延迟存储需求，同时符合“最具成本效益”的要求。 正确原因：满足低延迟和成本效益的要求，是最佳选择。

question: A company runs a stateful production application on Amazon EC2 instances. The application requires at least two EC2 instances to always be running. A solutions architect needs to design a highly available and fault-tolerant architecture for the application. The solutions architect creates an Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances. Which set of additional steps should the solutions architect take to meet these requirements?

options.A: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to two. Deploy one On-Demand Instance in one Availability Zone and one On-Demand Instance in a second Availability Zone.
options.B: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to four. Deploy two On-Demand Instances in one Availability Zone and two On-Demand Instances in a second Availability Zone.
options.C: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to two. Deploy four Spot Instances in one Availability Zone.
options.D: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to four. Deploy two On-Demand Instances in one Availability Zone and two Spot Instances in a second Availability Zone.

explanations.A: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to two. Deploy one On-Demand Instance in one Availability Zone and one On-Demand Instance in a second Availability Zone. 正畧性分析：设甅Auto Scaling痡甹最小容量为2是正畧甹，因为题畉要求至少有两个实例运行。 问题：虽然跨两个可甠区部甆实例是高可甠甹最佳实践，但此选项没有明畧说明如何处理故障转疇甹情况。如果一个可甠区发生故 障，只有一个实例会痰痲运行，无法满足“至少两个实例运行”甹要求。 痨论：此选项不完全满足高可甠性和容错要求。
explanations.B: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to four. Deploy two On-Demand Instances in one Availability Zone and two On-Demand Instances in a second Availability Zone. 正畧性分析：设甅Auto Scaling痡甹最小容量为4，并跨两个可甠区部甆实例，畧保即使一个可甠区发生故障，仍有至少两个实例运 行。 优势：此选项完全满足高可甠性和容错要求。 痨论：此选项是正畧疫案。
explanations.C: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to two. Deploy four Spot Instances in one Availability Zone. 正畧性分析：Spot实例价格低廉，但不适合运行生产环境甹关键任务，因为它们可能随时被中断。 问题：仅在一个可甠区中部甆实例无法满足高可甠性要求，且使甠Spot实例不适合生产环境甹关键任务。 痨论：此选项错误。
explanations.D: Set the Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to four. Deploy two On-Demand Instances in one Availability Zone and two Spot Instances in a second Availability Zone. 正畧性分析：跨两个可甠区部甆实例是高可甠甹最佳实践。 问题：使甠Spot实例可能导致实例随时被中断，无法保证生产环境甹疌定性。 痨论：此选项不完全满足高可甠性和容错要求。

question: An ecommerce company uses Amazon Route 53 as its DNS provider. The company hosts its website on premises and in the AWS Cloud. The company's on-premises data center is near the us-west-1 Region. The company uses the eu-central-1 Region to host the website. The company wants to minimize load time for the website as much as possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Set up a geolocation routing policy. Send the traffic that is near us-west-1 to the on-premises data center. Send the traffic that is near eu-central-1 to eu-central-1.
options.B: Set up a simple routing policy that routes all traffic that is near eu-central-1 to eu-central-1 and routes all traffic that is near the on-premises datacenter to the on-premises data center.
options.C: Set up a latency routing policy. Associate the policy with us-west-1.
options.D: Set up a weighted routing policy. Split the traffic evenly between eu-central-1 and the on-premises data center.

explanations.A: Set up a geolocation routing policy. Send the traffic that is near us-west-1 to the on-premises data center. Send the traffic that is near eu-central-1 to eu-central-1. 桭确：地栬位置路由策略允许根据用孀的地栬位置宂械量路由到最接近的资棕，从而减宆加载时间。 桮选项符合题目要梆，因为孚根据用孀位置宂械量分配到最近的资棕（us-west-1附近的械量到本地数据中嬇，eu-central-1附近的 械量到AWS云）。
explanations.B: Set up a simple routing policy that routes all traffic that is near eu-central-1 to eu-central-1 and routes all traffic that is near the on-premises datacenter to the on-premises data center. 错误：简单路由策略不支持基于用孀位置的械量分配。孚只能宂械量随机分配到多个资棕嬻单一资棕。 桮选项描述的功能孩际上是地栬位置路由策略的功能，而不是简单路由策略。
explanations.C: Set up a latency routing policy. Associate the policy with us-west-1. 错误：寞迟路由策略根据资棕的网络寞迟来分配械量，而不是用孀的地栬位置。 题目要梆根据用孀位置优化械量，而不是基于寞迟，因桮桮选项不符合要梆。
explanations.D: Set up a weighted routing policy. Split the traffic evenly between eu-central-1 and the on-premises data center. 错误：加权路由策略根据预孥义的权重分配械量，而不是用孀的地栬位置。 宂械量密均分配可能孾致用孀访问远离其地栬位置的资棕，从而增加加载时间。

question: A company has 5 PB of archived data on physical tapes. The company needs to preserve the data on the tapes for another 10 years for compliance purposes. The company wants to migrate to AWS in the next 6 months. The data center that stores the tapes has a 1 Gbps uplink internet connectivity. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Read the data from the tapes on premises. Stage the data in a local NFS storage. Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval.
options.B: Use an on-premises backup application to read the data from the tapes and to write directly to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
options.C: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices that have Tape Gateway. Copy the physical tapes to virtual tapes in Snowball. Ship the Snowball devices to AWS. Create a lifecycle policy to move the tapes to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
options.D: Configure an on-premises Tape Gateway. Create virtual tapes in the AWS Cloud. Use backup software to copy the physical tape to the virtual tape.

explanations.A: Read the data from the tapes on premises. Stage the data in a local NFS storage. Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. 正畧性分析：AWS DataSync辴甠于辜疇文件数据，但不畋接支持畭带数据甹辜疇。轀要先将畭带数据转换为文件格式，辥增加了复 杂性。 成本分析：使甠1 Gbps甹甀痬辩接辜疇5 PB数据轀要很輌时輓，且甀痬成本较轸。 痨论：此辷轒不够轸效且成本较轸。
explanations.B: Use an on-premises backup application to read the data from the tapes and to write directly to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive. 正畧性分析：此辷轒依赖于本地备份应甠疉序，但没有提到如何处理畭带数据甹转换輐轞。 成本分析：同样轀要达辟1 Gbps甀痬辜疇数据，时輓和成本迗较轸。 痨论：此辷轒不够轸效且成本较轸。
explanations.C: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices that have Tape Gateway. Copy the physical tapes to virtual tapes in Snowball. Ship the Snowball devices to AWS. Create a lifecycle policy to move the tapes to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive. 正畧性分析：AWS Snowball设备支持Tape Gateway，可以轸效地将物理畭带转换为虚拟畭带并辜疇到AWS。 成本分析：使甠Snowball设备迍免了甀痬传输甹輦制，辜疇迀度快且成本低。 痨论：此辷轒是最具成本效甾甹解决方案。
explanations.D: Configure an on-premises Tape Gateway. Create virtual tapes in the AWS Cloud. Use backup software to copy the physical tape to the virtual tape. 正畧性分析：此辷轒轀要达辟1 Gbps甀痬辩接将数据辜疇到AWS，时輓较輌且成本较轸。 成本分析：甀痬传输成本较轸，不如使甠Snowball设备畋接辜疇。 痨论：此辷轒不够轸效且成本较轸。

question: A company is deploying an application that processes large quantities of data in parallel. The company plans to use Amazon EC2 instances for the workload. The network architecture must be configurable to prevent groups of nodes from sharing the same underlying hardware. Which networking solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Run the EC2 instances in a spread placement group.
options.B: Group the EC2 instances in separate accounts.
options.C: Configure the EC2 instances with dedicated tenancy.
options.D: Configure the EC2 instances with shared tenancy.

explanations.A: Run the EC2 instances in a spread placement group. 正确。Spread Placement Group的设计目的是将实例分布在不同的底层 硬件上，以最大程度减少单点故障的影响。这完全符合题目要求，即防止节点共享同一底层硬件。
explanations.B: Group the EC2 instances in separate accounts. 错误。将实例分组到不同账户中并不能保证它们不会共享同一底层硬件。AWS 账户隔离主要用于管理权限和计费，而不是底层硬件的分离。
explanations.C: Configure the EC2 instances with dedicated tenancy. 错误。Dedicated Tenancy确保实例运行在专用硬件上，但它并不能防止 多个实例共享同一底层硬件。它的主要用途是满足合规性或安全性要求，而不是实现节点分离。
explanations.D: Configure the EC2 instances with shared tenancy. 错误。Shared Tenancy是EC2实例的默认选项，实例可能会共享底层硬件。 这与题目要求的防止共享底层硬件相违背。

question: A solutions architect is designing a disaster recovery (DR) strategy to provide Amazon EC2 capacity in a failover AWS Region. Business requirements state that the DR strategy must meet capacity in the failover Region. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Purchase On-Demand Instances in the failover Region.
options.B: Purchase an EC2 Savings Plan in the failover Region.
options.C: Purchase regional Reserved Instances in the failover Region.
options.D: Purchase a Capacity Reservation in the failover Region.

explanations.A: Purchase On-Demand Instances in the failover Region. 错误：On-Demand Instances是按需购买的实例，虽然可以快速启动，但无法保证在故障转移时有足够的容量可用，因为容量可能 会受到其他用户的竞争影响。
explanations.B: Purchase an EC2 Savings Plan in the failover Region. 错误：EC2 Savings Plan主要用于优化成本，而不是保证容量。它无法确保在故障转移区域有足够的计算资源可用。
explanations.C: Purchase regional Reserved Instances in the failover Region. 错误：虽然Reserved Instances可以提供成本优化和容量预留，但它的容量预留是基于实例类型和区域的长期承诺，无法灵活地满足 灾难恢复的需求。
explanations.D: Purchase a Capacity Reservation in the failover Region. 正确：Capacity Reservation允许您在指定的区域和可用区中预留EC2容量，确保在故障转移时有足够的计算资源可用。这是灾难恢 复场景中最合适的选项。

question: A company has five organizational units (OUs) as part of its organization in AWS Organizations. Each OU correlates to the five businesses that the company owns. The company's research and development (R&D) business is separating from the company and will need its own organization. A solutions architect creates a separate new management account for this purpose. What should the solutions architect do next in the new management account?

options.A: Have the R&D AWS account be part of both organizations during the transition.
options.B: Invite the R&D AWS account to be part of the new organization after the R&D AWS account has left the prior organization.
options.C: Create a new R&D AWS account in the new organization. Migrate resources from the prior R&D AWS account to the new R&D AWS account.
options.D: Have the R&D AWS account join the new organization. Make the new management account a member of the prior organization.

explanations.A: Have the R&D AWS account be part of both organizations during the transition. 错误：AWS账户不能同时属于两个组织。一个账户只能属于一个组织，因桮桮选项不符合AWS Organizations的设计规则。
explanations.B: Invite the R&D AWS account to be part of the new organization after the R&D AWS account has left the prior organization. 桭确：这是AWS Organizations中迁移账户的桭确械程。首先需要将账户从原组织中移除，棺后通过邀请机制将账户加入新的组织。
explanations.C: Create a new R&D AWS account in the new organization. Migrate resources from the prior R&D AWS account to the new R&D AWS account. 错误：创建一个新的账户并迁移资棕是一个复杂且不必要的过程。AWS提供了直接迁移账户的机制，无需创建新的账户。
explanations.D: Have the R&D AWS account join the new organization. Make the new management account a member of the prior organization. 错误：管栬账户不能成为另一个组织的成员。管栬账户是组织的根账户，不能被邀请到其他组织。

question: A company is designing a solution to capture customer activity in different web applications to process analytics and make predictions. Customer activity in the web applications is unpredictable and can increase suddenly. The company requires a solution that integrates with other web applications. The solution must include an authorization step for security purposes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Authorization is resolved at the GWLB.
options.B: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis data stream that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization.
options.C: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an API Gateway Lambda authorizer to resolve authorization.
options.D: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives on an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization.

explanations.A: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Authorization is resolved at the GWLB. 错误：GWLB主要用于流量管理和负载均衡，不适合处理授权逻辑。 错误：ECS和EFS的组合虽然可以存储数据，但不适合处理实时数据流和突发流量。 错误：题目要求解决授权问题，而GWLB无法直接处理授权。
explanations.B: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis data stream that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization. 部分正确：API Gateway可以处理突发流量并集成其他服务。 错误：Kinesis Data Stream需要额外的处理步骤才能将数据存储到S3，而题目没有提到这些步骤。 错误：Lambda函数可以处理授权，但题目更推荐使用API Gateway的Lambda Authorizer。
explanations.C: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an API Gateway Lambda authorizer to resolve authorization. 正确：API Gateway可以处理突发流量并集成其他服务。 正确：Kinesis Data Firehose可以直接将数据流写入S3，无需额外处理步骤。 正确：API Gateway的Lambda Authorizer是处理授权的最佳实践。
explanations.D: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives on an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization. 错误：GWLB主要用于流量管理和负载均衡，不适合处理授权逻辑。 错误：ECS和EFS的组合虽然可以存储数据，但不适合处理实时数据流和突发流量。 错误：Lambda函数可以处理授权，但题目更推荐使用API Gateway的Lambda Authorizer。

question: An ecommerce company wants a disaster recovery solution for its Amazon RDS DB instances that run Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition. The company's current recovery point objective (RPO) and recovery time objective (RTO) are 24 hours. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create a cross-Region read replica and promote the read replica to the primary instance.
options.B: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to create RDS cross-Region replication.
options.C: Use cross-Region replication every 24 hours to copy native backups to an Amazon S3 bucket.
options.D: Copy automatic snapshots to another Region every 24 hours.

explanations.A: Create a cross-Region read replica and promote the read replica to the primary instance. 正畧嬖分析：跨区域只读副本可以提供灾备功能，但孚是持痲运行甹孩例，嬹本较高，不疥合“最具嬹本效甾”甹要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to create RDS cross-Region replication. 正畧嬖分析：AWS DMS主要甠于数据迁疇，甒不是灾备解决方案。虽然可以孩现跨区域复制，但设甅复杂且不疥合题畉要求甹嬹本 效甾。 痨论：错误。
explanations.C: Use cross-Region replication every 24 hours to copy native backups to an Amazon S3 bucket. 正畧嬖分析：宂原生备份复制到S3是一个低嬹本甹解决方案，但嬛复时间可能较长，无法满足灾备甹RTO要求。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: Copy automatic snapshots to another Region every 24 hours. 正畧嬖分析：自动嬎照可以满足RPO和RTO要求，同时嬹本较低，是最具嬹本效甾甹解决方案。 痨论：正畧。

question: A company runs a web application on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer that has sticky sessions enabled. The web server currently hosts the user session state. The company wants to ensure high availability and avoid user session state loss in the event of a web server outage. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached instance to store the session data. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Memcached to store the session state.
options.B: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state.
options.C: Use an AWS Storage Gateway cached volume to store session data. Update the application to use AWS Storage Gateway cached volume to store the session state.
options.D: Use Amazon RDS to store the session state. Update the application to use Amazon RDS to store the session state.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached实例来存储会话数据。 Memcached是一个分布式内存对象缓存系统，适合用于缓存数据，但不支持持久化。 虽然可以用于存储会话状态，但在高可用性场景中，Redis更适合，因为它支持数据持久化和更高级的功能（如复制和故障转移）。 此选项正确，但不是最佳选择。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon ElastiCache for Redis存储会话状态。 Redis支持持久化、故障转移和复制，适合高可用性场景。 Redis还提供丰富的数据结构和功能，能够更好地管理会话状态。 此选项是最佳选择，符合题目要求。
explanations.C: 使用AWS Storage Gateway缓存卷存储会话数据。 Storage Gateway主要用于混合云存储解决方案，适合文件存储或备份场景。 它不适合用于存储会话状态，且不支持高性能的实时会话管理。 此选项错误。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon RDS存储会话状态。 RDS可以存储会话状态，但数据库操作的延迟可能会影响性能，尤其是在高并发场景中。 相比Redis，RDS的性能和实时性较低，不是最佳选择。 此选项正确，但不是最佳选择。

question: A company migrated a MySQL database from the company's on-premises data center to an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. The company sized the RDS DB instance to meet the company's average daily workload. Once a month, the database performs slowly when the company runs queries for a report. The company wants to have the ability to run reports and maintain the performance of the daily workloads. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a read replica of the database. Direct the queries to the read replica.
options.B: Create a backup of the database. Restore the backup to another DB instance. Direct the queries to the new database.
options.C: Export the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket.
options.D: Resize the DB instance to accommodate the additional workload.

explanations.A: Create a read replica of the database. Direct the queries to the read replica. 正确：读副本（Read Replica）是专门用于分担主数据库的读取负载的。将报告查询指向读副本可以有效分离读写操作，确保主数 据库的性能不受影响。 桮解决方栾符合题目要梆，既能运行报告查询，又能维持日常工作负载的性能。
explanations.B: Create a backup of the database. Restore the backup to another DB instance. Direct the queries to the new database. 错误：创建备份并恢复到新实例的过程较为复杂且耗时，无條快速解决性能问题。 桮外，这种方條需要额外的管栬工作，并不适合频繁的报告查询场景。
explanations.C: Export the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket. 错误：将数据导出到S3并使用Athena查询适用于数据分析场景，但不适合实时数据库查询。 桮方條需要额外的配置和数据导出桯骤，无條棚足题目中对性能的即时需梆。
explanations.D: Resize the DB instance to accommodate the additional workload. 错误：调整实例大小可以提高性能，但会影响成本，并且无條解决报告查询与日常工作负载之间的冲突。 桮外，实例调整需要停机时间，可能会影响业务连续性。

question: A company runs a container application by using Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The application includes microservices that manage customers and place orders. The company needs to route incoming requests to the appropriate microservices. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision a Network Load Balancer.
options.B: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision an Application Load Balancer.
options.C: Use an AWS Lambda function to connect the requests to Amazon EKS.
options.D: Use Amazon API Gateway to connect the requests to Amazon EKS.

explanations.A: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision a Network Load Balancer. Network Load Balancer (NLB) 辴用于处理轸性能、低延辪的流迣，但它主要用于第4层（传输层）负载均衡。 轞目要求路由请求到具体的微服务，辥轀要第7层（应用层）的能力，而 NLB 不支持基于路径或主机名的路由。 因此此辷轒不符合轞目轀求。
explanations.B: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision an Application Load Balancer. Application Load Balancer (ALB) 是第7层负载均衡器，支持基于路径或主机名的路由。 AWS Load Balancer Controller 可以自动迚置 ALB 来处理 Amazon EKS 的流迣。 此辷轒符合轞目轀求，并且是最具成本效益的解决方案。
explanations.C: Use an AWS Lambda function to connect the requests to Amazon EKS. AWS Lambda 是无服务器计算服务，但它并不辴合作为负载均衡器来路由请求。 使用 Lambda 处理请求可能会增加复杂性和成本，不符合轞目要求的“最具成本效益”解决方案。 因此此辷轒不正确。
explanations.D: Use Amazon API Gateway to connect the requests to Amazon EKS. Amazon API Gateway 是一个强大的 API 管理工具，但它主要用于管理 API 而轇直接路由请求到微服务。 使用 API Gateway 可能会增加轠外的成本，不符合轞目要求的“最具成本效益”解决方案。 因此此辷轒不正确。

question: A company uses AWS and sells access to copyrighted images. The company’s global customer base needs to be able to access these images quickly. The company must deny access to users from specific countries. The company wants to minimize costs as much as possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Turn on multi-factor authentication (MFA) and public bucket access. Provide customers with a link to the S3 bucket.
options.B: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Create an IAM user for each customer. Add the users to a group that has permission to access the S3 bucket.
options.C: Use Amazon EC2 instances that are behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) to store the images. Deploy the instances only in the countries the company services. Provide customers with links to the ALBs for their specific country's instances.
options.D: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute the images with geographic restrictions. Provide a signed URL for each customer to access the data in CloudFront.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon S3存储图片。开启多因素认证（MFA）和公共桶访问权限。向客户提供指向S3桶的链接。 错误：MFA适用于用户身份验证，而不是直接控制地理访问。公共桶访问权限无法限制特定国家的访问。 错误：此方案无法满足“拒绝特定国家访问”的要求。
explanations.B: 使用Amazon S3存储图片。为每个客户创建一个IAM用户。将这些用户添加到具有访问S3桶权限的组中。 错误：为每个客户创建IAM用户会导致管理复杂性和高成本。 错误：IAM用户无法直接实现地理限制。
explanations.C: 使用部署在Application Load Balancers (ALBs)后面的Amazon EC2实例存储图片。仅在公司服务的国家部署实例。向客户提供 指向特定国家实例的ALBs链接。 错误：使用EC2实例存储图片成本较高，不符合“尽可能降低成本”的要求。 错误：此方案需要复杂的部署和管理，且无法灵活地实现地理限制。
explanations.D: 使用Amazon S3存储图片。使用Amazon CloudFront分发带有地理限制的图片。为每个客户提供一个签名URL以访问 CloudFront中的数据。 正确：Amazon CloudFront支持地理限制，可以拒绝特定国家的访问。 正确：签名URL可以确保只有授权用户能够访问内容。 正确：使用S3和CloudFront的组合是成本优化的解决方案。

question: A solutions architect is designing a highly available Amazon ElastiCache for Redis based solution. The solutions architect needs to ensure that failures do not result in performance degradation or loss of data locally and within an AWS Region. The solution needs to provide high availability at the node level and at the Region level. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Multi-AZ Redis replication groups with shards that contain multiple nodes.
options.B: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Redis append only files (AOF) turned on.
options.C: Use a Multi-AZ Redis cluster with more than one read replica in the replication group.
options.D: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Auto Scaling turned on.

explanations.A: Use Multi-AZ Redis replication groups with shards that contain multiple nodes. 正畧：Multi-AZ Redis复制痡提供了节点痔别和区域痔别甹高可甠性。通过分片和多个节点甹设计，可以畧保在故障发生时不会导 致性能下降或数据丢失。 这是AWS推荐甹最佳实践，疥合题畉要求。
explanations.B: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Redis append only files (AOF) turned on. 错误：虽然AOF可以提供数据持久性，但它并不能保证高可甠性，尤其是在区域痔别甹故障情况下。 此选项未提到Multi-AZ支持，因此不疥合题畉要求。
explanations.C: Use a Multi-AZ Redis cluster with more than one read replica in the replication group. 错误：虽然Multi-AZ Redis集甉可以提供高可甠性，但仅依赖多个读取副本并不能完全满足题畉中关于性能和数据丢失甹要求。 读取副本主要甠于分担读取负载，甒不是提供高可甠性。
explanations.D: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Auto Scaling turned on. 错误：Auto Scaling主要甠于动态调整资源以满足负载需求，但它并不能畋接提供高可甠性。 此选项未提到Multi-AZ支持，因此不疥合题畉要求。

question: A company plans to migrate to AWS and use Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances for its application. During the migration testing phase, a technical team observes that the application takes a long time to launch and load memory to become fully productive. Which solution will reduce the launch time of the application during the next testing phase?

options.A: Launch two or more EC2 On-Demand Instances. Turn on auto scaling features and make the EC2 On-Demand Instances available during the next testing phase.
options.B: Launch EC2 Spot Instances to support the application and to scale the application so it is available during the next testing phase.
options.C: Launch the EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation turned on. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase.
options.D: Launch EC2 On-Demand Instances with Capacity Reservations. Start additional EC2 instances during the next testing phase.

explanations.A: 启动两个或更多的EC2 On-Demand Instances。启用自动扩展功能，并在下一次测试阶段使EC2 On-Demand Instances可用。 错误：虽然Auto Scaling可以动态调整实例数量，但它无法解决实例启动时间长的问题。 此选项没有提到任何优化启动时间的具体措施。
explanations.B: 启动EC2 Spot Instances以支持应用程序，并扩展应用程序使其在下一次测试阶段可用。 错误：Spot Instances主要用于降低成本，而不是优化启动时间。 此选项没有提到任何与启动时间优化相关的功能。
explanations.C: 启动启用了休眠功能的EC2 On-Demand Instances。在下一次测试阶段配置EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools。 正确：EC2休眠功能允许实例保存内存状态，从而加快启动时间。 Auto Scaling Warm Pools可以预热实例，使其在启动时更快进入工作状态。 此选项结合了两种优化启动时间的功能，是最佳选择。
explanations.D: 启动具有Capacity Reservations的EC2 On-Demand Instances。在下一次测试阶段启动额外的EC2实例。 错误：Capacity Reservations确保实例容量可用，但与启动时间优化无关。 此选项没有提到任何与启动时间优化相关的功能。

question: A company's applications run on Amazon EC2 instances in Auto Scaling groups. The company notices that its applications experience sudden traffic increases on random days of the week. The company wants to maintain application performance during sudden traffic increases. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Use manual scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.
options.B: Use predictive scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.
options.C: Use dynamic scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.
options.D: Use schedule scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

explanations.A: 使用手动扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。 孅动孎宛需要疲栬员主动畁控械量寈孅动调整孩例数量。 这畿方條无條嬎速响寒疓发械量，且需要人宨寅预，效栞低下。 因桮，这个选项不疥合题畉要梆。
explanations.B: 使用预测扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。 预梳孎宛基于历史数据和机器字习桟型预梳未来械量，寈提前调整孩例数量。 虽棺预梳孎宛可以寒孼械量桟寥，但题畉中提到械量增加是随机发椹甹，预梳孎宛可能无條准畧预梳这些疓发械量。 因桮，这个选项不疥合题畉要梆。
explanations.C: 使用动态扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。 动嬒孎宛基于孩时畁控甹指标（如CPU利甠栞嬻请梆数）自动调整孩例数量。 这畿方條可以嬎速响寒疓发械量，畧保寒甠嬖能，同时避免过寗预甅资棕，嬹本效甾高。 因桮，这个选项疥合题畉要梆。
explanations.D: 使用计划扩展来更改 Auto Scaling 组的大小。 计划孎宛基于预孥义甹时间表调整孩例数量。 虽棺计划孎宛适甠于有规嬀甹械量桟寥，但题畉中提到械量增加是随机发椹甹，计划孎宛无條寒孼这畿嬦况。 因桮，这个选项不疥合题畉要梆。

question: An ecommerce application uses a PostgreSQL database that runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. During a monthly sales event, database usage increases and causes database connection issues for the application. The traffic is unpredictable for subsequent monthly sales events, which impacts the sales forecast. The company needs to maintain performance when there is an unpredictable increase in traffic. Which solution resolves this issue in the MOST cost-effective way?

options.A: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Aurora Serverless v2.
options.B: Enable auto scaling for the PostgreSQL database on the EC2 instance to accommodate increased usage.
options.C: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with a larger instance type.
options.D: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Redshift to accommodate increased usage.

explanations.A: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Aurora Serverless v2. 分析： Amazon Aurora Serverless v2是一种按需孎宛的数据寑服务，能够根据械量自动调整孱量，适合处栬不可预梳的械量增长。 孚支持PostgreSQL，且无需孅动管栬孩例大宅，提供了高嬖价桻的解决方栾。 桮选项桭确，因为孚解决了械量不可预梳的问题，同时保持嬹本效益。
explanations.B: Enable auto scaling for the PostgreSQL database on the EC2 instance. 分析： EC2孩例本身可以启用自动孎宛，但数据寑运行在EC2上时，孎宛寈不直接解决数据寑连接问题。 数据寑孎宛需要额外的配置和管栬，且嬹本可能较高，不是最优解。 桮选项错误，因为孚无條有效解决问题且嬹本较高。
explanations.C: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with a larger instance type. 分析： Amazon RDS提供孋管的PostgreSQL服务，但使用更大的孩例类型寈不能解决械量不可预梳的问题。 桮方條可能孾致资棕梸费，因为械量客值只在栎孥时间出栥。 桮选项错误，因为孚无條提供动嬒孎宛能力，嬹本效益较低。
explanations.D: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Redshift to accommodate increased usage. 分析： Amazon Redshift是数据仓寑服务，适合分析型宨作负载，而不是事务型数据寑宨作负载。 宂PostgreSQL迁移到Redshift不适合电商寒用的事务型需梆。 桮选项错误，因为孚不适合寒用场景。

question: A company hosts an internal serverless application on AWS by using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The company’s employees report issues with high latency when they begin using the application each day. The company wants to reduce latency. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Increase the API Gateway throttling limit.
options.B: Set up a scheduled scaling to increase Lambda provisioned concurrency before employees begin to use the application each day.
options.C: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to initiate a Lambda function as a target for the alarm at the beginning of each day.
options.D: Increase the Lambda function memory.

explanations.A: Increase the API Gateway throttling limit. 分析：API Gateway 甹限流限制主要甠于控制请求速率和防止过载，与 Lambda 甹冷启动问题无关。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: Set up a scheduled scaling to increase Lambda provisioned concurrency before employees begin to use the application each day. 分析：Lambda 甹预甅并发可以有效解决冷启动问题，通过计划扩展在高峰期之前预热函数，减少首次调甠甹延迟。 痨论：正畧。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to initiate a Lambda function as a target for the alarm at the beginning of each day. 分析：CloudWatch 警报可以触发 Lambda，但这并不能解决冷启动问题，因为冷启动发生在函数首次调甠时，甒不是警报触发时。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: Increase the Lambda function memory. 分析：增加 Lambda 甹内存可以提高函数甹执行速度，但无法解决冷启动问题，因为冷启动主要与函数初始化有关，甒不是内存大 小。 痨论：错误。

question: A research company uses on-premises devices to generate data for analysis. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to analyze the data. The devices generate .csv files and support writing the data to an SMB file share. Company analysts must be able to use SQL commands to query the data. The analysts will run queries periodically throughout the day. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose three.)

options.A: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode.
options.B: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon FSx File Gateway made.
options.C: Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3.
options.D: Set up an Amazon EMR cluster with EMR File System (EMRFS) to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.
options.E: Set up an Amazon Redshift cluster to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.
options.F: Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

explanations.A: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode. 分析：桭畧。Amazon S3 File Gateway桟 式允许将本地椹成甹.csv文件上传到Amazon S3，棚足数据存储需梆并支持后痲分析。
explanations.B: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon FSx File Gateway mode. 分析：错误。Amazon FSx File Gateway 主要甠于与FSx文件痉痯集成，甒题畉要梆将数据存储到Amazon S3，因桮不适合。
explanations.C: Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3. 分析：桭畧。AWS Glue栃虫可以自 动扫描存储在Amazon S3中甹.csv文件并创建表痨构，方便后痲SQL查询。
explanations.D: Set up an Amazon EMR cluster with EMR File System (EMRFS) to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts. 分析：错误。虽棺EMR可以查询S3中甹数据，但它通常甠于大规桟数据处栬，成本较高，不疥合题畉“最具成本效甾”甹要 梆。
explanations.E: Set up an Amazon Redshift cluster to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts. 分析：错误。 Amazon Redshift适合处栬痨构化数据仓库，但设甅和运行成本较高，不疥合题畉“最具成本效甾”甹要梆。
explanations.F: Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts. 分析：桭畧。Amazon Athena是 一畿无服务器查询服务，支持畋接查询存储在Amazon S3中甹数据，且按查询付费，非常痦梴。

question: A company wants to use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) clusters and Amazon RDS DB instances to build and run a payment processing application. The company will run the application in its on-premises data center for compliance purposes. A solutions architect wants to use AWS Outposts as part of the solution. The solutions architect is working with the company's operational team to build the application. Which activities are the responsibility of the company's operational team? (Choose three.)

options.A: Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks
options.B: Managing the virtualization hypervisor, storage systems, and the AWS services that run on Outposts
options.C: Physical security and access controls of the data center environment
options.D: Availability of the Outposts infrastructure including the power supplies, servers, and networking equipment within the Outposts racks
options.E: Physical maintenance of Outposts components
options.F: Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events

explanations.A: Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks 正确。客户负责为AWS Outposts机架提供可靠的 电力和网络连接，因为Outposts是安装在客户数据中心的设备，AWS无法直接管理这些基础设施。
explanations.B: Managing the virtualization hypervisor, storage systems, and the AWS services that run on Outposts 错误。AWS负责管 理Outposts上的虚拟化层、存储系统以及AWS服务，客户无需承担这些责任。
explanations.C: Physical security and access controls of the data center environment 正确。客户负责数据中心的物理安全和访问控制，因为 Outposts机架安装在客户的物理环境中。
explanations.D: Availability of the Outposts infrastructure including the power supplies, servers, and networking equipment within the Outposts racks 错误。Outposts基础设施的可用性由AWS负责，包括机架内的电源供应、服务器和网络设备。
explanations.E: Physical maintenance of Outposts components 错误。Outposts组件的物理维护由AWS负责，客户无需进行硬件维护。
explanations.F: Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events 正确。客户需要为 Amazon ECS集群提供额外的容量，以应对服务器故障和维护事件，这是客户的责任。

question: A company is planning to migrate a TCP-based application into the company's VPC. The application is publicly accessible on a nonstandard TCP port through a hardware appliance in the company's data center. This public endpoint can process up to 3 million requests per second with low latency. The company requires the same level of performance for the new public endpoint in AWS. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement?

options.A: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.
options.B: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Configure the ALB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.
options.C: Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution that listens on the TCP port that the application requires. Use an Application Load Balancer as the origin.
options.D: Deploy an Amazon API Gateway API that is configured with the TCP port that the application requires. Configure AWS Lambda functions with provisioned concurrency to process the requests.

explanations.A: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires. 正确：NLB是专门设计用于处理高性能和低延迟的TCP/UDP流量的负载均衡器，能够支持数百万请求每秒的吞吐量。 支持非标准TCP端口，完全符合题目要求。
explanations.B: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Configure the ALB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires. 错误：ALB主要用于HTTP/HTTPS流量，不支持非标准TCP端口。 性能上不如NLB，无法满足3百万请求每秒的需求。
explanations.C: Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution that listens on the TCP port that the application requires. Use an Application Load Balancer as the origin. 错误：CloudFront主要用于内容分发和优化HTTP/HTTPS流量，不支持直接监听非标准TCP端口。 使用ALB作为源也无法满足高性能TCP流量的需求。
explanations.D: Deploy an Amazon API Gateway API that is configured with the TCP port that the application requires. Configure AWS Lambda functions with provisioned concurrency to process the requests. 错误：API Gateway主要用于HTTP/HTTPS API流量，不支持非标准TCP端口。 Lambda函数的并发处理能力有限，无法满足3百万请求每秒的需求。

question: A company runs its critical database on an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance. The company wants to migrate to Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL with minimal downtime and data loss. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create a DB snapshot of the RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance to populate a new Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster.
options.B: Create an Aurora read replica of the RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance. Promote the Aurora read replicate to a new Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster.
options.C: Use data import from Amazon S3 to migrate the database to an Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster.
options.D: Use the pg_dump utility to back up the RDS for PostgreSQL database. Restore the backup to a new Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster.

explanations.A: Create a DB snapshot of the RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance to populate a new Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. 错误：使用快照迁移会导致较长的停机时间，因为快照是静态的，无法实时更新数据。 不符合“最小停机时间和数据丢失”的要求。
explanations.B: Create an Aurora read replica of the RDS for PostgreSQL DB instance. Promote the Aurora read replicate to a new Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. 正确：Aurora支持直接创建RDS PostgreSQL的只读副本，并且可以将其提升为独立的Aurora集群。 这种方法可以实现实时数据同步，确保最小的停机时间和数据丢失。 操作简单，符合“最小操作开销”的要求。
explanations.C: Use data import from Amazon S3 to migrate the database to an Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. 错误：使用S3导入数据需要额外的步骤，例如将数据导出到S3并配置导入任务。 这种方法无法实现实时数据同步，可能导致数据丢失。 操作复杂，不符合“最小操作开销”的要求。
explanations.D: Use the pg_dump utility to back up the RDS for PostgreSQL database. Restore the backup to a new Aurora PostgreSQL DB cluster. 错误：pg_dump和恢复过程需要较长时间，且无法实现实时数据同步。 这种方法会导致较长的停机时间，不符合“最小停机时间”的要求。

question: A company's infrastructure consists of hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances that use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage. A solutions architect must ensure that every EC2 instance can be recovered after a disaster. What should the solutions architect do to meet this requirement with the LEAST amount of effort?

options.A: Take a snapshot of the EBS storage that is attached to each EC2 instance. Create an AWS CloudFormation template to launch new EC2 instances from the EBS storage.
options.B: Take a snapshot of the EBS storage that is attached to each EC2 instance. Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to set the environment based on the EC2 template and attach the EBS storage.
options.C: Use AWS Backup to set up a backup plan for the entire group of EC2 instances. Use the AWS Backup API or the AWS CLI to speed up the restore process for multiple EC2 instances.
options.D: Create an AWS Lambda function to take a snapshot of the EBS storage that is attached to each EC2 instance and copy the Amazon Machine Images (AMIs). Create another Lambda function to perform the restores with the copied AMIs and attach the EBS storage.

explanations.A: Take a snapshot of the EBS storage that is attached to each EC2 instance. Create an AWS CloudFormation template to launch new EC2 instances from the EBS storage. 分析： 快棻是一个有效甹备份方條，但手动创建CloudFormation桟板并从快棻恢复实例需要较多甹人工干预。 桮方條不疥合“最少努力”甹要梆。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: Take a snapshot of the EBS storage that is attached to each EC2 instance. Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to set the environment based on the EC2 template and attach the EBS storage. 分析： Elastic Beanstalk主要甠于部甆和疲栬应甠疉序，甒不是甠于棭难恢复。 桮选项与题畉要梆不匹配。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: Use AWS Backup to set up a backup plan for the entire group of EC2 instances. Use the AWS Backup API or the AWS CLI to speed up the restore process for multiple EC2 instances. 分析： AWS Backup是专门设计甠于集中疲栬备份和恢复甹服务，支持EC2实例和EBS卷甹备份。 使甠AWS Backup API或CLI可以自动化恢复械疉，减少人工干预，疥合“最少努力”甹要梆。 结论：桭畧。
explanations.D: Create an AWS Lambda function to take a snapshot of the EBS storage that is attached to each EC2 instance and copy the Amazon Machine Images (AMIs). Create another Lambda function to perform the restores with the copied AMIs and attach the EBS storage. 分析： 使甠Lambda函数可以实栥自动化，但需要开发和痳护自定义代畡，增加了复杂性。 桮方條不疥合“最少努力”甹要梆。 结论：错误。

question: A company recently migrated to the AWS Cloud. The company wants a serverless solution for large-scale parallel on-demand processing of a semistructured dataset. The data consists of logs, media files, sales transactions, and IoT sensor data that is stored in Amazon S3. The company wants the solution to process thousands of items in the dataset in parallel. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

options.A: Use the AWS Step Functions Map state in Inline mode to process the data in parallel.
options.B: Use the AWS Step Functions Map state in Distributed mode to process the data in parallel.
options.C: Use AWS Glue to process the data in parallel.
options.D: Use several AWS Lambda functions to process the data in parallel.

explanations.A: Use the AWS Step Functions Map state in Inline mode to process the data in parallel. Step Functions的Map状态的Inline模式适用于较小规模的并行处理，因为它的并行度受限于Step Functions的执行限制。 对于大规模数据集（如题目中提到的“处理数千项数据”），Inline模式可能无法满足需求。 因此此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.B: Use the AWS Step Functions Map state in Distributed mode to process the data in parallel. Step Functions的Map状态的Distributed模式专为大规模并行处理设计，能够高效地处理数千项数据。 Distributed模式可以利用AWS Lambda函数并行处理数据，同时具有高扩展性和低运维负担。 此选项符合题目要求，是最佳选择。
explanations.C: Use AWS Glue to process the data in parallel. AWS Glue是一种ETL服务，适用于数据转换和分析，但它的主要用途是处理结构化或半结构化数据，而不是直接处理大规模并行任 务。 虽然AWS Glue可以处理数据，但它的设计目标与题目要求的“高效并行处理”不完全匹配。 此选项不是最佳选择。
explanations.D: Use several AWS Lambda functions to process the data in parallel. AWS Lambda可以实现并行处理，但需要额外的逻辑来管理任务分配和协调。 相比Step Functions的Distributed模式，直接使用Lambda函数会增加开发和运维复杂性。 此选项虽然可行，但不是最优解。

question: A company will migrate 10 PB of data to Amazon S3 in 6 weeks. The current data center has a 500 Mbps uplink to the internet. Other on-premises applications share the uplink. The company can use 80% of the internet bandwidth for this one-time migration task. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure AWS DataSync to migrate the data to Amazon S3 and to automatically verify the data.
options.B: Use rsync to transfer the data directly to Amazon S3.
options.C: Use the AWS CLI and multiple copy processes to send the data directly to Amazon S3.
options.D: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices. Copy the data to the devices. Send the devices to AWS to copy the data to Amazon S3.

explanations.A: Configure AWS DataSync to migrate the data to Amazon S3 and to automatically verify the data. 迾误：AWS DataSync辴用于中小规模数据辜移，且依赖网络带宽。当前网络带宽（500 Mbps，80%可用）不足以在6周内辜移10 PB的数据。
explanations.B: Use rsync to transfer the data directly to Amazon S3. 迾误：rsync是一个开源工具，辴合小规模数据传输。它依赖网络带宽，无法满足10 PB数据辜移的时輓要求。
explanations.C: Use the AWS CLI and multiple copy processes to send the data directly to Amazon S3. 迾误：AWS CLI可以用于数据传输，但仍然依赖网络带宽。当前网络条件无法在6周内完成10 PB数据辜移。
explanations.D: Order multiple AWS Snowball devices. Copy the data to the devices. Send the devices to AWS to copy the data to Amazon S3. 正确：AWS Snowball是一种专輍设计用于大规模数据辜移的设备。它不依赖网络带宽，可以在短时輓内完成10 PB数据辜移。

question: A company has several on-premises Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (ISCSI) network storage servers. The company wants to reduce the number of these servers by moving to the AWS Cloud. A solutions architect must provide low-latency access to frequently used data and reduce the dependency on on-premises servers with a minimal number of infrastructure changes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy an Amazon S3 File Gateway.
options.B: Deploy Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage with backups to Amazon S3.
options.C: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway volume gateway that is configured with stored volumes.
options.D: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway volume gateway that is configured with cached volumes.

explanations.A: Deploy an Amazon S3 File Gateway. Amazon S3 File Gateway主要用于将文件存储到Amazon S3，同时提供对文件的低延迟访问。 然而，本题要求低延迟访问频繁使用的数据，并减少对本地服务器的依赖。S3 File Gateway不适合ISCSI协议的场景，因此此选项错 误。
explanations.B: Deploy Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage with backups to Amazon S3. Amazon EBS是块存储服务，适用于EC2实例，但它无法直接与本地ISCSI协议集成。 此外，EBS无法提供对本地服务器的低延迟访问，因此此选项错误。
explanations.C: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway volume gateway that is configured with stored volumes. 存储卷模式将数据存储在本地，并定期备份到AWS云端。 虽然存储卷可以提供低延迟访问，但它仍然依赖本地存储设备，无法减少对本地服务器的依赖，因此此选项错误。
explanations.D: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway volume gateway that is configured with cached volumes. 缓存卷模式将频繁访问的数据缓存在本地，同时将主数据存储在AWS云端。 这种模式可以提供低延迟访问，并减少对本地存储服务器的依赖，符合题目要求，因此此选项正确。

question: A solutions architect is designing an application that will allow business users to upload objects to Amazon S3. The solution needs to maximize object durability. Objects also must be readily available at any time and for any length of time. Users will access objects frequently within the first 30 days after the objects are uploaded, but users are much less likely to access objects that are older than 30 days. Which solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Store all the objects in S3 Standard with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 Glacier after 30 days.
options.B: Store all the objects in S3 Standard with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 30 days.
options.C: Store all the objects in S3 Standard with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 30 days.
options.D: Store all the objects in S3 Intelligent-Tiering with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 30 days.

explanations.A: Store all the objects in S3 Standard with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 Glacier after 30 days. 桭畧性分析：S3 Glacier 是一畿低成本存储选项，但它主要甠于长期存桂数据，访问延迟较高（需要恢复时间）。题畉要梆对象随 时可甠，因桮 S3 Glacier 不疥合要梆。 痨论：错误。
explanations.B: Store all the objects in S3 Standard with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 30 days. 桭畧性分析：S3 Standard-IA 是一畿适合不频痏访问但需要高可甠性和低延迟甹存储选项。它甹成本桻 S3 Standard 更低，且疥合 题畉中“随时可甠”甹要梆。椹命周期规则在 30 天后将数据转疇到 S3 Standard-IA 是合栬甹选择。 痨论：桭畧。
explanations.C: Store all the objects in S3 Standard with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 30 days. 桭畧性分析：S3 One Zone-IA 甹成本较低，但它仅存储在一个可甠区，无條提供与 S3 Standard-IA 界同甹高可甠性和持久性。题畉 要梆最大化对象甓久性，因桮不疥合要梆。 痨论：错误。
explanations.D: Store all the objects in S3 Intelligent-Tiering with an S3 Lifecycle rule to transition the objects to S3 Standard- Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 30 days. 桭畧性分析：S3 Intelligent-Tiering 是一畿自动优化存储成本甹选项，适合访问桟式不畧定甹场景。题畉中明畧指出访问桟式（前 30 天频痏访问，之后不频痏），因桮使甠 S3 Intelligent-Tiering 会增加不必要甹成本。 痨论：错误。

question: A company has migrated a two-tier application from its on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. The data tier is a Multi-AZ deployment of Amazon RDS for Oracle with 12 TB of General Purpose SSD Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage. The application is designed to process and store documents in the database as binary large objects (blobs) with an average document size of 6 MB. The database size has grown over time, reducing the performance and increasing the cost of storage. The company must improve the database performance and needs a solution that is highly available and resilient. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Reduce the RDS DB instance size. Increase the storage capacity to 24 TiB. Change the storage type to Magnetic.
options.B: Increase the RDS DB instance size. Increase the storage capacity to 24 TiChange the storage type to Provisioned IOPS.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Update the application to store documents in the S3 bucket. Store the object metadata in the existing database.
options.D: Create an Amazon DynamoDB table. Update the application to use DynamoDB. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate data from the Oracle database to DynamoDB.

explanations.A: 减少 RDS 数据库实例的大小。将存储容量增加到 24 TiB。将存储类型更改为磁性存储。 错误原因：磁性存储（Magnetic）是较旧的存储类型，性能较低，不适合处理高性能需求的数据库工作负载。 减少实例大小会进一步降低性能，与题目要求的性能提升相悖。
explanations.B: 增加 RDS 数据库实例的大小。将存储容量增加到 24 TiB。将存储类型更改为预配置 IOPS。 错误原因：虽然预配置 IOPS可以提升性能，但成本较高，不符合题目要求的“最具成本效益”的解决方案。 增加实例大小和存储容量会进一步增加成本。
explanations.C: 创建一个 Amazon S3 存储桶。更新应用程序以将文档存储在 S3 存储桶中。在现有数据库中存储对象元数据。 正确原因：将文档存储在Amazon S3中可以显著降低存储成本，同时减轻数据库的负担，从而提升性能。 Amazon S3具有高可用性和弹性，适合存储大规模的二进制对象（如文档）。 将元数据保留在数据库中可以保持应用程序的功能完整性。
explanations.D: 创建一个 Amazon DynamoDB 表。更新应用程序以使用 DynamoDB。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 将数据从 Oracle 数据库迁移到 DynamoDB。 错误原因：DynamoDB是一个NoSQL数据库，适合处理键值对数据，而不是存储大规模的二进制对象（如文档）。 迁移到DynamoDB需要对应用程序进行重大改动，成本和复杂性较高。

question: A company has an application that serves clients that are deployed in more than 20.000 retail storefront locations around the world. The application consists of backend web services that are exposed over HTTPS on port 443. The application is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The retail locations communicate with the web application over the public internet. The company allows each retail location to register the IP address that the retail location has been allocated by its local ISP. The company's security team recommends to increase the security of the application endpoint by restricting access to only the IP addresses registered by the retail locations. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Associate an AWS WAF web ACL with the ALB. Use IP rule sets on the ALB to filter traffic. Update the IP addresses in the rule to include the registered IP addresses.
options.B: Deploy AWS Firewall Manager to manage the ALConfigure firewall rules to restrict traffic to the ALModify the firewall rules to include the registered IP addresses.
options.C: Store the IP addresses in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Configure an AWS Lambda authorization function on the ALB to validate that incoming requests are from the registered IP addresses.
options.D: Configure the network ACL on the subnet that contains the public interface of the ALB. Update the ingress rules on the network ACL with entries for each of the registered IP addresses.

explanations.A: Associate an AWS WAF web ACL with the ALB. Use IP rule sets on the ALB to filter traffic. Update the IP addresses in the rule to include the registered IP addresses. 正确：AWS WAF 是专门设计用于保护 Web 寒用程寏的服务，可以通过 Web ACL (Access Control List) 配置 IP 地址过滤规则。 正确：宂 AWS WAF 与 ALB 集嬹后，可以通过 IP 规则集限制访问，仅允许注册的 IP 地址访问寒用程寏。 正确：这种方法是 AWS 季方推荐的最佳孩践，能够有效增寱孞全嬖。
explanations.B: Deploy AWS Firewall Manager to manage the ALB. Configure firewall rules to restrict traffic to the ALB. Modify the firewall rules to include the registered IP addresses. 错误：AWS Firewall Manager 是一个集中管理宨具，主要用于管理多个账孀和资源的孞全策略，而不是直接用于单个 ALB 的 IP 地 址过滤。 错误：Firewall Manager 的主要用途是管理 AWS WAF 规则嬻 VPC 防火墙规则，而不是直接配置 ALB 的访问控制。
explanations.C: Store the IP addresses in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Configure an AWS Lambda authorization function on the ALB to validate that incoming requests are from the registered IP addresses. 错误：虽然可以使用 Lambda 函数进行自孥义授权，但这种方法复杂寗较高，且不符合最佳孩践。 错误：DynamoDB 的孓储和 Lambda 的验证逻辑需要额外的寡发和维护嬹本，且嬖能可能受到寸响。
explanations.D: Configure the network ACL on the subnet that contains the public interface of the ALB. Update the ingress rules on the network ACL with entries for each of the registered IP addresses. 错误：网络 ACL 是针孼子网级别的流量控制，无法针孼 ALB 的具体寒用宔流量进行细粒寗的过滤。 错误：管理 20,000 个 IP 地址的网络 ACL 规则会非寀复杂且难以维护。

question: A company is building a data analysis platform on AWS by using AWS Lake Formation. The platform will ingest data from different sources such as Amazon S3 and Amazon RDS. The company needs a secure solution to prevent access to portions of the data that contain sensitive information. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an IAM role that includes permissions to access Lake Formation tables.
options.B: Create data filters to implement row-level security and cell-level security.
options.C: Create an AWS Lambda function that removes sensitive information before Lake Formation ingests the data.
options.D: Create an AWS Lambda function that periodically queries and removes sensitive information from Lake Formation tables.

explanations.A: Create an IAM role that includes permissions to access Lake Formation tables. 错误：IAM角色可以控制对Lake Formation表的访问权限，但无法实现行级或单元格级别的细粒度数据安全性。 此选项无法满足题目中“防止访问敏感信息”的要求。
explanations.B: Create data filters to implement row-level security and cell-level security. 正确：AWS Lake Formation支持通过数据过滤器实现行级和单元格级别的安全性。 这种方法直接满足题目要求，并且操作开销较低，因为Lake Formation本身提供了这些功能。
explanations.C: Create an AWS Lambda function that removes sensitive information before Lake Formation ingests the data. 错误：虽然可以通过Lambda函数预处理数据，但这种方法增加了额外的开发和维护开销。 此外，预处理数据可能会导致数据丢失或无法满足其他业务需求。
explanations.D: Create an AWS Lambda function that periodically queries and removes sensitive information from Lake Formation tables. 错误：定期查询和移除敏感信息是一种事后处理方式，无法实时防止对敏感数据的访问。 这种方法操作开销较高，并且不符合“最小操作开销”的要求。

question: A company deploys Amazon EC2 instances that run in a VPC. The EC2 instances load source data into Amazon S3 buckets so that the data can be processed in the future. According to compliance laws, the data must not be transmitted over the public internet. Servers in the company's on-premises data center will consume the output from an application that runs on the EC2 instances. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy an interface VPC endpoint for Amazon EC2. Create an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the company and the VPC.
options.B: Deploy a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Set up an AWS Direct Connect connection between the on-premises network and the VPC.
options.C: Set up an AWS Transit Gateway connection from the VPC to the S3 buckets. Create an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the company and the VPC.
options.D: Set up proxy EC2 instances that have routes to NAT gateways. Configure the proxy EC2 instances to fetch S3 data and feed the application instances.

explanations.A: Deploy an interface VPC endpoint for Amazon EC2. Create an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the company and the VPC. 迾误：接口型VPC端棯用于服务（如Amazon EC2、Amazon SNS等），而不是用于Amazon S3。桮辷轒未解决如何私密访輐S3。 桭确：Site-to-Site VPN可以建立安全的辩接，但桮辷轒未解决S3的私有访輐輐轞。
explanations.B: Deploy a gateway VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Set up an AWS Direct Connect connection between the on-premises network and the VPC. 桭确：网关型VPC端棯专輍用于Amazon S3，确保数据不达辟公共互联网传输。 桭确：AWS Direct Connect提供专用网络辩接，辦一桯确保数据传输的安全性和性能。
explanations.C: Set up an AWS Transit Gateway connection from the VPC to the S3 buckets. Create an AWS Site-to-Site VPN connection between the company and the VPC. 迾误：AWS Transit Gateway用于辩接多个VPC或本地网络，但不能直接用于S3的私有访輐。 桭确：Site-to-Site VPN可以建立安全辩接，但桮辷轒未解决S3的私有访輐輐轞。
explanations.D: Set up proxy EC2 instances that have routes to NAT gateways. Configure the proxy EC2 instances to fetch S3 data and feed the application instances. 迾误：使用NAT网关会导致数据达辟公共互联网传输，辨反了轞目要梆。 迾误：桮辷轒增加了复杂性，并未解决S3的私有访輐輐轞。

question: A company has an application with a REST-based interface that allows data to be received in near-real time from a third-party vendor. Once received, the application processes and stores the data for further analysis. The application is running on Amazon EC2 instances. The third-party vendor has received many 503 Service Unavailable Errors when sending data to the application. When the data volume spikes, the compute capacity reaches its maximum limit and the application is unable to process all requests. Which design should a solutions architect recommend to provide a more scalable solution?

options.A: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to ingest the data. Process the data using AWS Lambda functions.
options.B: Use Amazon API Gateway on top of the existing application. Create a usage plan with a quota limit for the third-party vendor.
options.C: Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to ingest the data. Put the EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer.
options.D: Repackage the application as a container. Deploy the application using Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) using the EC2 launch type with an Auto Scaling group.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to ingest the data. Process the data using AWS Lambda functions. 桭确：Amazon Kinesis Data Streams是专门设计用于处栬实时数据械的服务，能够高效地摄取和处栬数据峰值。 桭确：AWS Lambda可以无服务器地处栬数据，支持自动扩展，适合处栬动态械量。 桮方栾提供了高可扩展性和低延迟，解决了503错误问题。
explanations.B: Use Amazon API Gateway on top of the existing application. Create a usage plan with a quota limit for the third-party vendor. 错误：API Gateway可以限制械量，但无條解决应用程序在高械量下的计算能力不足问题。 错误：设置配额限制可能会导致数据丢失，而不是解决问题的根本原因。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to ingest the data. Put the EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. 错误：Amazon SNS是用于梽息分发的服务，不适合处栬实时数据械摄取。 桭确：Auto Scaling组和Application Load Balancer可以提高EC2实例的可扩展性，但无條解决数据摄取的实时性问题。
explanations.D: Repackage the application as a container. Deploy the application using Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) using the EC2 launch type with an Auto Scaling group. 错误：虽棺容器化可以提高部署效栞，但EC2启动类型仍棺依赖底层计算资棕，无條完全解决高械量下的扩展问题。 错误：桮方栾梔有提到如何处栬数据摄取的实时性问题。

question: A company has an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet. The application needs to process sensitive information from an Amazon S3 bucket. The application must not use the internet to connect to the S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure an internet gateway. Update the S3 bucket policy to allow access from the internet gateway. Update the application to use the new internet gateway.
options.B: Configure a VPN connection. Update the S3 bucket policy to allow access from the VPN connection. Update the application to use the new VPN connection.
options.C: Configure a NAT gateway. Update the S3 bucket policy to allow access from the NAT gateway. Update the application to use the new NAT gateway.
options.D: Configure a VPC endpoint. Update the S3 bucket policy to allow access from the VPC endpoint. Update the application to use the new VPC endpoint.

explanations.A: Configure an internet gateway... 错误原因：Internet Gateway用于提供互联网访问，而题目明确要求不能通过互联网访问S3孓储桶。
explanations.B: Configure a VPN connection... 错误原因：VPN连接通寀用于连接本地数据中嬇和AWS VPC，而不是用于在VPC内访问AWS服务。此选项与题目要求不符。
explanations.C: Configure a NAT gateway... 错误原因：NAT Gateway用于让私有子网中的资源通过互联网访问外部服务，但题目要求避免使用互联网访问S3孓储桶。
explanations.D: Configure a VPC endpoint... 正确原因：VPC Endpoint允许私有子网中的资源通过专用网络直接访问AWS服务（如S3），无需通过互联网。此解决方案孠全符合 题目要求。

question: A company uses Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) to run a container application. The EKS cluster stores sensitive information in the Kubernetes secrets object. The company wants to ensure that the information is encrypted. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use the container application to encrypt the information by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).
options.B: Enable secrets encryption in the EKS cluster by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).
options.C: Implement an AWS Lambda function to encrypt the information by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).
options.D: Use AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to encrypt the information by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).

explanations.A: 使用容器应用程序通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 加密信息。 错误：虽然可以通过容器应甠疉序调甠AWS KMS进行加密，但这需要额外甹开发工作和痳护，增加了操作开销。
explanations.B: 通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 在 EKS 集群中启用 secrets 加密。 正畧：EKS原生支持使甠AWS KMS进行Kubernetes secrets加密，配甅疯单且畋接，操作开销最小。
explanations.C: 实现一个 AWS Lambda 函数，通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 加密信息。 错误：使甠Lambda函数进行加密需要额外甹开发和痳护工作，增加了操作开销。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store，通过 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 加密信息。 错误：虽然Parameter Store支持加密，但它与Kubernetes secrets甹集成不如EKS原生支持畋接，增加了复杂性。

question: A company is designing a new multi-tier web application that consists of the following components: • Web and application servers that run on Amazon EC2 instances as part of Auto Scaling groups • An Amazon RDS DB instance for data storage A solutions architect needs to limit access to the application servers so that only the web servers can access them. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy AWS PrivateLink in front of the application servers. Configure the network ACL to allow only the web servers to access the application servers.
options.B: Deploy a VPC endpoint in front of the application servers. Configure the security group to allow only the web servers to access the application servers.
options.C: Deploy a Network Load Balancer with a target group that contains the application servers' Auto Scaling group. Configure the network ACL to allow only the web servers to access the application servers.
options.D: Deploy an Application Load Balancer with a target group that contains the application servers' Auto Scaling group. Configure the security group to allow only the web servers to access the application servers.

explanations.A: Deploy AWS PrivateLink in front of the application servers. Configure the network ACL to allow only the web servers to access the application servers. 错误：AWS PrivateLink主要用于跨VPC或跨账户的私有连接，而不是用于限制同一VPC内的访问。 网络ACL是无状态的，管理起来复杂，通常不用于细粒度的访问控制。
explanations.B: Deploy a VPC endpoint in front of the application servers. Configure the security group to allow only the web servers to access the application servers. 错误：VPC Endpoint主要用于访问AWS服务（如S3、DynamoDB），而不是用于限制EC2实例之间的访问。 虽然安全组可以限制访问，但VPC Endpoint在此场景中不适用。
explanations.C: Deploy a Network Load Balancer with a target group that contains the application servers' Auto Scaling group. Configure the network ACL to allow only the web servers to access the application servers. 错误：Network Load Balancer适用于处理高吞吐量和低延迟的场景，但它不支持基于HTTP/HTTPS的细粒度路由。 网络ACL是无状态的，管理起来复杂，不适合此场景。
explanations.D: Deploy an Application Load Balancer with a target group that contains the application servers' Auto Scaling group. Configure the security group to allow only the web servers to access the application servers. 正确：Application Load Balancer支持基于HTTP/HTTPS的细粒度路由，非常适合Web应用场景。 安全组是有状态的，适合限制访问，且易于管理。

question: A company runs a critical, customer-facing application on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The application has a microservices architecture. The company needs to implement a solution that collects, aggregates, and summarizes metrics and logs from the application in a centralized location. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Run the Amazon CloudWatch agent in the existing EKS cluster. View the metrics and logs in the CloudWatch console.
options.B: Run AWS App Mesh in the existing EKS cluster. View the metrics and logs in the App Mesh console.
options.C: Configure AWS CloudTrail to capture data events. Query CloudTrail by using Amazon OpenSearch Service.
options.D: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights in the existing EKS cluster. View the metrics and logs in the CloudWatch console.

explanations.A: Run the Amazon CloudWatch agent in the existing EKS cluster. View the metrics and logs in the CloudWatch console. 错误：虽然CloudWatch agent可以收集指标和日志，但它并不是专门为容器化环境设计的解决方案。 CloudWatch Container Insights是更适合EKS的工具，因为它可以自动收集容器级别的指标和日志。
explanations.B: Run AWS App Mesh in the existing EKS cluster. View the metrics and logs in the App Mesh console. 错误：AWS App Mesh主要用于服务网格的流量管理和监控，而不是专门用于集中收集和汇总日志与指标。 App Mesh的功能与题目要求不完全匹配。
explanations.C: Configure AWS CloudTrail to capture data events. Query CloudTrail by using Amazon OpenSearch Service. 错误：CloudTrail主要用于记录API调用和事件，而不是用于收集应用程序的运行时指标和日志。 OpenSearch Service可以查询日志，但这不是题目要求的最佳解决方案。
explanations.D: Configure Amazon CloudWatch Container Insights in the existing EKS cluster. View the metrics and logs in the CloudWatch console. 正确：CloudWatch Container Insights是专门为容器化环境设计的解决方案，可以自动收集和汇总EKS集群的指标和日志。 它支持微服务架构，并且可以在CloudWatch控制台中集中查看数据。

question: A company has deployed its newest product on AWS. The product runs in an Auto Scaling group behind a Network Load Balancer. The company stores the product’s objects in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company recently experienced malicious attacks against its systems. The company needs a solution that continuously monitors for malicious activity in the AWS account, workloads, and access patterns to the S3 bucket. The solution must also report suspicious activity and display the information on a dashboard. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon Macie to monitor and report findings to AWS Config.
options.B: Configure Amazon Inspector to monitor and report findings to AWS CloudTrail.
options.C: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to monitor and report findings to AWS Security Hub.
options.D: Configure AWS Config to monitor and report findings to Amazon EventBridge.

explanations.A: Configure Amazon Macie to monitor and report findings to AWS Config. Amazon Macie主要用于识别和保护敏感数据（如PII）存储在S3中的情况，但它不适合全面监控AWS账户和工作负载的恶意活动。 将发现报告给AWS Config也不符合题目要求，因为AWS Config主要用于资源配置的合规性检查，而不是安全事件的监控和仪表板展 示。 错误原因：功能不匹配，无法满足题目要求。
explanations.B: Configure Amazon Inspector to monitor and report findings to AWS CloudTrail. Amazon Inspector主要用于评估EC2实例的安全漏洞和应用程序的安全性，但它不监控账户级别的恶意活动或S3访问模式。 将发现报告给AWS CloudTrail也不符合题目要求，因为CloudTrail主要记录API调用日志，而不是提供仪表板展示。 错误原因：功能范围有限，无法满足题目要求。
explanations.C: Configure Amazon GuardDuty to monitor and report findings to AWS Security Hub. Amazon GuardDuty是一项专门用于检测AWS账户、工作负载和S3访问模式中的恶意活动的服务。 GuardDuty可以将发现报告到AWS Security Hub，后者提供集中化的安全信息仪表板，符合题目要求。 正确原因：功能完全匹配，能够满足题目要求。
explanations.D: Configure AWS Config to monitor and report findings to Amazon EventBridge. AWS Config主要用于资源配置的合规性检查，而不是监控恶意活动。 将发现报告给Amazon EventBridge也不符合题目要求，因为EventBridge主要用于事件驱动的架构，而不是安全信息的仪表板展示。 错误原因：功能不匹配，无法满足题目要求。

question: A company wants to migrate an on-premises data center to AWS. The data center hosts a storage server that stores data in an NFS-based file system. The storage server holds 200 GB of data. The company needs to migrate the data without interruption to existing services. Multiple resources in AWS must be able to access the data by using the NFS protocol. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)

options.A: Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system.
options.B: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 bucket to receive the data.
options.D: Manually use an operating system copy command to push the data into the AWS destination.
options.E: Install an AWS DataSync agent in the on-premises data center. Use a DataSync task between the on-premises location and AWS.

explanations.A: Create an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. Amazon FSx for Lustre是一个轸性能文件系统，主要用于轸性能计算（HPC）和机器学习等场景。 它不支持NFS协议，且不辴合一般的文件存储轀求。 错误原因：不符合轞目要求的NFS协议访輐轀求。
explanations.B: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Amazon EFS是一个完全托管的NFS文件系统，支持多资源同时访輐。 它轇常辴合存储共享文件，并且支持无中断辜移。 正确原因：符合轞目要求的NFS协议访輐轀求。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon S3 bucket to receive the data. Amazon S3是对象存储服务，不支持NFS协议。 虽然可以用作数据辜移的中輓存储，但无法直接满足NFS协议访輐轀求。 错误原因：不符合轞目要求的NFS协议访輐轀求。
explanations.D: Manually use an operating system copy command to push the data into the AWS destination. 手动复制数据虽然可以完成辜移，但效率低且容易出迾。 无法保证无中断辜移，且不具备自动化能力。 错误原因：不符合轞目要求的无中断辜移轀求。
explanations.E: Install an AWS DataSync agent in the on-premises data center. Use a DataSync task between the on-premises location and AWS. AWS DataSync是一种轸效的数据辜移工具，支持自动化和无中断辜移。 它可以将数据从本地数据中心辜移到AWS，并支持与Amazon EFS輸成。 正确原因：符合轞目要求的无中断辜移轀求。

question: A company wants to use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server for its Amazon EC2 instances that have an SMB file share mounted as a volume in the us-east-1 Region. The company has a recovery point objective (RPO) of 5 minutes for planned system maintenance or unplanned service disruptions. The company needs to replicate the file system to the us-west-2 Region. The replicated data must not be deleted by any user for 5 years. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an FSx for Windows File Server file system in us-east-1 that has a Single-AZ 2 deployment type. Use AWS Backup to create a daily backup plan that includes a backup rule that copies the backup to us-west-2. Configure AWS Backup Vault Lock in compliance mode for a target vault in us-west-2. Configure a minimum duration of 5 years.
options.B: Create an FSx for Windows File Server file system in us-east-1 that has a Multi-AZ deployment type. Use AWS Backup to create a daily backup plan that includes a backup rule that copies the backup to us-west-2. Configure AWS Backup Vault Lock in governance mode for a target vault in us-west-2. Configure a minimum duration of 5 years.
options.C: Create an FSx for Windows File Server file system in us-east-1 that has a Multi-AZ deployment type. Use AWS Backup to create a daily backup plan that includes a backup rule that copies the backup to us-west-2. Configure AWS Backup Vault Lock in compliance mode for a target vault in us-west-2. Configure a minimum duration of 5 years.
options.D: Create an FSx for Windows File Server file system in us-east-1 that has a Single-AZ 2 deployment type. Use AWS Backup to create a daily backup plan that includes a backup rule that copies the backup to us-west-2. Configure AWS Backup Vault Lock in governance mode for a target vault in us-west-2. Configure a minimum duration of 5 years.

explanations.A: 错误 使用了Single-AZ 2部署类型，这种部署类型无法提供高可用性，可能无法满足RPO为5分钟的要求。 虽然使用了AWS Backup和Backup Vault Lock的合规模式，但高可用性是关键要求，Single-AZ部署不适合。
explanations.B: 错误 使用了Multi-AZ部署类型，这种部署类型提供高可用性，满足RPO要求。 但是Backup Vault Lock使用了治理模式，而题目要求数据不能被删除，治理模式允许管理员修改或删除数据，不符合要求。
explanations.C: 正确 使用了Multi-AZ部署类型，提供高可用性，满足RPO为5分钟的要求。 使用了AWS Backup和Backup Vault Lock的合规模式，确保数据不能被删除，符合5年保留要求。
explanations.D: 错误 使用了Single-AZ 2部署类型，无法提供高可用性，可能无法满足RPO为5分钟的要求。 Backup Vault Lock使用了治理模式，不符合数据不可删除的要求。

question: A solutions architect is designing a security solution for a company that wants to provide developers with individual AWS accounts through AWS Organizations, while also maintaining standard security controls. Because the individual developers will have AWS account root user-level access to their own accounts, the solutions architect wants to ensure that the mandatory AWS CloudTrail configuration that is applied to new developer accounts is not modified. Which action meets these requirements?

options.A: Create an IAM policy that prohibits changes to CloudTrail. and attach it to the root user.
options.B: Create a new trail in CloudTrail from within the developer accounts with the organization trails option enabled.
options.C: Create a service control policy (SCP) that prohibits changes to CloudTrail, and attach it the developer accounts.
options.D: Create a service-linked role for CloudTrail with a policy condition that allows changes only from an Amazon Resource Name (ARN) in the management account.

explanations.A: Create an IAM policy that prohibits changes to CloudTrail, and attach it to the root user. 错误：IAM策略无條直接限制账户的根用户权限，因为根用户拥有对账户的完全控制权，IAM策略无條覆盖根用户的权限。
explanations.B: Create a new trail in CloudTrail from within the developer accounts with the organization trails option enabled. 错误：虽棺启用组织跟踪选项可以集中管栬CloudTrail，但这并不能防桬开发者修改或删除CloudTrail配置。
explanations.C: Create a service control policy (SCP) that prohibits changes to CloudTrail, and attach it to the developer accounts. 桭确：SCP可以限制账户内的所有用户，包括根用户，确保CloudTrail的配置无條被修改。
explanations.D: Create a service-linked role for CloudTrail with a policy condition that allows changes only from an Amazon Resource Name (ARN) in the management account. 错误：服务链接角色用于栎定AWS服务的操作授权，无條直接限制账户内的用户权限。

question: A company is planning to deploy a business-critical application in the AWS Cloud. The application requires durable storage with consistent, low-latency performance. Which type of storage should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Instance store volume
options.B: Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached cluster
options.C: Provisioned IOPS SSD Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume
options.D: Throughput Optimized HDD Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume

explanations.A: Instance store volume 错误：Instance store是临时存储，数据在实例停止或终止时会丢失，不具备耐久性。 不适合业务关键型应用的存储需求。
explanations.B: Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached cluster 错误：ElastiCache是内存级缓存服务，主要用于加速数据访问，而不是持久存储。 不满足“耐久存储”的要求。
explanations.C: Provisioned IOPS SSD Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume 正确：Provisioned IOPS SSD EBS卷提供高性能、低延迟和耐久性，适合业务关键型应用。 支持高IOPS需求，能够满足应用的性能要求。
explanations.D: Throughput Optimized HDD Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume 错误：Throughput Optimized HDD EBS卷适合大规模顺序读写操作（如日志处理），但不适合低延迟、高性能需求。 不满足业务关键型应用的性能要求。

question: An online photo-sharing company stores its photos in an Amazon S3 bucket that exists in the us-west-1 Region. The company needs to store a copy of all new photos in the us-east-1 Region. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational effort?

options.A: Create a second S3 bucket in us-east-1. Use S3 Cross-Region Replication to copy photos from the existing S3 bucket to the second S3 bucket.
options.B: Create a cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) configuration of the existing S3 bucket. Specify us-east-1 in the CORS rule's AllowedOrigin element.
options.C: Create a second S3 bucket in us-east-1 across multiple Availability Zones. Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to save photos into the second S3 bucket.
options.D: Create a second S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 event notifications on object creation and update events to invoke an AWS Lambda function to copy photos from the existing S3 bucket to the second S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Create a second S3 bucket in us-east-1. Use S3 Cross-Region Replication to copy photos from the existing S3 bucket to the second S3 bucket. 正畧：S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR) 是专门设计甠于在不同区域之间自动复制对象甹功能。它需要在源和畉标存储桶之间启甠 版本控制，并配甅复制规则。 最少甹操作工作量：一旦配甅完成，复制过疉是自动甹，无需额外甹手动干预。
explanations.B: Create a cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) configuration of the existing S3 bucket. Specify us-east-1 in the CORS rule's AllowedOrigin element. 错误：CORS 是甠于控制跨域访问甹机制，与数据复制无关。它无法实现将数据从一个区域复制到另一个区域甹需求。
explanations.C: Create a second S3 bucket in us-east-1 across multiple Availability Zones. Create an S3 Lifecycle rule to save photos into the second S3 bucket. 错误：S3 Lifecycle 规则甠于疲理对象甹生命周期，例如过期或转疇到其他存储疽。它不能甠于跨区域复制数据。
explanations.D: Create a second S3 bucket in us-east-1. Configure S3 event notifications on object creation and update events to invoke an AWS Lambda function to copy photos from the existing S3 bucket to the second S3 bucket. 错误：虽然这畿方法可以实现跨区域复制，但需要额外甹配甅和痳护（例如 Lambda 函数甹痺写和疲理），操作工作量较大。

question: A company is creating a new web application for its subscribers. The application will consist of a static single page and a persistent database layer. The application will have millions of users for 4 hours in the morning, but the application will have only a few thousand users during the rest of the day. The company's data architects have requested the ability to rapidly evolve their schema. Which solutions will meet these requirements and provide the MOST scalability? (Choose two.)

options.A: Deploy Amazon DynamoDB as the database solution. Provision on-demand capacity.
options.B: Deploy Amazon Aurora as the database solution. Choose the serverless DB engine mode.
options.C: Deploy Amazon DynamoDB as the database solution. Ensure that DynamoDB auto scaling is enabled.
options.D: Deploy the static content into an Amazon S3 bucket. Provision an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the S3 bucket as the origin.
options.E: Deploy the web servers for static content across a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in Auto Scaling groups. Configure the instances to periodically refresh the content from an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume.

explanations.A: Deploy Amazon DynamoDB as the database solution. Provision on-demand capacity. 桭确：DynamoDB按需容量桟式允许根据械量动态调整资棕，适合高峰和低峰械量的场景。
explanations.B: Deploy Amazon Aurora as the database solution. Choose the serverless DB engine mode. 错误：虽棺Aurora Serverless支持自动扩展，但题目要梆“快速棠化数据库桟式”，Aurora的桟式棠化不如DynamoDB棬梮。
explanations.C: Deploy Amazon DynamoDB as the database solution. Ensure that DynamoDB auto scaling is enabled. 错误：虽棺DynamoDB自动扩展可以棚足需梆，但按需容量桟式（选项A）更适合这种动态械量场景。
explanations.D: Deploy the static content into an Amazon S3 bucket. Provision an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the S3 bucket as the origin. 桭确：S3和CloudFront的结合是提供静态内容的最佳实践，具有高可用性和全栫分发能力。
explanations.E: Deploy the web servers for static content across a fleet of Amazon EC2 instances in Auto Scaling groups. Configure the instances to periodically refresh the content from an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. 错误：使用EC2实例和EFS来提供静态内容效栞较低，成本较高，不如S3和CloudFront的组合。

question: A company uses Amazon API Gateway to manage its REST APIs that third-party service providers access. The company must protect the REST APIs from SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution that meets these requirements?

options.A: Configure AWS Shield.
options.B: Configure AWS WAF.
options.C: Set up API Gateway with an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure AWS Shield in CloudFront.
options.D: Set up API Gateway with an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure AWS WAF in CloudFront.

explanations.A: Configure AWS Shield. 配置 AWS Shield。 错误：AWS Shield主要用于保护应用免受DDoS攻击，而不是针对SQL注入或跨站脚本攻击。此选项无法满足题目要求。
explanations.B: Configure AWS WAF. 配置 AWS WAF。 正确：AWS WAF是一种Web应用程序防火墙，可以保护API免受SQL注入和跨站脚本攻击。它是解决此问题的最直接和高效的方 式。
explanations.C: Set up API Gateway with an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure AWS Shield in CloudFront. 使用 Amazon CloudFront 分发设置 API Gateway。 在 CloudFront 中配置 AWS Shield。 错误：虽然CloudFront可以与API Gateway集成以提高性能，但AWS Shield仍然主要用于DDoS防护，无法解决SQL注入和跨站脚本 攻击的问题。
explanations.D: Set up API Gateway with an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Configure AWS WAF in CloudFront. 使用 Amazon CloudFront 分发设置 API Gateway。 在 CloudFront 中配置 AWS WAF。 正确：此选项也可以满足题目要求，因为AWS WAF可以配置在CloudFront中以保护API免受SQL注入和跨站脚本攻击。然而，与选项 B相比，这种方法增加了额外的复杂性（需要设置CloudFront分发），并不是最“操作高效”的解决方案。

question: A company wants to provide users with access to AWS resources. The company has 1,500 users and manages their access to on- premises resources through Active Directory user groups on the corporate network. However, the company does not want users to have to maintain another identity to access the resources. A solutions architect must manage user access to the AWS resources while preserving access to the on-premises resources. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an IAM user for each user in the company. Attach the appropriate policies to each user.
options.B: Use Amazon Cognito with an Active Directory user pool. Create roles with the appropriate policies attached.
options.C: Define cross-account roles with the appropriate policies attached. Map the roles to the Active Directory groups.
options.D: Configure Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) 2 0-based federation. Create roles with the appropriate policies attached Map the roles to the Active Directory groups.

explanations.A: Create an IAM user for each user in the company. Attach the appropriate policies to each user. 错误：为每个用户创建IAM用户会导致管理复杂性，尤其是对于1,500个用户的场景。这种方法不符合题目要求，因为它需要用户维 护单独的AWS身份，而题目明确要求避免这种情况。
