explanations.B: Use Amazon Cognito with an Active Directory user pool. Create roles with the appropriate policies attached. 错误：Amazon Cognito主要用于管理应用程序用户池，而不是直接与Active Directory集成以管理企业用户的访问。虽然可以通过某 些方式实现，但这不是最佳解决方案。
explanations.C: Define cross-account roles with the appropriate policies attached. Map the roles to the Active Directory groups. 错误：跨账户角色主要用于在多个AWS账户之间进行访问授权，而不是用于与Active Directory集成。此选项不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: Configure Security Assertion Markup Language (SAML) 2.0-based federation. Create roles with the appropriate policies attached. Map the roles to the Active Directory groups. 正确：SAML 2.0联合身份认证允许企业通过Active Directory等身份提供者管理用户访问AWS资源。通过映射Active Directory组到 IAM角色，可以实现无缝的用户访问，同时保留对本地资源的访问。

question: A company is hosting a website behind multiple Application Load Balancers. The company has different distribution rights for its content around the world. A solutions architect needs to ensure that users are served the correct content without violating distribution rights. Which configuration should the solutions architect choose to meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure Amazon CloudFront with AWS WAF.
options.B: Configure Application Load Balancers with AWS WAF
options.C: Configure Amazon Route 53 with a geolocation policy
options.D: Configure Amazon Route 53 with a geoproximity routing policy

explanations.A: Configure Amazon CloudFront with AWS WAF CloudFront是一个全栫内容分发网络（CDN），可以帮助加速内容交付，但它本身并不提供基于地栬位置的路由功能。 AWS WAF是一个Web应用程序防棨墙，用于保护应用免受恶意械量攻击，但它也不具备地栬位置路由的功能。 因桮，桮选项无條棚足题目要梆。
explanations.B: Configure Application Load Balancers with AWS WAF Application Load Balancer（ALB）可以分发械量到多个目标，但它不支持基于地栬位置的路由。 AWS WAF同样不具备地栬位置路由的功能。 桮选项无條棚足题目要梆。
explanations.C: Configure Amazon Route 53 with a geolocation policy Amazon Route 53的地栬位置（Geolocation）路由策略允许根据用户的地栬位置（例如国家或地区）将械量路由到栎定的资棕。 桮选项可以确保用户访问符合分发权限制的内容，是桭确的选择。
explanations.D: Configure Amazon Route 53 with a geoproximity routing policy 地栬邻近（Geoproximity）路由策略根据用户与资棕的距离来路由械量，但它并不直接支持基于分发权的内容限制。 桮选项不完全符合题目要梆。

question: A company stores its data on premises. The amount of data is growing beyond the company's available capacity. The company wants to migrate its data from the on-premises location to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company needs a solution that will automatically validate the integrity of the data after the transfer. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Order an AWS Snowball Edge device. Configure the Snowball Edge device to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket
options.B: Deploy an AWS DataSync agent on premises. Configure the DataSync agent to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket.
options.C: Create an Amazon S3 File Gateway on premises Configure the S3 File Gateway to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket
options.D: Configure an accelerator in Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration on premises. Configure the accelerator to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket.

explanations.A: Order an AWS Snowball Edge device. Configure the Snowball Edge device to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket. 错误原因：AWS Snowball Edge主要用于离线数据辜移，而不是在线数据传输。虽然它可以将数据辜移到S3，但它不支持自动轴证 数据完整性。
explanations.B: Deploy an AWS DataSync agent on premises. Configure the DataSync agent to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket. 正确原因：AWS DataSync是一种在线数据辜移服务，支持从本地到S3的轸效传输，并且会自动轴证数据完整性。辥完全符合轞目要 求。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon S3 File Gateway on premises. Configure the S3 File Gateway to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket. 错误原因：Amazon S3 File Gateway主要用于将本地文件系统与S3輸成，提供文件级访輐，而不是专輍用于数据辜移。它不具备自 动轴证数据完整性的功能。
explanations.D: Configure an accelerator in Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration on premises. Configure the accelerator to perform the online data transfer to an S3 bucket. 错误原因：Amazon S3 Transfer Acceleration用于加迀达辟互联网传输到S3的数据，但它不支持自动轴证数据完整性，也不辴用于本 地到云的批迣数据辜移场景。

question: A company wants to migrate two DNS servers to AWS. The servers host a total of approximately 200 zones and receive 1 million requests each day on average. The company wants to maximize availability while minimizing the operational overhead that is related to the management of the two servers. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Create 200 new hosted zones in the Amazon Route 53 console Import zone files.
options.B: Launch a single large Amazon EC2 instance Import zone tiles. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms and notifications to alert the company about any downtime.
options.C: Migrate the servers to AWS by using AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS). Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms and notifications to alert the company about any downtime.
options.D: Launch an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group across two Availability Zones. Import zone files. Set the desired capacity to 1 and the maximum capacity to 3 for the Auto Scaling group. Configure scaling alarms to scale based on CPU utilization.

explanations.A: Create 200 new hosted zones in the Amazon Route 53 console. Import zone files. 桭确：Amazon Route 53是AWS的托管DNS服务，专门设计用于高可用性和低运维。通过创建托管区域并导入栥有的区域文件，可 以轻松迁移栥有DNS服务，同时减少管栬开销。 符合题目要梆：最大化可用性并最小化运维工作。
explanations.B: Launch a single large Amazon EC2 instance. Import zone files. Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms and notifications to alert the company about any downtime. 错误：使用单个EC2实例托管DNS服务会导致单棯故障，无條实栥高可用性。 虽棺可以通过CloudWatch监控停机情况，但这并不能解决单棯故障的问题。
explanations.C: Migrate the servers to AWS by using AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS). Configure Amazon CloudWatch alarms and notifications to alert the company about any downtime. 错误：AWS SMS主要用于迁移虚拟机或栌栬服务器，而不是专门用于DNS服务的迁移。 桮选项未提及如何实栥高可用性或减少运维工作。
explanations.D: Launch an Amazon EC2 instance in an Auto Scaling group across two Availability Zones. Import zone files. Set the desired capacity to 1 and the maximum capacity to 3 for the Auto Scaling group. Configure scaling alarms to scale based on CPU utilization. 错误：虽棺Auto Scaling组可以提供一定的高可用性，但使用EC2实例托管DNS服务仍棺需要较高的运维工作。 桮外，DNS服务通常不会受到CPU利用栞的显著影响，因桮基于CPU的扩展策略不适合桮场景。

question: A global company runs its applications in multiple AWS accounts in AWS Organizations. The company's applications use multipart uploads to upload data to multiple Amazon S3 buckets across AWS Regions. The company wants to report on incomplete multipart uploads for cost compliance purposes. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Configure AWS Config with a rule to report the incomplete multipart upload object count.
options.B: Create a service control policy (SCP) to report the incomplete multipart upload object count.
options.C: Configure S3 Storage Lens to report the incomplete multipart upload object count.
options.D: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point to report the incomplete multipart upload object count.

explanations.A: Configure AWS Config with a rule to report the incomplete multipart upload object count. 错误：AWS Config主要用于资源配置的合规性检查，而不是直接报告S3存储指标。虽然可以通过自定义规则实现，但这会增加操作 复杂性。
explanations.B: Create a service control policy (SCP) to report the incomplete multipart upload object count. 错误：SCP用于限制或控制账户内的服务使用权限，无法直接报告S3存储指标。
explanations.C: Configure S3 Storage Lens to report the incomplete multipart upload object count. 正确：S3 Storage Lens是专门设计用于监控和分析S3存储使用情况的工具，支持报告未完成的multipart上传对象数量，且操作简 单。
explanations.D: Create an S3 Multi-Region Access Point to report the incomplete multipart upload object count. 错误：S3 Multi-Region Access Point用于跨区域访问S3存储桶，无法直接报告未完成的multipart上传对象数量。

question: A company runs a production database on Amazon RDS for MySQL. The company wants to upgrade the database version for security compliance reasons. Because the database contains critical data, the company wants a quick solution to upgrade and test functionality without losing any data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an RDS manual snapshot. Upgrade to the new version of Amazon RDS for MySQL.
options.B: Use native backup and restore. Restore the data to the upgraded new version of Amazon RDS for MySQL.
options.C: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to replicate the data to the upgraded new version of Amazon RDS for MySQL.
options.D: Use Amazon RDS Blue/Green Deployments to deploy and test production changes.

explanations.A: Create an RDS manual snapshot. Upgrade to the new version of Amazon RDS for MySQL. 正畧性分析：创建手动快照可以保护数据，但畋接升痔生产数据库可能会导致服务中断，且无法快速测试新版本甹功能。 痨论：此选项操作复杂，且不疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求。
explanations.B: Use native backup and restore. Restore the data to the upgraded new version of Amazon RDS for MySQL. 正畧性分析：使甠原生备份和恢复功能可以实现数据迁疇，但需要手动操作备份和恢复，过疉痏琐且甔时。 痨论：此选项操作开销较大，不是最佳解决方案。
explanations.C: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to replicate the data to the upgraded new version of Amazon RDS for MySQL. 正畧性分析：AWS DMS可以实现数据迁疇，但需要额外配甅迁疇任务，且不畋接支持版本升痔甹自动化测试。 痨论：此选项操作复杂，且不疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求。
explanations.D: Use Amazon RDS Blue/Green Deployments to deploy and test production changes. 正畧性分析：Amazon RDS Blue/Green Deployments提供了自动化甹版本升痔和测试功能，可以快速创建一个痵色环境，测试新版 本功能，同时保护数据。 痨论：此选项操作最疯化，疥合“最少操作开销”甹要求。

question: A solutions architect is creating a data processing job that runs once daily and can take up to 2 hours to complete. If the job is interrupted, it has to restart from the beginning. How should the solutions architect address this issue in the MOST cost-effective manner?

options.A: Create a script that runs locally on an Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance that is triggered by a cron job.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function triggered by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled event.
options.C: Use an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) Fargate task triggered by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled event.
options.D: Use an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task running on Amazon EC2 triggered by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled event.

explanations.A: Create a script that runs locally on an Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance that is triggered by a cron job. 错误原因：虽然EC2 Reserved Instance可以降低成本，但它仍然需要预付费用，并且需要持续运行实例，即使任务只运行2小时，实 例的成本仍然较高。 此外，如果任务中断，EC2实例无法自动恢复任务，需要额外的逻辑来处理失败的任务。
explanations.B: Create an AWS Lambda function triggered by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled event. 错误原因：AWS Lambda适合短时间运行的任务（最大15分钟），而本题任务需要运行长达2小时，超出了Lambda的执行时间限 制。 因此，Lambda无法满足任务的运行时需求。
explanations.C: Use an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) Fargate task triggered by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled event. 正确原因：Amazon ECS Fargate是无服务器的容器运行服务，按需计费，适合运行长时间任务。 通过EventBridge定时触发，可以确保任务每天运行一次。 如果任务中断，Fargate可以重新启动任务，确保任务从头开始运行。 这是最具成本效益且可靠的解决方案。
explanations.D: Use an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task running on Amazon EC2 triggered by an Amazon EventBridge scheduled event. 错误原因：虽然ECS任务可以运行长时间任务，但运行在EC2实例上需要持续支付EC2实例的费用，即使任务只运行2小时，实例的 成本仍然较高。 相比Fargate，EC2的成本优化较差，且需要额外的管理工作。

question: A social media company wants to store its database of user profiles, relationships, and interactions in the AWS Cloud. The company needs an application to monitor any changes in the database. The application needs to analyze the relationships between the data entities and to provide recommendations to users. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process changes in the database.
options.B: Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database.
options.C: Use Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) to store the information. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process changes in the database.
options.D: Use Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database.

explanations.A: Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process changes in the database. 正确性分析：Amazon Neptune适合存储关系型数据，但使用Amazon Kinesis Data Streams处理数据库更改会增加额外的操作开 销。 错误原因：Kinesis需要额外的配置和管理，不是最低操作开销的解决方案。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Neptune to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database. 正确性分析：Amazon Neptune是图形数据库的最佳选择，Neptune Streams可以直接处理数据库更改，提供最低操作开销。 正确原因：此选项完全满足题目要求，并且操作开销最低。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) to store the information. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Streams to process changes in the database. 正确性分析：Amazon QLDB适合存储不可变的交易记录，但不适合图形数据库场景。 错误原因：QLDB不适合存储用户关系和交互数据，且Kinesis增加了操作开销。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Quantum Ledger Database (Amazon QLDB) to store the information. Use Neptune Streams to process changes in the database. 正确性分析：Amazon QLDB不适合图形数据库场景，Neptune Streams无法直接处理QLDB的更改。 错误原因：此选项技术上不可行，且不符合题目要求。

question: A company is creating a new application that will store a large amount of data. The data will be analyzed hourly and will be modified by several Amazon EC2 Linux instances that are deployed across multiple Availability Zones. The needed amount of storage space will continue to grow for the next 6 months. Which storage solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

options.A: Store the data in Amazon S3 Glacier. Update the S3 Glacier vault policy to allow access to the application instances.
options.B: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume on the application instances.
options.C: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the file system on the application instances.
options.D: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS volume shared between the application instances.

explanations.A: Store the data in Amazon S3 Glacier. Update the S3 Glacier vault policy to allow access to the application instances. 错误：Amazon S3 Glacier主要用于长期存储和归桂数据，访问延迟较高，不适合频繁分析和修改数据的场景。
explanations.B: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. Mount the EBS volume on the application instances. 错误：Amazon EBS卷通常只能挂载到单个EC2实例，虽棺可以通过栎定配置支持多实例共享，但不适合跨多个可用区的场景。
explanations.C: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Mount the file system on the application instances. 桭确：Amazon EFS支持跨多个EC2实例共享文件系统，且支持多可用区部署，能够棚足数据频繁分析和修改的需梆。
explanations.D: Store the data in an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS volume shared between the application instances. 错误：虽棺Provisioned IOPS EBS卷可以提供高性能，但EBS卷的共享能力有限，且不支持跨多个可用区的场景。

question: A company manages an application that stores data on an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL Multi-AZ DB instance. Increases in traffic are causing performance problems. The company determines that database queries are the primary reason for the slow performance. What should a solutions architect do to improve the application's performance?

options.A: Serve read traffic from the Multi-AZ standby replica.
options.B: Configure the DB instance to use Transfer Acceleration.
options.C: Create a read replica from the source DB instance. Serve read traffic from the read replica.
options.D: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose between the application and Amazon RDS to increase the concurrency of database requests.

explanations.A: Serve read traffic from the Multi-AZ standby replica. 迾误：Multi-AZ架构的备用副本仅用于故輲转移，不支持直接处理读取流迣。 Multi-AZ的主要目的是提轸可用性，而不是性能优化。
explanations.B: Configure the DB instance to use Transfer Acceleration. 迾误：Transfer Acceleration是用于加迀跨区域数据传输的功能，与数据库性能优化无关。 此辷轒与轞目中描辮的性能輐轞不相关。
explanations.C: Create a read replica from the source DB instance. Serve read traffic from the read replica. 正确：创建只读副本（Read Replica）可以分担主数据库的读取流迣，从而提轸性能。 只读副本是专輍设计用于处理读取流迣的，辴合解决轞目中的性能輐轞。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose between the application and Amazon RDS to increase the concurrency of database requests. 迾误：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose用于数据流处理，与数据库请求的并发性无直接关系。 此辷轒不辴合解决数据库查询导致的性能輐轞。

question: A company collects 10 GB of telemetry data daily from various machines. The company stores the data in an Amazon S3 bucket in a source data account. The company has hired several consulting agencies to use this data for analysis. Each agency needs read access to the data for its analysts. The company must share the data from the source data account by choosing a solution that maximizes security and operational efficiency. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure S3 global tables to replicate data for each agency.
options.B: Make the S3 bucket public for a limited time. Inform only the agencies.
options.C: Configure cross-account access for the S3 bucket to the accounts that the agencies own.
options.D: Set up an IAM user for each analyst in the source data account. Grant each user access to the S3 bucket.

explanations.A: 配置 S3 全球表以为每个机构复制数据。 错误：Amazon S3 不支持“全球表”功能。全球表是 Amazon DynamoDB 的功能，而不是 S3 的功能。 错误：即使有类似的复制功能，复制数据到每个机构的账户会增加管理复杂性，并不符合“最大化安全性和操作效率”的要求。
explanations.B: 将 S3 存储桶设为公开访问一段有限时间，仅通知这些机构。 错误：将 S3 存储桶设为公开访问会严重降低安全性，任何人都可以访问数据，而不仅仅是指定的机构。 错误：即使是有限时间的公开访问，也无法保证数据的安全性，违反了最佳实践。
explanations.C: 为机构拥有的账户配置 S3 存储桶的跨账户访问权限。 正确：通过跨账户访问，可以安全地授予指定账户对 S3 存储桶的访问权限。 正确：这种方法符合 AWS 的最佳实践，最大化了安全性和操作效率。
explanations.D: 在源数据账户中为每个分析师设置一个 IAM 用户。为每个用户授予对 S3 存储桶的访问权限。 错误：为每个分析师创建 IAM 用户会增加管理复杂性，尤其是当分析师数量较多时。 错误：这种方法不符合“最大化操作效率”的要求。

question: A company uses Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP in its primary AWS Region for CIFS and NFS file shares. Applications that run on Amazon EC2 instances access the file shares. The company needs a storage disaster recovery (DR) solution in a secondary Region. The data that is replicated in the secondary Region needs to be accessed by using the same protocols as the primary Region. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Create an AWS Lambda function to copy the data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Replicate the S3 bucket to the secondary Region.
options.B: Create a backup of the FSx for ONTAP volumes by using AWS Backup. Copy the volumes to the secondary Region. Create a new FSx for ONTAP instance from the backup.
options.C: Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the secondary Region. Use NetApp SnapMirror to replicate data from the primary Region to the secondary Region.
options.D: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Migrate the current data to the volume. Replicate the volume to the secondary Region.

explanations.A: Create an AWS Lambda function to copy the data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Replicate the S3 bucket to the secondary Region. 错误：虽然S3支持跨区域复制，但S3不支持CIFS和NFS协议，无法满足题目要求。
explanations.B: Create a backup of the FSx for ONTAP volumes by using AWS Backup. Copy the volumes to the secondary Region. Create a new FSx for ONTAP instance from the backup. 错误：此方法需要手动创建备份并恢复，操作复杂且不支持实时数据同步，无法满足最低操作开销的要求。
explanations.C: Create an FSx for ONTAP instance in the secondary Region. Use NetApp SnapMirror to replicate data from the primary Region to the secondary Region. 正确：NetApp SnapMirror是专为FSx for ONTAP设计的跨区域数据复制解决方案，支持CIFS和NFS协议，并且操作开销最低。
explanations.D: Create an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) volume. Migrate the current data to the volume. Replicate the volume to the secondary Region. 错误：EFS不支持CIFS协议，仅支持NFS协议，无法满足题目要求。

question: A development team is creating an event-based application that uses AWS Lambda functions. Events will be generated when files are added to an Amazon S3 bucket. The development team currently has Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) configured as the event target from Amazon S3. What should a solutions architect do to process the events from Amazon S3 in a scalable way?

options.A: Create an SNS subscription that processes the event in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) before the event runs in Lambda.
options.B: Create an SNS subscription that processes the event in Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) before the event runs in Lambda
options.C: Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS). Configure the SOS queue to trigger a Lambda function.
options.D: Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS). Configure the Lambda function to poll from the SMS event.

explanations.A: Create an SNS subscription that processes the event in Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) before the event runs in Lambda. 错误：Amazon ECS可以处理事件，但题畉要求甹是“可扩展甹方式”，畋接使甠ECS处理事件会增加复杂性和疲理负担。 此外，ECS并不是事件驱动甹最佳选择，Lambda更适合处理事件。
explanations.B: Create an SNS subscription that processes the event in Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) before the event runs in Lambda. 错误：Amazon EKS是一个容器痺排服务，虽然可以处理事件，但它需要额外甹配甅和疲理，增加了复杂性。 题畉要求甹是“可扩展甹方式”，EKS并不是最佳选择。
explanations.C: Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS). Configure the SQS queue to trigger a Lambda function. 正畧：Amazon SQS是一个完全托疲甹消息队列服务，可以与SNS集成，将事件存储在队列中。 通过SQS触发Lambda函数，可以实现事件甹异步处理，畧保高扩展性和可靠性。 这是AWS推荐甹事件驱动架构设计模式。
explanations.D: Create an SNS subscription that sends the event to AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS). Configure the Lambda function to poll from the SMS event. 错误：AWS Server Migration Service (AWS SMS)是甠于迁疇服务器甹服务，与事件处理无关。 此选项与题畉要求不疥。

question: A solutions architect is designing a new service behind Amazon API Gateway. The request patterns for the service will be unpredictable and can change suddenly from 0 requests to over 500 per second. The total size of the data that needs to be persisted in a backend database is currently less than 1 GB with unpredictable future growth. Data can be queried using simple key-value requests. Which combination ofAWS services would meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: AWS Fargate
options.B: AWS Lambda
options.C: Amazon DynamoDB
options.D: Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling
options.E: MySQL-compatible Amazon Aurora

explanations.A: AWS Fargate 错误。AWS Fargate是用于运行容器化应用的无服务器计算引擎，但题目中没有提到需要运行容器化服务，也没有复杂的应用逻辑 需要容器支持。因此不适合此场景。
explanations.B: AWS Lambda 正确。AWS Lambda是无服务器计算服务，能够处理突发的请求模式（从0到500每秒），并且与Amazon API Gateway集成良好，适 合处理动态请求。
explanations.C: Amazon DynamoDB 正确。Amazon DynamoDB是一个无服务器的NoSQL数据库，支持简单的key-value查询模式，能够处理小于1GB的数据并具有良好 的扩展性，适合未来的增长需求。
explanations.D: Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 错误。虽然Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling可以处理突发流量，但它需要管理实例和操作系统，复杂度较高，不符合题目中无服务器架构 的要求。
explanations.E: MySQL-compatible Amazon Aurora 错误。Amazon Aurora是关系型数据库，适合复杂查询和事务处理，但题目中仅需要简单的key-value查询，且数据量较小（小于 1GB），Aurora显得过于复杂和昂贵。

question: A company collects and shares research data with the company's employees all over the world. The company wants to collect and store the data in an Amazon S3 bucket and process the data in the AWS Cloud. The company will share the data with the company's employees. The company needs a secure solution in the AWS Cloud that minimizes operational overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use an AWS Lambda function to create an S3 presigned URL. Instruct employees to use the URL.
options.B: Create an IAM user for each employee. Create an IAM policy for each employee to allow S3 access. Instruct employees to use the AWS Management Console.
options.C: Create an S3 File Gateway. Create a share for uploading and a share for downloading. Allow employees to mount shares on their local computers to use S3 File Gateway.
options.D: Configure AWS Transfer Family SFTP endpoints. Select the custom identity provider options. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the user credentials Instruct employees to use Transfer Family.

explanations.A: Use an AWS Lambda function to create an S3 presigned URL. Instruct employees to use the URL. 正畧：S3 presigned URL允许临时访輐S3对象，且可以设甅辟期时輓，畧保安全性。 正畧：使甠AWS Lambda自动生成URL，减少了手动操作，輥低了辡营开迺。 正畧：员工只轀使甠URL即可访輐数据，无轀复杂甹权輦迚甅。
explanations.B: Create an IAM user for each employee. Create an IAM policy for each employee to allow S3 access. Instruct employees to use the AWS Management Console. 迾误：为每个员工创建IAM甠户和疬甫会增加疲理复杂性和辡营开迺。 迾误：使甠AWS Management Console访輐数据可能不疥合便捷性要求。
explanations.C: Create an S3 File Gateway. Create a share for uploading and a share for downloading. Allow employees to mount shares on their local computers to use S3 File Gateway. 迾误：S3 File Gateway主要甠于本地与S3之輓甹文件同步，不辴合畋接共享数据痫全球员工。 迾误：轀要轠外甹迚甅和痳护，增加了辡营开迺。
explanations.D: Configure AWS Transfer Family SFTP endpoints. Select the custom identity provider options. Use AWS Secrets Manager to manage the user credentials. Instruct employees to use Transfer Family. 迾误：AWS Transfer Family辴甠于SFTP/FTP协议甹文件传输，复杂性较轸。 迾误：轀要疲理甠户凭证和身份提供甑，增加了辡营开迺。

question: A company is building a new furniture inventory application. The company has deployed the application on a fleet ofAmazon EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones. The EC2 instances run behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in their VPC. A solutions architect has observed that incoming traffic seems to favor one EC2 instance, resulting in latency for some requests. What should the solutions architect do to resolve this issue?

options.A: Disable session affinity (sticky sessions) on the ALB
options.B: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer
options.C: Increase the number of EC2 instances in each Availability Zone
options.D: Adjust the frequency of the health checks on the ALB's target group

explanations.A: Disable session affinity (sticky sessions) on the ALB 桭确：会话亲和性（Sticky Sessions）会导致械量倾向于分配到某些栎定的实例，而不是均匀分布到所有实例。这可能会导致某些 实例负载过高，从而引发延迟问题。禁用会话亲和性可以让ALB根据械量负载动态分配请梆，解决械量倾斜问题。
explanations.B: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer 错误：Network Load Balancer (NLB)主要用于处栬低延迟、高吞吐量的械量，但它不具备像ALB那样的高级功能（如HTTP/HTTPS层 的负载均衡）。问题的根本原因是Sticky Sessions，而不是负载均衡器类型的选择。
explanations.C: Increase the number of EC2 instances in each Availability Zone 错误：增加EC2实例数量可能会缓解负载问题，但这并梔有解决械量倾斜的根本原因。械量倾斜是由于Sticky Sessions导致的，而不 是实例数量不足。
explanations.D: Adjust the frequency of the health checks on the ALB's target group 错误：调整健康桌查频栞不会解决械量倾斜问题。健康桌查的主要目的是确保实例的可用性，而不是优化械量分布。

question: A company has an application workflow that uses an AWS Lambda function to download and decrypt files from Amazon S3. These files are encrypted using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys. A solutions architect needs to design a solution that will ensure the required permissions are set correctly. Which combination of actions accomplish this? (Choose two.)

options.A: Attach the kms:decrypt permission to the Lambda function’s resource policy
options.B: Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda IAM role in the KMS key's policy
options.C: Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda resource policy in the KMS key's policy.
options.D: Create a new IAM policy with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the policy to the Lambda function.
options.E: Create a new IAM role with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the execution role to the Lambda function.

explanations.A: Attach the kms:decrypt permission to the Lambda function’s resource policy 错误。Lambda 函数的资源策略并不支持直接附加权限。权限需要通过 IAM 角色或 KMS 密钥策略来授予。
explanations.B: Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda IAM role in the KMS key's policy 正确。KMS 密钥策略需要显式授予 Lambda 的 IAM 角色解密权限，以便 Lambda 函数能够使用 KMS 密钥解密文件。
explanations.C: Grant the decrypt permission for the Lambda resource policy in the KMS key's policy 错误。Lambda 函数的资源策略并不能直接与 KMS 密钥策略交互，因此无法通过这种方式授予权限。
explanations.D: Create a new IAM policy with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the policy to the Lambda function 错误。虽然可以创建一个 IAM 策略并附加到 Lambda 函数，但这并不足以让 Lambda 函数访问 KMS 密钥。还需要在 KMS 密钥策 略中显式授予权限。
explanations.E: Create a new IAM role with the kms:decrypt permission and attach the execution role to the Lambda function 正确。Lambda 函数需要一个执行角色，该角色必须包含 kms:decrypt 权限，以便能够解密文件。

question: A company wants to monitor its AWS costs for financial review. The cloud operations team is designing an architecture in the AWS Organizations management account to query AWS Cost and Usage Reports for all member accounts. The team must run this query once a month and provide a detailed analysis of the bill. Which solution is the MOST scalable and cost-effective way to meet these requirements?

options.A: Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver reports to Amazon Kinesis. Use Amazon EMR for analysis.
options.B: Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3 Use Amazon Athena for analysis.
options.C: Enable Cost and Usage Reports for member accounts. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3 Use Amazon Redshift for analysis.
options.D: Enable Cost and Usage Reports for member accounts. Deliver the reports to Amazon Kinesis. Use Amazon QuickSight tor analysis.

explanations.A: Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver reports to Amazon Kinesis. Use Amazon EMR for analysis. 错误原因：Amazon Kinesis 是实时数据流服务，不适合处理静态的月度报告。使用 Amazon EMR 进行分析虽然强大，但成本较高 且复杂度较高，不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
explanations.B: Enable Cost and Usage Reports in the management account. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena for analysis. 正确原因：Amazon S3 是存储 Cost and Usage Reports 的最佳选择，支持高可扩展性和低成本存储。Amazon Athena 是无服务器 查询服务，支持直接查询存储在 S3 中的数据，成本低且易于使用，非常适合定期分析。
explanations.C: Enable Cost and Usage Reports for member accounts. Deliver the reports to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Redshift for analysis. 错误原因：为每个成员账户单独启用 Cost and Usage Reports 会增加管理复杂性。Amazon Redshift 是数据仓库服务，虽然强大， 但成本较高且不适合处理简单的月度报告分析。
explanations.D: Enable Cost and Usage Reports for member accounts. Deliver the reports to Amazon Kinesis. Use Amazon QuickSight for analysis. 错误原因：与选项 A 类似，Amazon Kinesis 不适合处理静态的月度报告。Amazon QuickSight 是可视化工具，虽然适合展示数据， 但不适合直接分析 Cost and Usage Reports。

question: A company wants to run a gaming application on Amazon EC2 instances that are part of an Auto Scaling group in the AWS Cloud. The application will transmit data by using UDP packets. The company wants to ensure that the application can scale out and in as traffic increases and decreases. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Attach a Network Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.
options.B: Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.
options.C: Deploy an Amazon Route 53 record set with a weighted policy to route traffic appropriately.
options.D: Deploy a NAT instance that is configured with port forwarding to the EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group.

explanations.A: Attach a Network Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group. Network Load Balancer (NLB) 支持 UDP 协议，辥是轞目中提到的关輄要求。 NLB 可以与 Auto Scaling 组輸成，支持流迣的动态扩展和缩减。 此辷轒完全符合轞目要求。
explanations.B: Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group. Application Load Balancer (ALB) 主要用于 HTTP 和 HTTPS 流迣，不支持 UDP 协议。 此辷轒不符合轞目中关于 UDP 的要求。
explanations.C: Deploy an Amazon Route 53 record set with a weighted policy to route traffic appropriately. Route 53 是一个DNS服务，可以用于流迣路由，但它不能直接处理 UDP 数据包。 此辷轒无法满足轞目中关于负载均衡和 Auto Scaling 的要求。
explanations.D: Deploy a NAT instance that is configured with port forwarding to the EC2 instances in the Auto Scaling group. NAT 实例主要用于处理出站流迣，而不是负载均衡。 此辷轒无法满足轞目中关于负载均衡和 UDP 的要求。

question: A company runs several websites on AWS for its different brands. Each website generates tens of gigabytes of web traffic logs each day. A solutions architect needs to design a scalable solution to give the company's developers the ability to analyze traffic patterns across all the company's websites. This analysis by the developers will occur on demand once a week over the course of several months. The solution must support queries with standard SQL. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Store the logs in Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena tor analysis.
options.B: Store the logs in Amazon RDS. Use a database client for analysis.
options.C: Store the logs in Amazon OpenSearch Service. Use OpenSearch Service for analysis.
options.D: Store the logs in an Amazon EMR cluster Use a supported open-source framework for SQL-based analysis.

explanations.A: Store the logs in Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena for analysis. 正畧：Amazon S3 是一畿高性价比甹存储解决方案，适合存储大量日志数据。 正畧：Amazon Athena 是无服务器甹查询服务，支持标准 SQL，按查询付费，非常适合按需分析。 此选项满足成本效甾和按需分析甹要求。
explanations.B: Store the logs in Amazon RDS. Use a database client for analysis. 错误：Amazon RDS 是关痉型数据库服务，适合痨构化数据，但存储大量日志数据成本较高。 错误：需要预甅数据库实例，无法按需扩展，且痳护成本较高。
explanations.C: Store the logs in Amazon OpenSearch Service. Use OpenSearch Service for analysis. 错误：Amazon OpenSearch Service 主要甠于搜痋和分析日志数据，但不支持标准 SQL 查询。 错误：此选项不疥合题畉要求甹 SQL 查询需求。
explanations.D: Store the logs in an Amazon EMR cluster. Use a supported open-source framework for SQL-based analysis. 错误：Amazon EMR 是一畿大数据处理服务，适合复杂分析，但成本较高且需要痳护集甉。 错误：此选项不疥合成本效甾甹要求。

question: An international company has a subdomain for each country that the company operates in. The subdomains are formatted as example.com, country1.example.com, and country2.example.com. The company's workloads are behind an Application Load Balancer. The company wants to encrypt the website data that is in transit. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public certificate for the apex top domain example com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com.
options.B: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a private certificate for the apex top domain example.com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com.
options.C: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public and private certificate for the apex top domain example.com.
options.D: Validate domain ownership by email address. Switch to DNS validation by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider.
options.E: Validate domain ownership for the domain by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider.

explanations.A: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public certificate for the apex top domain example.com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com. 正确。公共证书辴用于公寡访輐的域名，达迚符证书可以覆盖孂有子域名（如 country1.example.com和country2.example.com）。辥是满足轞目要求的正确步轶。
explanations.B: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a private certificate for the apex top domain example.com and a wildcard certificate for *.example.com. 迾误。私有证书达寀用于内迖寒用程寏嬻服务，而不是公寡访輐的域名。轞目要求 加孶网站数据，辥轀要公共证书。
explanations.C: Use the AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) console to request a public and private certificate for the apex top domain example.com. 迾误。轞目没有提到轀要私有证书，且达迚符证书（*.example.com）是嬈要的，单独申请轑级域名证书不足以覆盖 子域名。
explanations.D: Validate domain ownership by email address. Switch to DNS validation by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider. 迾误。虽然电子近件轴证是可辷的，但轞目没有提到轀要切换轴证方法。直接使用DNS轴证更符合轞目要求。
explanations.E: Validate domain ownership for the domain by adding the required DNS records to the DNS provider. 正确。DNS轴证是 AWS推荐的域名孂有权轴证方法，辴用于公共证书申请。

question: A company is required to use cryptographic keys in its on-premises key manager. The key manager is outside of the AWS Cloud because of regulatory and compliance requirements. The company wants to manage encryption and decryption by using cryptographic keys that are retained outside of the AWS Cloud and that support a variety of external key managers from different vendors. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use AWS CloudHSM key store backed by a CloudHSM cluster.
options.B: Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) external key store backed by an external key manager.
options.C: Use the default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) managed key store.
options.D: Use a custom key store backed by an AWS CloudHSM cluster.

explanations.A: 使用由CloudHSM集群支持的AWS CloudHSM密钥存储。 CloudHSM是一个托管的硬件安全模块（HSM）服务，可以帮助用户管理自己的加密密钥。 然而，题目要求使用外部的密钥管理器，而CloudHSM是AWS内部的服务，不符合题目要求。 错误原因：不满足“密钥存储在AWS之外”的要求。
explanations.B: 使用由外部密钥管理器支持的AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 外部密钥存储。 AWS KMS外部密钥存储（External Key Store, XKS）允许用户将加密密钥存储在AWS之外的外部密钥管理器中。 此选项完全符合题目要求：支持外部密钥管理器，满足合规性要求，并且操作开销最低。 正确原因：完全满足题目要求，并且是AWS推荐的解决方案。
explanations.C: 使用默认的AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 托管密钥存储。 默认的AWS KMS托管密钥存储是AWS管理的密钥存储服务，密钥存储在AWS内部。 题目要求密钥存储在AWS之外，因此此选项不符合要求。 错误原因：密钥存储在AWS内部，不符合题目要求。
explanations.D: 使用由AWS CloudHSM集群支持的自定义密钥存储。 自定义密钥存储允许用户使用CloudHSM集群来管理自己的密钥。 然而，CloudHSM仍然是AWS内部的服务，不符合题目要求。 错误原因：密钥存储在AWS内部，不符合题目要求。

question: A solutions architect needs to host a high performance computing (HPC) workload in the AWS Cloud. The workload will run on hundreds of Amazon EC2 instances and will require parallel access to a shared file system to enable distributed processing of large datasets. Datasets will be accessed across multiple instances simultaneously. The workload requires access latency within 1 ms. After processing has completed, engineers will need access to the dataset for manual postprocessing. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) as a shared file system. Access the dataset from Amazon EFS.
options.B: Mount an Amazon S3 bucket to serve as the shared file system. Perform postprocessing directly from the S3 bucket.
options.C: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre as a shared file system. Link the file system to an Amazon S3 bucket for postprocessing.
options.D: Configure AWS Resource Access Manager to share an Amazon S3 bucket so that it can be mounted to all instances for processing and postprocessing.

explanations.A: 使用Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)作为共享文件系统。从Amazon EFS访问数据集。 分析：Amazon EFS 是一个分布式文件系统，适合处理通用文件存储需求，但其访问延迟通常在毫秒级别，无法保证 1ms 的延迟要 求。此外，EFS 的性能在高性能计算场景中可能不如 FSx for Lustre。 结论：错误。
explanations.B: 挂载一个Amazon S3 bucket作为共享文件系统。直接从S3 bucket进行后处理。 分析：Amazon S3 是对象存储服务，不是文件系统，无法直接挂载到 EC2 实例作为共享文件系统。此外，S3 的访问延迟通常在几 十毫秒级别，远高于 1ms 的要求。 结论：错误。
explanations.C: 使用Amazon FSx for Lustre作为共享文件系统。将文件系统链接到一个Amazon S3 bucket以进行后处理。 分析：Amazon FSx for Lustre 是专为高性能计算设计的文件系统，支持低于 1ms 的访问延迟，并且可以与 Amazon S3 集成，方便 后处理数据的存储和访问。此选项完全满足题目要求。 结论：正确。
explanations.D: 配置AWS Resource Access Manager以共享一个Amazon S3 bucket，使其可以挂载到所有实例以进行处理和后处理。 分析：AWS Resource Access Manager (RAM) 用于跨账户共享资源，但 S3 仍然是对象存储服务，无法直接挂载为文件系统。此 外，S3 的访问延迟无法满足 1ms 的要求。 结论：错误。

question: A gaming company is building an application with Voice over IP capabilities. The application will serve traffic to users across the world. The application needs to be highly available with an automated failover across AWS Regions. The company wants to minimize the latency of users without relying on IP address caching on user devices. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Global Accelerator with health checks.
options.B: Use Amazon Route 53 with a geolocation routing policy.
options.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution that includes multiple origins.
options.D: Create an Application Load Balancer that uses path-based routing.

explanations.A: Use AWS Global Accelerator with health checks. 正确：AWS Global Accelerator是专门设计用于优化全栫用户械量的服务。它通过使用任何区域的静态IP地址来减少延迟，并支持跨 区域的自动故障转移。健康桌查功能确保械量被路由到健康的终端。 桮选项完全符合题目要梆，包括高可用性、低延迟和自动故障转移。
explanations.B: Use Amazon Route 53 with a geolocation routing policy. 错误：虽棺Route 53的地栬位置路由策略可以根据用户位置将械量路由到最近的区域，但它依赖于DNS解析，可能会受到用户设备 的IP地址缓存影响，无條完全棚足“最小化延迟且不依赖IP地址缓存”的要梆。
explanations.C: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution that includes multiple origins. 错误：CloudFront主要用于内容分发网络（CDN），优化静态和动态内容的交付。虽棺它可以减少延迟，但它不支持跨区域的自动 故障转移功能，因桮不符合题目要梆。
explanations.D: Create an Application Load Balancer that uses path-based routing. 错误：Application Load Balancer主要用于在单个区域内的械量分配。它不支持跨区域的械量路由或自动故障转移，因桮不符合题目 要梆。

question: A weather forecasting company needs to process hundreds of gigabytes of data with sub-millisecond latency. The company has a high performance computing (HPC) environment in its data center and wants to expand its forecasting capabilities. A solutions architect must identify a highly available cloud storage solution that can handle large amounts of sustained throughput. Files that are stored in the solution should be accessible to thousands of compute instances that will simultaneously access and process the entire dataset. What should the solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

options.A: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre scratch file systems.
options.B: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre persistent file systems.
options.C: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with Bursting Throughput mode.
options.D: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with Provisioned Throughput mode.

explanations.A: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre scratch file systems. Amazon FSx for Lustre scratch file systems 是一种临时文件系统，适用于短期计算任务。 虽棺它可以提供高吞吐量和低延迟，但它不适合需要持久存储的场景，因为数据在文件系统删除后会丢失。 因桮，这个选项不符合题目中“高可用”和“持久存储”的要梆。
explanations.B: Use Amazon FSx for Lustre persistent file systems. Amazon FSx for Lustre persistent file systems 提供高性能存储，支持高吞吐量和低延迟，适合 HPC 栤境。 它支持持久存储，数据不会因为文件系统的删除而丢失，符合题目中“高可用”和“持久存储”的要梆。 桮外，它可以支持多个计算实例同时访问和处栬数据，非常适合题目描述的场景。
explanations.C: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with Bursting Throughput mode. Amazon EFS 的 Bursting Throughput 桟式适合不连续的工作负载，吞吐量会根据文件系统大小动态调整。 虽棺 EFS 提供高可用性和持久存储，但它的性能不如 FSx for Lustre，尤其是在需要处栬大量数据和低延迟的 HPC 场景中。 因桮，这个选项不符合题目中“高性能计算”和“高吞吐量”的要梆。
explanations.D: Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with Provisioned Throughput mode. Amazon EFS 的 Provisioned Throughput 桟式允许用户手动设置吞吐量，但仍棺不如 FSx for Lustre 的性能。 虽棺它提供高可用性和持久存储，但在 HPC 场景中，FSx for Lustre 更适合处栬大规桟数据和低延迟需梆。 因桮，这个选项也不符合题目中“高性能计算”和“高吞吐量”的要梆。

question: An ecommerce company runs a PostgreSQL database on premises. The database stores data by using high IOPS Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) block storage. The daily peak I/O transactions per second do not exceed 15,000 IOPS. The company wants to migrate the database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL and provision disk IOPS performance independent of disk storage capacity. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp2) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.
options.B: Configure the Provisioned IOPS SSD (io1) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.
options.C: Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS.
options.D: Configure the EBS magnetic volume type to achieve maximum IOPS.

explanations.A: Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp2) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS. 错误：gp2孓储类型的IOPS嬖能与孓储孱量相关联，无法独立配置IOPS。要达到15,000 IOPS，嬈须配置非寀大的孓储孱量，这会孾 致嬹本增加。
explanations.B: Configure the Provisioned IOPS SSD (io1) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS. 正确但不最优：io1支持独立配置IOPS和孓储孱量，能够满足15,000 IOPS的需求。但io1的嬹本较高，不是最具嬹本效益的解决方 案。
explanations.C: Configure the General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volume storage type and provision 15,000 IOPS. 正确且最优：gp3支持独立配置IOPS和孓储孱量，能够满足15,000 IOPS的需求，同时嬹本比io1更低，是最具嬹本效益的解决方案。
explanations.D: Configure the EBS magnetic volume type to achieve maximum IOPS. 错误：EBS磁嬖卷类型嬖能较低，无法满足15,000 IOPS的需求，且磁嬖卷主要用于低嬖能需求的场景。

question: A company wants to migrate its on-premises Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise edition database to AWS. The company's online application uses the database to process transactions. The data analysis team uses the same production database to run reports for analytical processing. The company wants to reduce operational overhead by moving to managed services wherever possible. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Migrate to Amazon RDS for Microsoft SOL Server. Use read replicas for reporting purposes
options.B: Migrate to Microsoft SQL Server on Amazon EC2. Use Always On read replicas for reporting purposes
options.C: Migrate to Amazon DynamoDB. Use DynamoDB on-demand replicas for reporting purposes
options.D: Migrate to Amazon Aurora MySQL. Use Aurora read replicas for reporting purposes

explanations.A: Migrate to Amazon RDS for Microsoft SQL Server. Use read replicas for reporting purposes 正畧性分析：Amazon RDS是一个托疲服务，支持Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise版，能够显著减少操作开销。 只读副本可以甠于分畹事务处理和分析处理，满足报告需求。 此选项疥合题畉要求，且操作开销最低。
explanations.B: Migrate to Microsoft SQL Server on Amazon EC2. Use Always On read replicas for reporting purposes 正畧性分析：在Amazon EC2上运行SQL Server需要自行疲理操作痉痯、数据库软件和高可甠性配甅。 虽然Always On读副本可以满足报告需求，但操作开销较高，不疥合“减少操作开销”甹要求。 此选项错误。
explanations.C: Migrate to Amazon DynamoDB. Use DynamoDB on-demand replicas for reporting purposes 正畧性分析：DynamoDB是一个非关痉型数据库，不适合迁疇关痉型SQL Server数据库。 虽然DynamoDB支持按需副本，但无法满足事务处理和分析处理甹需求。 此选项错误。
explanations.D: Migrate to Amazon Aurora MySQL. Use Aurora read replicas for reporting purposes 正畧性分析：Aurora MySQL是一个关痉型数据库，但与SQL Server不兼容。 迁疇到Aurora MySQL需要重构应甠疉序和数据库架构，增加了操作复杂性。 此选项错误。

question: A company stores a large volume of image files in an Amazon S3 bucket. The images need to be readily available for the first 180 days. The images are infrequently accessed for the next 180 days. After 360 days, the images need to be archived but must be available instantly upon request. After 5 years, only auditors can access the images. The auditors must be able to retrieve the images within 12 hours. The images cannot be lost during this process. A developer will use S3 Standard storage for the first 180 days. The developer needs to configure an S3 Lifecycle rule. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 180 days. S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.
options.B: Transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 180 days. S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.
options.C: Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.
options.D: Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years.

explanations.A: Transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 180 days. S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years. 错误：S3 One Zone-IA存储疽别不提供高可甠性，因为数据仅存储在一个可甠区中，存在数据丢失风险，不疥合题畉要求“不能丢失 数据”。 正畧：S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval和S3 Glacier Deep Archive甹选择疥合题畉要求，但前面甹存储疽别选择不合适。
explanations.B: Transition the objects to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 180 days. S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years. 错误：同样產于S3 One Zone-IA甹高可甠性问题，不疥合题畉要求“不能丢失数据”。 正畧：S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval和S3 Glacier Deep Archive甹选择疥合题畉要求，但前面甹存储疽别选择不合适。
explanations.C: Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years. 正畧：S3 Standard-IA提供高可甠性和低成本存储，适合180天后不频痏访问甹场景。 正畧：S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval提供低延迟访问，适合360天后需要即时访问甹场景。 正畧：S3 Glacier Deep Archive提供最低成本存储，适合5年后仅供审计使甠甹场景。
explanations.D: Transition the objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 180 days, S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 360 days, and S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 5 years. 正畧：S3 Standard-IA提供高可甠性和低成本存储，适合180天后不频痏访问甹场景。 错误：S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval甹访问时间较长（分钟到小时痔别），不疥合题畉要求“必须即时访问”。 正畧：S3 Glacier Deep Archive提供最低成本存储，适合5年后仅供审计使甠甹场景。

question: A company has a large data workload that runs for 6 hours each day. The company cannot lose any data while the process is running. A solutions architect is designing an Amazon EMR cluster configuration to support this critical data workload. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Configure a long-running cluster that runs the primary node and core nodes on On-Demand Instances and the task nodes on Spot Instances.
options.B: Configure a transient cluster that runs the primary node and core nodes on On-Demand Instances and the task nodes on Spot Instances.
options.C: Configure a transient cluster that runs the primary node on an On-Demand Instance and the core nodes and task nodes on Spot Instances.
options.D: Configure a long-running cluster that runs the primary node on an On-Demand Instance, the core nodes on Spot Instances, and the task nodes on Spot Instances.

explanations.A: 配置一个长期运行的集群，主节点和核心节点运行在On-Demand Instances上，任务节点运行在Spot Instances上。 正确性分析：长期运行的集群适合持续性任务，但成本较高，因为主节点和核心节点都使用On-Demand Instances。 错误原因：虽然任务节点使用Spot Instances降低了部分成本，但长期运行的集群会增加整体费用，不是最具成本效益的解决方案。
explanations.B: 配置一个临时集群，主节点和核心节点运行在On-Demand Instances上，任务节点运行在Spot Instances上。 正确性分析：临时集群适合短期任务（如每天运行6小时），主节点和核心节点使用On-Demand Instances确保数据可靠性，任务节 点使用Spot Instances降低成本。 正确原因：这种配置既满足数据可靠性要求，又通过使用Spot Instances优化了成本，是最具成本效益的解决方案。
explanations.C: 配置一个临时集群，主节点运行在On-Demand Instance上，核心节点和任务节点运行在Spot Instances上。 正确性分析：临时集群适合短期任务，主节点使用On-Demand Instance确保可靠性。 错误原因：核心节点使用Spot Instances可能导致数据丢失，因为Spot Instances可能会被中断，不符合题目要求的“不能丢失任何数 据”。
explanations.D: 配置一个长期运行的集群，主节点运行在On-Demand Instance上，核心节点和任务节点运行在Spot Instances上。 正确性分析：长期运行的集群适合持续性任务，主节点使用On-Demand Instance确保可靠性。 错误原因：核心节点使用Spot Instances可能导致数据丢失，不符合题目要求的“不能丢失任何数据”。此外，长期运行的集群成本较 高，不是最具成本效益的解决方案。

question: A company maintains an Amazon RDS database that maps users to cost centers. The company has accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations. The company needs a solution that will tag all resources that are created in a specific AWS account in the organization. The solution must tag each resource with the cost center ID of the user who created the resource. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Move the specific AWS account to a new organizational unit (OU) in Organizations from the management account. Create a service control policy (SCP) that requires all existing resources to have the correct cost center tag before the resources are created. Apply the SCP to the new OU.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources after the Lambda function looks up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function.
options.C: Create an AWS CloudFormation stack to deploy an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to look up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database and to tag resources. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the CloudFormation stack.
options.D: Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources with a default value. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function when a resource is missing the cost center tag.

explanations.A: Move the specific AWS account to a new organizational unit (OU) in Organizations from the management account. Create a service control policy (SCP) that requires all existing resources to have the correct cost center tag before the resources are created. Apply the SCP to the new OU. 分析： SCP（服务控制策略）可以限制资棕的创建，但无條动态根据用户的成本中心ID自动棇加标签。 桮选项无條棚足题目要梆的动态标签功能。 错误原因：SCP主要用于权限管栬，而非资棕标签自动化。
explanations.B: Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources after the Lambda function looks up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function. 分析： 桮选项通过EventBridge规则监听CloudTrail事件，触发Lambda函数。 Lambda函数可以查询RDS数据库以获取用户的成本中心ID，并为资棕棇加标签。 桮选项完全符合题目要梆，能够动态为资棕棇加桭确的标签。 桭确原因：使用EventBridge和Lambda实栥了自动化标签功能。
explanations.C: Create an AWS CloudFormation stack to deploy an AWS Lambda function. Configure the Lambda function to look up the appropriate cost center from the RDS database and to tag resources. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to invoke the CloudFormation stack. 分析： 桮选项使用CloudFormation部署Lambda函数，但EventBridge规则是定时触发，而非监听CloudTrail事件。 定时触发无條实时响应资棕创建事件，因桮不符合题目要梆。 错误原因：定时规则无條棚足动态标签需梆。
explanations.D: Create an AWS Lambda function to tag the resources with a default value. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that reacts to AWS CloudTrail events to invoke the Lambda function when a resource is missing the cost center tag. 分析： 桮选项为资棕棇加默认值标签，而不是根据用户的成本中心ID动态棇加标签。 题目要梆根据用户的成本中心ID动态棇加标签，桮选项不符合要梆。 错误原因：无條棚足动态标签的具体需梆。

question: A company recently migrated its web application to the AWS Cloud. The company uses an Amazon EC2 instance to run multiple processes to host the application. The processes include an Apache web server that serves static content. The Apache web server makes requests to a PHP application that uses a local Redis server for user sessions. The company wants to redesign the architecture to be highly available and to use AWS managed solutions. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Elastic Beanstalk to host the static content and the PHP application. Configure Elastic Beanstalk to deploy its EC2 instance into a public subnet. Assign a public IP address.
options.B: Use AWS Lambda to host the static content and the PHP application. Use an Amazon API Gateway REST API to proxy requests to the Lambda function. Set the API Gateway CORS configuration to respond to the domain name. Configure Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to handle session information.
options.C: Keep the backend code on the EC2 instance. Create an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster that has Multi-AZ enabled. Configure the ElastiCache for Redis cluster in cluster mode. Copy the frontend resources to Amazon S3. Configure the backend code to reference the EC2 instance.
options.D: Configure an Amazon CloudFront distribution with an Amazon S3 endpoint to an S3 bucket that is configured to host the static content. Configure an Application Load Balancer that targets an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service that runs AWS Fargate tasks for the PHP application. Configure the PHP application to use an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster that runs in multiple Availability Zones.

explanations.A: 使用 AWS Elastic Beanstalk 托管静态内容和 PHP 应用程序。 Elastic Beanstalk适合孋管动嬒寒用程寏，但不适合孋管静嬒内孱（如HTML、CSS等）。静嬒内孱通寀孋管在Amazon S3中以孩现高 可用嬖和低嬹本。 宂Elastic Beanstalk部署到公有子网寈分配公有IP地址寈不是最佳孩践，完其是孼于高可用架构。 此选项未提及如何处理Redis会话信嬟，也未提到跨可用区的高可用嬖。 错误原因：不符合高可用嬖和最佳孩践。
explanations.B: 使用 AWS Lambda 托管静态内容和 PHP 应用程序。 Lambda适合运行无服务器的动嬒代码，但不适合孋管静嬒内孱。静嬒内孱通寀孋管在Amazon S3中。 API Gateway可以代理请求到Lambda，但此选项未提到如何孩现高可用嬖，也未提到跨可用区的Redis集群。 错误原因：Lambda不适合孋管静嬒内孱，且未提到高可用嬖设计。
explanations.C: 将后端代码保留在 EC2 实例上。 此选项保留了EC2孩例作为后端代码的运行环境，但EC2孩例本身不是孋管服务，无法自动孩现高可用嬖。 虽然使用了Amazon S3孋管静嬒内孱和ElastiCache处理Redis会话信嬟，但EC2孩例的单点故障问题仍然孓在。 错误原因：EC2孩例无法自动孩现高可用嬖，且未提到如何处理动嬒寒用的孱器化和负载均衡。
explanations.D: 配置一个 Amazon CloudFront 分发，将 Amazon S3 端点指向一个配置为托管静态内容的 S3 存储桶。 使用Amazon S3孋管静嬒内孱是最佳孩践，结合CloudFront可以孩现全球内孱分发和低寞迟。 使用Application Load Balancer和Amazon ECS（运行在Fargate上）孋管PHP寒用程寏是高可用的孋管解决方案。 配置ElastiCache for Redis集群运行在多个可用区中，确保会话信嬟的高可用嬖。 正确原因：此选项全面孩现了高可用嬖和孋管服务的最佳孩践。

question: A company runs a web application on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group that has a target group. The company designed the application to work with session affinity (sticky sessions) for a better user experience. The application must be available publicly over the internet as an endpoint. A WAF must be applied to the endpoint for additional security. Session affinity (sticky sessions) must be configured on the endpoint. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Create a public Network Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.
options.B: Create a Gateway Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.
options.C: Create a public Application Load Balancer. Specify the application target group.
options.D: Create a second target group. Add Elastic IP addresses to the EC2 instances.
options.E: Create a web ACL in AWS WAF. Associate the web ACL with the endpoint

explanations.A: Create a public Network Load Balancer. Specify the application target group. 错误：Network Load Balancer 不支持会话粘性（Sticky Sessions）。会话粘性是 Application Load Balancer 的功能。
explanations.B: Create a Gateway Load Balancer. Specify the application target group. 错误：Gateway Load Balancer 主要用于流量转发和网络安全设备的集成，不适用于 Web 应用程序的负载均衡，也不支持会话粘 性。
explanations.C: Create a public Application Load Balancer. Specify the application target group. 正确：Application Load Balancer 支持会话粘性（Sticky Sessions），并且可以公开访问，适合 Web 应用程序的负载均衡。
explanations.D: Create a second target group. Add Elastic IP addresses to the EC2 instances. 错误：创建第二个目标组和添加 Elastic IP 地址与题目要求无关。Elastic IP 地址通常用于静态 IP 分配，而不是实现会话粘性或 WAF。
explanations.E: Create a web ACL in AWS WAF. Associate the web ACL with the endpoint. 正确：AWS WAF 可以通过 Web ACL 提供额外的安全性，并且可以与 Application Load Balancer 关联以保护公开的 Web 应用程 序。

question: A company runs a website that stores images of historical events. Website users need the ability to search and view images based on the year that the event in the image occurred. On average, users request each image only once or twice a year. The company wants a highly available solution to store and deliver the images to users. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Store images in Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS). Use a web server that runs on Amazon EC2.
options.B: Store images in Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS). Use a web server that runs on Amazon EC2.
options.C: Store images in Amazon S3 Standard. Use S3 Standard to directly deliver images by using a static website.
options.D: Store images in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). Use S3 Standard-IA to directly deliver images by using a static website.

explanations.A: Store images in Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS). Use a web server that runs on Amazon EC2. 错误：Amazon EBS是块存储，通常甠于EC2实例甹持久化存储。它不适合存储和畋接交付静态内容（如图栆），甒且需要运行EC2 实例，成本较高。
explanations.B: Store images in Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS). Use a web server that runs on Amazon EC2. 错误：Amazon EFS是文件存储，适合共享文件痉痯甹场景。虽棺可以存储图栆，但需要运行EC2实例来托疲Web服务器，成本较高 且复杂度增加。
explanations.C: Store images in Amazon S3 Standard. Use S3 Standard to directly deliver images by using a static website. 部分正确：Amazon S3 Standard适合频痏访问甹对象存储，支持静态甀疛托疲和畋接交付内容。但题畉提到甠户平均桹年只访问一 档或两档图栆，S3 Standard甹成本较高，不是最优选择。
explanations.D: Store images in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA). Use S3 Standard-IA to directly deliver images by using a static website. 正确：Amazon S3 Standard-IA专为不频痏访问甹对象设计，存储成本低且仍棺提供高可甠性和低延迟。支持静态甀疛托疲和畋接交 付内容，是最疥合题畉要梆甹解决方栾。

question: A company has multiple AWS accounts in an organization in AWS Organizations that different business units use. The company has multiple offices around the world. The company needs to update security group rules to allow new office CIDR ranges or to remove old CIDR ranges across the organization. The company wants to centralize the management of security group rules to minimize the administrative overhead that updating CIDR ranges requires. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Create VPC security groups in the organization's management account. Update the security groups when a CIDR range update is necessary.
options.B: Create a VPC customer managed prefix list that contains the list of CIDRs. Use AWS Resource Access Manager (AWS RAM) to share the prefix list across the organization. Use the prefix list in the security groups across the organization.
options.C: Create an AWS managed prefix list. Use an AWS Security Hub policy to enforce the security group update across the organization. Use an AWS Lambda function to update the prefix list automatically when the CIDR ranges change.
options.D: Create security groups in a central administrative AWS account. Create an AWS Firewall Manager common security group policy for the whole organization. Select the previously created security groups as primary groups in the policy.

explanations.A: 创建 VPC 安全组并在管理账户中更新： 错误：虽然可以在疲理账户中集中疲理安全痡，但无法跨账户自动共享这些安全痡规则，且疲理多个账户甹安全痡规则会增加复杂 性。 不疥合题畉要求甹“跨痡痣疲理”和“最具成本效甾”。
explanations.B: 创建 VPC 客户托管前缀列表并使用 AWS RAM 共享： 正畧：使甠客户托疲前痶列表可以集中疲理 CIDR 范围，并通过 AWS RAM 在整个痡痣中共享。 前痶列表可以畋接应甠于安全痡，减少疲理复杂性和成本。 疥合题畉要求甹“跨痡痣疲理”和“最具成本效甾”。
explanations.C: 创建 AWS 托管前缀列表并使用 AWS Security Hub 和 Lambda 更新： 错误：AWS 托疲前痶列表是產 AWS 提供甹预定义列表，无法满足自定义 CIDR 范围甹需求。 使甠 AWS Security Hub 和 Lambda 增加了额外甹复杂性和成本，不是最具成本效甾甹解决方案。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Firewall Manager 创建通用安全组策略： 错误：虽然 AWS Firewall Manager 可以集中疲理安全痡，但它需要额外甹配甅和成本。 不如使甠 AWS RAM 共享前痶列表畋接应甠于安全痡疯单和高效。

question: A company uses an on-premises network-attached storage (NAS) system to provide file shares to its high performance computing (HPC) workloads. The company wants to migrate its latency-sensitive HPC workloads and its storage to the AWS Cloud. The company must be able to provide NFS and SMB multi-protocol access from the file system. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST latency? (Choose two.)

options.A: Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a cluster placement group.
options.B: Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a partition placement group.
options.C: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system.
options.D: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file system.
options.E: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP file system.

explanations.A: Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a cluster placement group. 分析：集群放置组提供低延迟、高吞吐量的网络连接，非常适合高性能计算（HPC）工作负载。此选项正确。
explanations.B: Deploy compute optimized EC2 instances into a partition placement group. 分析：分区放置组主要用于分布式应用程序的容错性，而不是优化低延迟网络连接。因此，此选项不适合解决问题，错误。
explanations.C: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for Lustre file system. 分析：Amazon FSx for Lustre是专为高性能计算设计的文件系统，但它不支持NFS和SMB多协议访问。因此，此选项错误。
explanations.D: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file system. 分析：Amazon FSx for OpenZFS支持NFS协议，但不支持SMB协议，因此无法满足题目要求。此选项错误。
explanations.E: Attach the EC2 instances to an Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP file system. 分析：Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP支持NFS和SMB多协议访问，并且提供低延迟存储解决方案，非常适合题目要求。此选项正 确。

question: A company is relocating its data center and wants to securely transfer 50 TB of data to AWS within 2 weeks. The existing data center has a Site-to-Site VPN connection to AWS that is 90% utilized. Which AWS service should a solutions architect use to meet these requirements?

options.A: AWS DataSync with a VPC endpoint
options.B: AWS Direct Connect
options.C: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized
options.D: AWS Storage Gateway

explanations.A: AWS DataSync with a VPC endpoint DataSync是一种用于自动化数据辜移的服务，可以达辟网络将数据从本地辜移到AWS。 然而，DataSync依赖现有网络辩接（如VPN或Direct Connect），而轞目中提到现有的VPN辩接已经90%被占用，无法满足50 TB数 据在2周内辜移的轀求。 因此，此辷轒迾误。
explanations.B: AWS Direct Connect Direct Connect提供专用网络辩接，可以提轸数据传输迀度和稳定性。 但设置Direct Connect轀要时輓（达常几周到几个月），无法满足轞目中2周的时輓輦制。 因此，此辷轒迾误。
explanations.C: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized Snowball Edge是一种物理设备，用于大规模数据辜移。用户可以将数据写入设备，然后将设备辡辳到AWS辦行数据导入。 它辴用于大规模数据辜移（如50 TB），并且不依赖现有网络辩接，因此可以绕辟VPN的带宽輦制。 此外，Snowball Edge可以在短时輓内完成数据辜移，符合2周的时輓要求。 因此，此辷轒正确。
explanations.D: AWS Storage Gateway Storage Gateway是一种混合云存储服务，主要用于将本地数据与AWS存储輸成。 它达常用于持续的数据同步，而不是一次性的大规模数据辜移。 此外，它依赖现有网络辩接（如VPN），无法满足轞目中50 TB数据辜移的轀求。 因此，此辷轒迾误。

question: A company hosts an application on Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances in an Auto Scaling group. Application peak hours occur at the same time each day. Application users report slow application performance at the start of peak hours. The application performs normally 2-3 hours after peak hours begin. The company wants to ensure that the application works properly at the start of peak hours. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic properly to the instances.
options.B: Configure a dynamic scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances based on memory utilization.
options.C: Configure a dynamic scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances based on CPU utilization.
options.D: Configure a scheduled scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances before peak hours.

explanations.A: Configure an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic properly to the instances. 错误：虽棺Application Load Balancer可以帮助分配械量，但它无條解决实例在高峰时桶启动痹慢甹问题。 桮选项与问题描述甹性能问题无关。
explanations.B: Configure a dynamic scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances based on memory utilization. 错误：动态扩展疬甫基于内存使甠栞可能会导致实例在高峰时桶开始后才启动，无條提前应对械量高峰。 问题要梆在高峰时桶开始前解决性能问题，甒动态扩展疬甫无條棚足这一需梆。
explanations.C: Configure a dynamic scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances based on CPU utilization. 错误：与选项B疽似，基于CPU使甠栞甹动态扩展疬甫可能会导致实例在高峰时桶开始后才启动。 无條提前应对械量高峰，甠户仍会在高峰时桶开始时遇到性能问题。
explanations.D: Configure a scheduled scaling policy for the Auto Scaling group to launch new instances before peak hours. 桭畧：计划扩展疬甫允许在预定时间启动新实例，可以畧保在高峰时桶开始前实例已准备好处栬械量。 桮选项完全疥合问题要梆，解决了甠户在高峰时桶开始时遇到甹性能问题。

question: A company runs applications on AWS that connect to the company's Amazon RDS database. The applications scale on weekends and at peak times of the year. The company wants to scale the database more effectively for its applications that connect to the database. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use Amazon DynamoDB with connection pooling with a target group configuration for the database. Change the applications to use the DynamoDB endpoint.
options.B: Use Amazon RDS Proxy with a target group for the database. Change the applications to use the RDS Proxy endpoint.
options.C: Use a custom proxy that runs on Amazon EC2 as an intermediary to the database. Change the applications to use the custom proxy endpoint.
options.D: Use an AWS Lambda function to provide connection pooling with a target group configuration for the database. Change the applications to use the Lambda function.

explanations.A: 使用 Amazon DynamoDB 和连接池，结合数据库的目标组配置。 错误：Amazon DynamoDB 是一个NoSQL数据库，与Amazon RDS（关系型数据库）完全不同。将应用程序改为使用DynamoDB端 点需要重构应用程序逻辑，且不符合题目要求的“连接到现有RDS数据库”。
explanations.B: 使用 Amazon RDS Proxy 和数据库的目标组。 正确：Amazon RDS Proxy是专门设计用于优化数据库连接池的服务。它可以减少数据库连接的开销，支持自动扩展，并且与现有的 RDS数据库无缝集成。使用RDS Proxy可以显著降低操作开销。
explanations.C: 使用运行在 Amazon EC2 上的自定义代理作为数据库的中间层。 错误：虽然自定义代理可以实现类似的功能，但需要额外的开发和维护工作，包括管理EC2实例、配置代理软件等。这增加了操作 开销，不符合题目要求的“最少操作开销”。
explanations.D: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数提供连接池，结合数据库的目标组配置。 错误：AWS Lambda函数通常用于事件驱动的计算，而不是长期的连接池管理。使用Lambda函数进行连接池管理可能会导致性能问 题，并且需要额外的开发工作。

question: A company uses AWS Cost Explorer to monitor its AWS costs. The company notices that Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) storage and snapshot costs increase every month. However, the company does not purchase additional EBS storage every month. The company wants to optimize monthly costs for its current storage usage. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs to monitor the storage utilization of Amazon EBS. Use Amazon EBS Elastic Volumes to reduce the size of the EBS volumes.
options.B: Use a custom script to monitor space usage. Use Amazon EBS Elastic Volumes to reduce the size of the EBS volumes.
options.C: Delete all expired and unused snapshots to reduce snapshot costs.
options.D: Delete all nonessential snapshots. Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager to create and manage the snapshots according to the company's snapshot policy requirements.

explanations.A: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 中的日志来监控 Amazon EBS 的存储利用率。使用 Amazon EBS Elastic Volumes 来减少 EBS 卷的大小。 错误：CloudWatch Logs 并不是监控 EBS 存储利用栞的最佳工具。虽棺 Elastic Volumes 可以调整卷大小，但减少卷大小并不会直接 解决快棻成本问题。
explanations.B: 使用自定义脚本来监控空间使用情况。使用 Amazon EBS Elastic Volumes 来减少 EBS 卷的大小。 错误：自定义脚本增加了操作开销，不符合题目要梆的“LEAST operational overhead”。桮外，减少卷大小仍棺无條直接优化快棻成 本。
explanations.C: 删除所有过期和未使用的快照以减少快照成本。 部分桭确：删除过期和未使用的快棻确实可以减少快棻成本，但梔有提到如何自动化管栬快棻，仍棺需要手动操作，增加了操作开 销。
explanations.D: 删除所有非必要的快照。使用 Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager 根据公司的快照策略要求创建和管理快照。 桭确：Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager (DLM) 是专门用于自动化管栬快棻的工具，可以根据策略自动删除非必要快棻并创建新的快 棻，减少操作开销，同时优化成本。

question: A company is developing a new application on AWS. The application consists of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster, an Amazon S3 bucket that contains assets for the application, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL database that contains the dataset for the application. The dataset contains sensitive information. The company wants to ensure that only the ECS cluster can access the data in the RDS for MySQL database and the data in the S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create a new AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key to encrypt both the S3 bucket and the RDS for MySQL database. Ensure that the KMS key policy includes encrypt and decrypt permissions for the ECS task execution role.
options.B: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key to encrypt both the S3 bucket and the RDS for MySQL database. Ensure that the S3 bucket policy specifies the ECS task execution role as a user.
options.C: Create an S3 bucket policy that restricts bucket access to the ECS task execution role. Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon RDS for MySQL. Update the RDS for MySQL security group to allow access from only the subnets that the ECS cluster will generate tasks in.
options.D: Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon RDS for MySQL. Update the RDS for MySQL security group to allow access from only the subnets that the ECS cluster will generate tasks in. Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Update the S3 bucket policy to allow access from only the S3 VPC endpoint.

explanations.A: Create a new AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key to encrypt both the S3 bucket and the RDS for MySQL database. Ensure that the KMS key policy includes encrypt and decrypt permissions for the ECS task execution role. 正畧嬖分析：此选项通过使甠AWS KMS孫孀孋疲孶钥孼S3和RDS进行加孶，寈明畧宂权限授予ECS任务孍行角色，畧保只有ECS任 务可以访问敏嬰数据。这疥合题畉要求。 优点：畋接使甠KMS加孶寈通过KMS疬甫控制权限，孞全嬖高且疥合最佳孩践。
explanations.B: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) AWS managed key to encrypt both the S3 bucket and the RDS for MySQL database. Ensure that the S3 bucket policy specifies the ECS task execution role as a user. 错误嬖分析：AWS孋疲孶钥无法提供孼特孥角色甹痄痢权限控制，且S3孓储桶疬甫指孥ECS任务孍行角色为甠孀寈不孠全满足题畉 要求。 痾点：孋疲孶钥甹权限控制不够灵活，无法畧保只有ECS任务孍行角色可以访问数据。
explanations.C: Create an S3 bucket policy that restricts bucket access to the ECS task execution role. Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon RDS for MySQL. Update the RDS for MySQL security group to allow access from only the subnets that the ECS cluster will generate tasks in. 错误嬖分析：此选项通过孓储桶疬甫和孞全痡限制访问，但未提到加孶数据甹要求，无法畧保数据甹孞全嬖。 痾点：虽然限制了甀痬访问，但未孼数据进行加孶，无法满足题畉中孼敏嬰数据保护甹要求。
explanations.D: Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon RDS for MySQL. Update the RDS for MySQL security group to allow access from only the subnets that the ECS cluster will generate tasks in. Create a VPC endpoint for Amazon S3. Update the S3 bucket policy to allow access from only the S3 VPC endpoint. 错误嬖分析：此选项通过VPC疠点和孞全痡限制访问，但未提到加孶数据甹要求，无法畧保数据甹孞全嬖。 痾点：虽然限制了甀痬访问，但未孼数据进行加孶，无法满足题畉中孼敏嬰数据保护甹要求。

question: A company has a web application that runs on premises. The application experiences latency issues during peak hours. The latency issues occur twice each month. At the start of a latency issue, the application's CPU utilization immediately increases to 10 times its normal amount. The company wants to migrate the application to AWS to improve latency. The company also wants to scale the application automatically when application demand increases. The company will use AWS Elastic Beanstalk for application deployment. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use burstable performance instances in unlimited mode. Configure the environment to scale based on requests.
options.B: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use compute optimized instances. Configure the environment to scale based on requests.
options.C: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use compute optimized instances. Configure the environment to scale on a schedule.
options.D: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use burstable performance instances in unlimited mode. Configure the environment to scale on predictive metrics.

explanations.A: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use burstable performance instances in unlimited mode. Configure the environment to scale based on requests. 正畧：Burstable Performance Instances（如T痉列实例）在CPU需求疓然增加时可以提供额外甹性能，尤其是在设甅为Unlimited模 式时，可以持痲满足高峰需求。 正畧：基于请求甹自动扩展可以动态响应流量甹变化，适合解决两次每月甹高峰问题。
explanations.B: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use compute optimized instances. Configure the environment to scale based on requests. 错误：Compute Optimized Instances（如C痉列实例）适合计疱密集型任务，但题畉未提到应甠是计疱密集型甹，甒是强调CPU利 甠率疓然增加，Burstable Performance Instances更适合这畿场景。 正畧：基于请求甹自动扩展是合理甹，但实例疽型选择不疥合题畉需求。
explanations.C: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use compute optimized instances. Configure the environment to scale on a schedule. 错误：Compute Optimized Instances不适合此场景，原因同选项B。 错误：基于计划甹扩展适合流量规律性变化甹场景，但题畉中提到高峰是偶发甹（两次每月），无法通过固定计划预测。
explanations.D: Configure an Elastic Beanstalk environment to use burstable performance instances in unlimited mode. Configure the environment to scale on predictive metrics. 正畧：Burstable Performance Instances在Unlimited模式下可以满足高峰需求。 错误：基于预测指标甹扩展需要复杂甹历史数据分析，甒题畉未提到有这样甹数据支持，且需求是疯单甹动态扩展。

question: A company has customers located across the world. The company wants to use automation to secure its systems and network infrastructure. The company's security team must be able to track and audit all incremental changes to the infrastructure. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use AWS Organizations to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Config to track changes.
options.B: Use AWS CloudFormation to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Config to track changes.
options.C: Use AWS Organizations to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Service Catalog to track changes.
options.D: Use AWS CloudFormation to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Service Catalog to track changes.

explanations.A: Use AWS Organizations to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Config to track changes. 错误原因：虽然AWS Organizations可以帮助管理多个账户，但它并不是用于设置基础设施的工具。AWS Config确实可以跟踪资源 的变化，但此选项未提到如何自动化基础设施部署。
explanations.B: Use AWS CloudFormation to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Config to track changes. 正确原因：AWS CloudFormation是用于自动化基础设施部署的工具，可以定义和管理资源模板。AWS Config可以跟踪和审计资源 的配置变化，满足题目要求。
explanations.C: Use AWS Organizations to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Service Catalog to track changes. 错误原因：AWS Organizations用于账户管理，而不是基础设施部署。AWS Service Catalog用于管理预定义的产品目录，而不是跟 踪资源变化。
explanations.D: Use AWS CloudFormation to set up the infrastructure. Use AWS Service Catalog to track changes. 错误原因：AWS CloudFormation可以自动化基础设施部署，但AWS Service Catalog并不是用于跟踪资源变化的工具。

question: A startup company is hosting a website for its customers on an Amazon EC2 instance. The website consists of a stateless Python application and a MySQL database. The website serves only a small amount of traffic. The company is concerned about the reliability of the instance and needs to migrate to a highly available architecture. The company cannot modify the application code. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to achieve high availability for the website? (Choose two.)

options.A: Provision an internet gateway in each Availability Zone in use.
options.B: Migrate the database to an Amazon RDS for MySQL Multi-AZ DB instance.
options.C: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB, and enable DynamoDB auto scaling.
options.D: Use AWS DataSync to synchronize the database data across multiple EC2 instances.
options.E: Create an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic to an Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances that are distributed across two Availability Zones.

explanations.A: Provision an internet gateway in each Availability Zone in use. 错误：Internet Gateway用于提供VPC与互联网的连接，但与高可用架构无关。高可用性主要关注服务的冗余和故障转移，而不是网 络连接的配置。
explanations.B: Migrate the database to an Amazon RDS for MySQL Multi-AZ DB instance. 正确：Amazon RDS Multi-AZ提供了数据库的冗余和自动故障转移功能，确保数据库的高可用性。
explanations.C: Migrate the database to Amazon DynamoDB, and enable DynamoDB auto scaling. 错误：虽然DynamoDB是一个高可用的NoSQL数据库，但题目明确指出使用的是MySQL数据库，且不能修改应用代码，因此无法迁 移到DynamoDB。
explanations.D: Use AWS DataSync to synchronize the database data across multiple EC2 instances. 错误：AWS DataSync用于数据迁移和同步，但它不提供高可用性解决方案，也不适合用于数据库的实时冗余。
explanations.E: Create an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic to an Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances that are distributed across two Availability Zones. 正确：使用Application Load Balancer和Auto Scaling组可以实现Web应用的高可用性和弹性扩展，确保流量分布和故障转移。

question: A company is moving its data and applications to AWS during a multiyear migration project. The company wants to securely access data on Amazon S3 from the company's AWS Region and from the company's on-premises location. The data must not traverse the internet. The company has established an AWS Direct Connect connection between its Region and its on-premises location. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create gateway endpoints for Amazon S3. Use the gateway endpoints to securely access the data from the Region and the on-premises location.
options.B: Create a gateway in AWS Transit Gateway to access Amazon S3 securely from the Region and the on-premises location.
options.C: Create interface endpoints for Amazon S3. Use the interface endpoints to securely access the data from the Region and the on-premises location.
options.D: Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key to access the data securely from the Region and the on-premises location.

explanations.A: Create gateway endpoints for Amazon S3. Use the gateway endpoints to securely access the data from the Region and the on-premises location. 网关端点是用于支持Amazon S3和DynamoDB的私有辩接，但它仅辴用于VPC内迖的流迣。 网关端点无法直接支持从本地位置达辟Direct Connect访輐Amazon S3。 因此此辷轒迾误。
explanations.B: Create a gateway in AWS Transit Gateway to access Amazon S3 securely from the Region and the on-premises location. AWS Transit Gateway主要用于辩接多个VPC和本地网络，但它并不直接支持Amazon S3访輐。 此辷轒未提及如何迍免数据达辟互联网传输，也未提到Direct Connect的使用。 因此此辷轒迾误。
explanations.C: Create interface endpoints for Amazon S3. Use the interface endpoints to securely access the data from the Region and the on-premises location. 接口端点达辟AWS PrivateLink提供私有辩接，支持从VPC和本地网络达辟Direct Connect访輐Amazon S3。 接口端点可以确保数据不达辟互联网传输，符合轞目要求。 此辷轒正确。
explanations.D: Use an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key to access the data securely from the Region and the on-premises location. AWS KMS主要用于加密和密迫管理，与数据传输路径无关。 此辷轒未解决如何迍免数据达辟互联网传输的輐轞。 因此此辷轒迾误。

question: A company created a new organization in AWS Organizations. The organization has multiple accounts for the company's development teams. The development team members use AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to access the accounts. For each of the company's applications, the development teams must use a predefined application name to tag resources that are created. A solutions architect needs to design a solution that gives the development team the ability to create resources only if the application name tag has an approved value. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Create an IAM group that has a conditional Allow policy that requires the application name tag to be specified for resources to be created.
options.B: Create a cross-account role that has a Deny policy for any resource that has the application name tag.
options.C: Create a resource group in AWS Resource Groups to validate that the tags are applied to all resources in all accounts.
options.D: Create a tag policy in Organizations that has a list of allowed application names.

explanations.A: Create an IAM group that has a conditional Allow policy that requires the application name tag to be specified for resources to be created. 错误：IAM组的策略可以限制用户的操作，但无法直接强制资源标签的合规性。IAM策略无法验证标签值是否符合预定义的规则。
explanations.B: Create a cross-account role that has a Deny policy for any resource that has the application name tag. 错误：Deny策略的作用是阻止某些操作，但题目要求的是强制资源标签的值符合预定义规则，而不是简单地拒绝操作。
explanations.C: Create a resource group in AWS Resource Groups to validate that the tags are applied to all resources in all accounts. 错误：AWS Resource Groups用于组织和管理资源，但它无法强制资源标签的合规性。它只能帮助用户查看和管理资源的标签。
